centers.english: to make something

examples.english: Diane makes all her own clothes.
examples.chinese: 黛安娜的衣服全是自己做的。

examples.english: The furniture was made by a Swedish firm.
examples.chinese: 这家具是一家瑞典公司制造的。

examples.english: They've just finished making a movie about life during the Civil War.
examples.chinese: 他们刚拍完一部描写南北战争期间生活的影片。

examples.english: My camera was made in Taiwan.
examples.chinese: 我的照相机是台湾造的。

examples.english: I'll make you a coffee, shall I?
examples.chinese: 我给你泡杯咖啡好不好?

examples.english: a bag made of leather
examples.chinese: 皮制的袋子

examples.english: People were living in huts made from mud, stones, and straw.
examples.chinese: 人们以前住在用泥土、石块和稻草砌成的棚屋里。

examples.english: You could make some cushion covers out of those curtains.
examples.chinese: 你可以用那些窗帘做几个靠垫套。

examples.english: The dairy produced over 1500 tonnes of butter per year.
examples.chinese: 这家乳品厂每年生产1,500多吨黄油。

examples.english: They produce cheap goods for export to the United States.
examples.chinese: 他们生产廉价产品出口到美国。

examples.english: a factory that produces high-quality steel
examples.chinese: 一家生产优质钢的工厂

examples.english: He works for a small company manufacturing aluminium products.
examples.chinese: 他在一家生产铝制品的小型公司上班。

examples.english: The car was designed, developed, and manufactured in collaboration with Honda.
examples.chinese: 这款车是与本田公司联手设计、开发和生产的。

examples.english: Henry Ford made his fortune mass-producing the Model T.
examples.chinese: 亨利·福特通过大规模生产T型汽车而发了大财。

examples.english: The bike is the first mass-produced bicycle to have full front and rear suspension.
examples.chinese: 这是首辆大规模生产的装有前后减震装置的自行车。

examples.english: They turn out cheap souvenirs for tourists.
examples.chinese: 他们大量生产廉价纪念品卖给游客。

examples.english: Churning out pamphlets and booklets is ineffective if consumers cannot understand the messages.
examples.chinese: 如果顾客不能领会其中的意思，那么大量印制小册子是没有用的。

examples.english: As long as people keep buying these products, the company will keep turning them out.
examples.chinese: 只要一直有人买这些产品，公司就会一直大量生产。

examples.english: Picasso created a completely new style of painting.
examples.chinese: 毕加索创造出了一种全新的绘画风格。

examples.english: She wanted to create a garden to complement her beautiful home.
examples.chinese: 她想修建一座花园与她的漂亮房子相配。

examples.english: This dish was created by master chef Marco Pierre White.
examples.chinese: 这道菜是由名厨马可·皮埃尔·怀特创制的。

examples.english: Two million years ago our ancestors began to fashion stone tools.
examples.chinese: 二百万年前，我们的祖先开始制作石器。

examples.english: The man had fashioned a turban from a strip of torn cloth.
examples.chinese: 那个男人用一条破布做了一条包头巾。

examples.english: One of Jim's hobbies is building model airplanes.
examples.chinese: 吉姆的爱好之一是制作模型飞机。

examples.english: John and his father built the cabin themselves.
examples.chinese: 约翰和他父亲自己造了那幢小木屋。

examples.english: Every single car is built by hand at the company's headquarters near Turin.
examples.chinese: 每一辆车都是在都灵附近的这家公司的总部里用手工生产的。

examples.english: It is easy to construct a wooden framework for plants to grow against.
examples.chinese: 给植物做个攀爬的木架很容易。

examples.english: Developers want to construct a replica of the 19th century steam yacht.
examples.chinese: 开发商想造一艘19世纪蒸汽机游艇的复制品。

examples.english: The roof frames were constructed from thick, heavy timbers.
examples.chinese: 屋顶框架是用又粗又重的木材建造的。

examples.english: It's one of those beds that you have to assemble yourself.
examples.chinese: 这是那种你必须自己来组装的床。

examples.english: Our kits are very easy to assemble.
examples.chinese: 我们的配套元件很容易拼装。

examples.english: The apprentices worked in the shed where the new locomotives were assembled and the old ones repaired.
examples.chinese: 学徒们在工作棚里组装新机车，修理旧机车。

examples.english: Production had shifted completely to the assembly of wheelbarrows and other gardening equipment.
examples.chinese: 生产已完全转成了组装手推车和其他园艺设备。

centers.english: to make something quickly using whatever materials you have
centers.chinese: 利用手头的材料匆匆做成某物

examples.english: She was always good on the sewing machine. She could knock off an outfit in two hours.
examples.chinese: 她总是很擅长使用缝纫机，两小时就能做好一套衣服。

examples.english: I could knock you up a couple of poached eggs.
examples.chinese: 我可以很快给你煮几个荷包蛋。

examples.english: Sheryl had thrown together his costume somewhat haphazardly.
examples.chinese: 谢里尔马虎地做好他的戏服。

examples.english: We had 15 minutes to throw lunch together, eat, and get changed.
examples.chinese: 我们有15分钟弄顿午饭，吃饭，再换衣服。

examples.english: You don't have blinds or curtains so you'll need to rig up something to shut out the sunlight.
examples.chinese: 你没有百叶窗或窗帘，所以需要弄些东西挡住太阳光。

examples.english: Can you rig a gate up to stop the dog getting into my room?
examples.chinese: 你能随便搭个门，防止狗窜到我房里来吗？

examples.english: There's a shower rigged up at the back of the cabin.
examples.chinese: 小木屋后面临时搭了个冲淋浴的地方。

examples.english: She cobbled together a tent from a few pieces of string and a sheet.
examples.chinese: 她用几根绳子和一张床单草草搭了个帐篷。

examples.english: We were always searching for bits of junk we could cobble together into something artistic.
examples.chinese: 我们一直在搜寻可以拼搭成艺术品的小块废料。

examples.english: There's a woman at the end of our street who will run up some curtains for me.
examples.chinese: 我们那条街的一头有个女人，她会给我赶缝几条窗帘。

examples.english: ‘I like your dress.’ ‘Oh, thank you. It's just something I ran up last night.’
examples.chinese: “我很喜欢你的裙子。”“哦，谢谢。这不过是我昨晚匆匆赶制出来的。”

examples.english: They had improvised an alarm, using string and empty cans.
examples.chinese: 他们用绳子和空罐子临时做了一个警报器。

examples.english: I improvised a sling for his arm out of a strip of cloth.
examples.chinese: 我用一根布条给他做了根手臂悬带凑合着用。

examples.english: He was standing on an improvised stage.
examples.chinese: 他站在临时搭成的台上。

examples.english: an improvised shelter
examples.chinese: 临时搭成的棚

examples.english: Using an old tree-trunk as a makeshift table, we ate our picnic.
examples.chinese: 我们用一棵老树树干充当桌子，在上面吃野餐。

examples.english: When we reached the river we found that the makeshift bridge had been swept away.
examples.chinese: 到达那条河时，我们发现临时搭的桥已被冲掉了。

examples.english: They rigged up the canvas boat-cover as a makeshift sail.
examples.chinese: 他们临时用小船的帆布篷子凑合着做了个帆。

centers.english: when a natural process makes something

examples.english: Hydrogen and oxygen combine to form water.
examples.chinese: 氢和氧结合产生水。

examples.english: Coal is formed naturally from decomposed organic matter.
examples.chinese: 煤是由分解的有机物质自然形成的。

examples.english: The stomach produces acids which help to digest food.
examples.chinese: 胃产生酸来帮助消化食物。

examples.english: Carbon dioxide is produced during respiration.
examples.chinese: 呼吸过程中产生二氧化碳。

examples.english: Land movement created the Alps.
examples.chinese: 陆地运动创造了阿尔卑斯山。

examples.english: A bullet exceeding the speed of sound creates two shock waves.
examples.chinese: 一颗超过声速的子弹产生两个冲击波。

examples.english: We found that this chemical process created hydrogen chloride as a by-product.
examples.chinese: 我们发现这一化学过程产生了一种副产品—氯化氢。

examples.english: The friction between the satellite and the atmosphere generates great heat.
examples.chinese: 卫星与大气的摩擦产生大量的热。

examples.english: France generates a large part of its electricity from nuclear power.
examples.chinese: 在法国大部分用电是通过核动力产生的。

centers.english: to make something into a particular shape

examples.english: She cut away the corners to form a circle.
examples.chinese: 她切去各个角使之成为圆形。

examples.english: With a few clever twists, he had formed the balloon into the shape of a dog.
examples.chinese: 他巧妙地把气球扭了几下，把它弄成了一只狗的形状。

examples.english: Her movements were quick and graceful, like those of a potter moulding clay.
examples.chinese: 她的动作迅速而优雅，就像制陶工人用模子制黏土模型。

examples.english: Mould the sausage meat into little balls.
examples.chinese: 把香肠肉捏成小肉丸。

examples.english: a tool with a moulded rubber handle
examples.chinese: 有橡胶铸柄的工具

examples.english: Gel is great for holding and shaping shorter hairstyles.
examples.chinese: 发胶用来固定和塑造较短的发型是很管用的。

examples.english: She had soaked the leather to bend and shape it into the form of a small shoe.
examples.chinese: 她把这块皮革浸泡了一下，以便折制成一只小鞋子的形状。

centers.english: made by a person, not a machine
centers.chinese: 人工制作而非机器制造的

examples.english: All our goods are handmade, and we use only natural materials.
examples.chinese: 我们的产品全是手工制造的，而且我们只用天然材料。

examples.english: a beautiful handmade rug
examples.chinese: 一块漂亮的手工地毯

examples.english: Try one of these homemade cookies. They're delicious.
examples.chinese: 尝一块这种家里自制的饼干，很好吃的。

examples.english: a bowl of homemade soup
examples.chinese: 一碗家里烧的汤

centers.english: a person, organization or country that makes something
centers.chinese: 制造某物的人、组织或国家

examples.english: Makers of cars often think more about speed than about safety.
examples.chinese: 汽车制造商考虑更多的经常是速度而非安全。

examples.english: The wine maker has to decide when the crop is ready for picking.
examples.chinese: 制酒商必须决定葡萄何时成熟可供采摘。

examples.english: Personal computer makers are likely to face continued pressure to keep prices low.
examples.chinese: 个人电脑制造商很可能会面临保持低价的持续压力。

examples.english: Many producers are being forced to cut costs and use cheaper materials.
examples.chinese: 许多生产商正被迫降低成本和使用更便宜的材料。

examples.english: Japan is the biggest producer of stereo equipment.
examples.chinese: 日本是立体声设备的最大生产国。

examples.english: OPEC is an organization of 13 major oil producers.
examples.chinese: 石油输出国组织是由12个主要的石油生产国组成的一个组织。

examples.english: Complaints should be sent to the manufacturer.
examples.chinese: 投诉信应寄往生产厂家。

examples.english: Alubend is one of the country's biggest manufacturers of aluminium tubes.
examples.chinese: 阿路本是该国最大的铝管生产公司之一。

examples.english: Clothing manufacturers have also felt the effects of the recession, as people spend less on clothes.
examples.chinese: 随着人们在衣服上的花费减少，服装生产公司也感到了经济衰退的影响。

centers.english: when something is made

examples.english: As demand for the drug has grown, cocaine production has skyrocketed.
examples.chinese: 随着对可卡因需求量的增加，这种毒品的产量急剧上升。

examples.english: Bulmers will be making around 40 million gallons of cider this year -- half Britain's total production.
examples.chinese: 布尔默公司今年将生产约4,000万加仑苹果酒，占英国全部产量的一半。

examples.english: Most caustic soda is used in the production of aluminium.
examples.chinese: 大多数苛性钠都被用于生产铝了。

examples.english: Output is up 30% on last year.
examples.chinese: 产量比去年增加了30%。

examples.english: In manufacturing alone, smaller firms account for one in three jobs and a quarter of the total output.
examples.chinese: 仅仅在制造业，小型公司就占了就业总人数的三分之一以及总产量的四分之一。

examples.english: There has been a huge increase in the output of children's books.
examples.chinese: 儿童书籍的总量有了巨大的增长。

examples.english: We now have fewer factories and fewer workers in manufacturing than a decade ago.
examples.chinese: 与十年前相比，现在制造业的工厂和工人数量都减少了。

examples.english: In recent years, Botswana's manufacturing industry has grown and the country produces soap and dairy produce.
examples.chinese: 近年来博茨瓦纳的制造业在增长，该国生产肥皂和乳制品。

examples.english: Systems of this type have been used in car manufacture.
examples.chinese: 这种系统已经用于汽车制造。

examples.english: The firm now employs 640 people in the manufacture of frozen foods.
examples.chinese: 该公司现在雇用了640名工人生产冷冻食品。

examples.english: The report proposed the creation of an independent Scottish parliament.
examples.chinese: 报告提议创立一个独立的苏格兰议会。

examples.english: the creation of an information system for senior managers
examples.chinese: 为高级管理人员建立一套信息系统

examples.english: Government money was poured into the economy in order to encourage industry.
examples.chinese: 政府资金注入经济领域以鼓励工业生产。

examples.english: Manufacturing industry was virtually wiped out in the UK during the 1980s.
examples.chinese: 20世纪80年代英国的制造业几乎全军覆没。

examples.english: Wages in the clothing industry were found to be lower than in any other sector.
examples.chinese: 人们发现制衣业的工资比其他任何行业的都要低。

centers.english: something that is made

examples.english: a new range of skin-care products
examples.chinese: 一套新推出的护肤产品

examples.english: There was a ban on meat pies, gelatine, and other British beef products.
examples.chinese: 牛肉馅饼、动物胶和其他英国的牛肉产品受到禁止。

examples.english: We spend a lot of money on product development.
examples.chinese: 我们在产品开发方面花了大量资金。

centers.english: the shape of something or someone
centers.chinese: 某物的形状或某人的体形

examples.english: You can get pasta in lots of different shapes.
examples.chinese: 意大利面有各式各样的形状。

examples.english: What shape is the swimming pool?
examples.chinese: 那游泳池是什么形状的?

examples.english: The fruits are similar in shape and size to plums.
examples.chinese: 那种水果的形状和大小跟李子差不多。

examples.english: The desks form a U-shape, so that the teacher can interact easily with the students.
examples.chinese: 课桌排成U字型，这样可以方便老师和学生交流。

examples.english: The pool was custom built, it is an unusual shape.
examples.chinese: 这游泳池是定制的，形状很独特。

examples.english: If a mole changes color or shape, see a doctor.
examples.chinese: 痣如果变颜色或变形状，就要去看医生。

examples.english: Sleeping forms lay in groups and rows on the earth floor.
examples.chinese: 人们三五成群地睡在泥地上。

examples.english: The painting consists of a series of interlocking forms.
examples.chinese: 这幅画是由互相扣住的图形组成的。

examples.english: There were figures painted on the walls of the cave.
examples.chinese: 洞壁上画有一个个人物形状。

examples.english: Dark figures emerged from the building, and disappeared into the night.
examples.chinese: 一个个黑色的人影从大楼里出来，消失在夜色中。

examples.english: I saw the figure of a woman below the bridge.
examples.chinese: 我看到桥下有个女子的身影。

examples.english: The trees were silhouettes in the morning fog.
examples.chinese: 那些树木成了晨雾中的剪影。

examples.english: I saw the silhouette of someone waiting under the streetlight.
examples.chinese: 我看到街灯下面有个黑影在等候。

examples.english: an artist's sketch of McMillan's profile
examples.chinese: 一位画家给麦克米伦画的侧面素描

examples.english: He sat by the window, his handsome profile outlined against the sky.
examples.chinese: 他坐在窗边，蓝天衬托着他那俊秀的侧面。

examples.english: They showed her a photo of a young brunette, taken in profile.
examples.chinese: 他们给她看了一张从侧面拍的照片，是一个深褐色头发的年轻女子。

examples.english: The outline of a footprint was visible in the snow.
examples.chinese: 一个脚印的轮廓在雪地里清晰可见。

examples.english: On the envelopes had been stamped the outlines of Santa Claus, holly, and a reindeer.
examples.chinese: 信封上盖着一个个印，有圣诞老人的形状，有冬青树的形状，还有驯鹿的形状。

examples.english: The seat is adjustable to fit the contours of your back.
examples.chinese: 座位可以调整，以适合背部的曲线。

examples.english: A topographical map shows the contours of the earth's surface.
examples.chinese: 地形图显示地表轮廓。

examples.english: The dress's flowing lines are attractive on most women.
examples.chinese: 这件连衣裙线条飘逸，大多数女性穿着都很漂亮。

examples.english: He noticed the long, slim lines of her legs beneath the colorful cotton skirt.
examples.chinese: 他看到她那条色彩丰富的棉制裙子下面有一双修长的腿。

centers.english: having a particular shape

examples.english: The windows were round, like the windows on a ship.
examples.chinese: 那些窗户是圆的，就像船上的窗一样。

examples.english: ‘What shape is the table?’ ‘It's long and rectangular.’
examples.chinese: “桌子是什么形状的？”“长长方方的。”

examples.english: There was another building, octagonal in shape, close by.
examples.chinese: 附近还有一幢房子，是八角形的。

examples.english: He gave me a necklace with a heart-shaped locket.
examples.chinese: 他送了我一条项链，上面有一个心形的盒式吊坠。

examples.english: Gus lived in an apartment in a U-shaped courtyard.
examples.chinese: 格斯住在一套有一个U字型庭院的公寓里。

examples.english: On the table were salt and pepper shakers shaped like teddy bears.
examples.chinese: 桌子上摆着玩具熊形状的盐瓶和胡椒瓶。

examples.english: a beautiful blue bowl in the shape of a flower
examples.chinese: 一只漂亮的蓝色的碗，是一朵花的形状

examples.english: There was a big chocolate cake in the shape of a heart on the main table.
examples.chinese: 主桌上放了一个很大的心形巧克力蛋糕。

centers.english: having a strange or wrong shape

examples.english: She had survived polio, but her right leg was weak and deformed.
examples.chinese: 她得过小儿麻痹症，虽然活了下来，但右腿软弱无力，成了畸形。

examples.english: The desert plants were strange deformed bushes with bizarrely twisted branches.
examples.chinese: 这些沙漠植物是一些奇形怪状的灌木，树枝长得七歪八扭、怪模怪样。

examples.english: The drug was shown to cause deformity in a high proportion of babies born to mothers taking it.
examples.chinese: 经证明，服用这种药物的母亲生出的孩子有很大的比率是畸形的。

examples.english: As a result of the crash, the remains of the vehicles were distorted out of all recognition.
examples.chinese: 这些车辆因为撞击的缘故都变形了，以致无法辨认。

examples.english: After treatment, her distorted hip had straightened, so that her legs were the same length.
examples.chinese: 经过治疗，她那变形的臀部变直了，所以两条腿也一样长了。

examples.english: The old woman's fingers were misshapen and useless.
examples.chinese: 那老妇人的手指都变形了，没有用了。

examples.english: Misshapen carrots and potatoes were fed to the pigs.
examples.chinese: 畸形的胡萝卜和马铃薯都喂给猪吃。

examples.english: She gave me a lopsided smile.
examples.chinese: 她歪着嘴对我笑了笑。

examples.english: a note written in a child's lopsided handwriting
examples.chinese: 小孩子写的字迹歪歪斜斜的一张字条

examples.english: His whole face was lopsided, one cheek badly scarred.
examples.chinese: 他的整张脸都歪了，其中一边脸颊有很难看的疤痕。

examples.english: His battered old hat had completely lost its shape.
examples.chinese: 他那顶破旧的帽子已经完全不成样子了。

examples.english: She was wearing an old jumper that had lost its shape.
examples.chinese: 她穿着一件已经走样的旧毛衣。

centers.english: having no clear or exact shape
centers.chinese: 没有明显或确定形状的

examples.english: He was wearing a shapeless grey coat which really did not fit him.
examples.chinese: 他穿着一件不成形的灰色外套，一点都不合身。

examples.english: People trudged on, carrying shapeless bundles full of clothes or bedding.
examples.chinese: 人们抱着一捆捆包得乱七八糟的衣服和被单艰难地行走。

examples.english: The molten rock hardens into amorphous forms.
examples.chinese: 熔岩凝固成一块块不规则的形状。

examples.english: In her later works, large, amorphous shapes seem to float on the canvas.
examples.chinese: 她后期的作品中，一个个大大的、说不清楚是什么形状的图案就好像漂浮在画布上似的。

centers.english: having a regular shape

examples.english: Draw a regular hexagon with 90 mm sides.
examples.chinese: 画一个规则的、边长为90毫米的六边形。

examples.english: She was attractive rather than beautiful, with regular features and dark hair.
examples.chinese: 她五官端正，留着一头黑发，应该说是可爱，而不是漂亮。

examples.english: The leaves of most trees are symmetrical in shape.
examples.chinese: 多数树木的叶子形状都是对称的。

examples.english: Palladio built the Villa Rotunda following a symmetrical plan.
examples.chinese: 帕拉迪奥的圆形别墅是照着一个对称的平面图建造的。

examples.english: the delicate symmetry of a snowflake
examples.chinese: 雪花那种精细的对称

centers.english: having a shape that is not regular

examples.english: Lake Powell's irregular coastline has many unspoiled beaches and secluded inlets.
examples.chinese: 在鲍威尔湖曲折的湖岸线上，有许多原始的沙滩和僻静的小港。

examples.english: I recognized the doctor's messy, irregular handwriting.
examples.chinese: 我认出这是医生的字，潦草而不工整。

examples.english: a large, irregularly shaped room
examples.chinese: 一个形状不规则的大房间

examples.english: The design of the house is consciously asymmetrical with a large tower at one end.
examples.chinese: 这房子的设计是有意不对称的，其中一端有一个很大的塔楼。

centers.english: PATTERN

examples.english: I'm looking for a wallpaper with a nice bold pattern.
examples.chinese: 我在找一种图案漂亮、醒目的墙纸。

examples.english: a navy blue silk blouse with a white flowery pattern
examples.chinese: 一件深蓝色带白色花样图案的丝绸女衬衫

examples.english: patterns of sunlight and shadow on the ground
examples.chinese: 地上日光与阴影交织的图案

examples.english: This design is very common on Turkish carpets.
examples.chinese: 这种图案在土耳其地毯上很常见。

examples.english: brightly coloured curtains with an attractive floral design
examples.chinese: 带有漂亮花卉图案的色彩鲜艳的窗帘

examples.english: The bird can be easily recognized by its unusual red and yellow markings.
examples.chinese: 那种鸟的羽毛上有不同寻常的红黄色花纹，容易辨认。

examples.english: She was wearing a plain white T-shirt with a fish motif in blue and green.
examples.chinese: 她穿着一件素色白T恤，上面有个蓝绿色的鱼图案。

examples.english: The zebra has very distinctive patterning.
examples.chinese: 斑马身上有很独特的图案。

examples.english: Look at the beautiful delicate patterning around the base of the vase.
examples.chinese: 来看看这只花瓶的底部那圈漂亮、精细的图案。

centers.english: to think of a new idea, design, or name for something
centers.chinese: 为某物构思出一个新想法、新设计或新名称

examples.english: Alexander Graham Bell invented the telephone.
examples.chinese: 亚历山大·格雷厄姆·贝尔发明了电话。

examples.english: Television was invented in the 1920s.
examples.chinese: 电视是20世纪20年代发明的。

examples.english: Theremin invented the weird electronic instrument that provided soundtracks to 1950s science-fiction movies.
examples.chinese: 塞里明发明了奇怪的电子乐器，这种乐器为20世纪50年代的科幻电影做配乐录音。

examples.english: This discovery was to lead to the invention of the nuclear bomb.
examples.chinese: 这一发现引致了核弹的发明。

examples.english: Agatha Christie created the character Hercule Poirot.
examples.chinese: 阿加莎·克里斯蒂创造出了赫尔克里·波洛这个角色。

examples.english: Mary Quant created a whole new look for women's clothes in the 1960s.
examples.chinese: 玛丽官在20世纪60年代设计出了令人眼界大开的女性时装。

examples.english: See if you can come up with a better name for it.
examples.chinese: 你看能不能给它想一个更好的名称。

examples.english: We need to think up some new ideas for the Christmas show.
examples.chinese: 我们要给圣诞演出想些新主意。

examples.english: We don't just think this stuff up. It's the way good lawyers always operate.
examples.chinese: 这可不是我们想出来的。好的律师向来就是按此方法做事的。

examples.english: The exercise programme was devised by a leading health expert.
examples.chinese: 这个锻炼方案是由一名著名的健康专家设计的。

examples.english: Scientists have devised a test that shows who is most likely to get the disease.
examples.chinese: 科学家发明了一种测试方法，此方法可显示哪一种人最易患这种病。

examples.english: For Halloween, the children made up stories about wolves and witches.
examples.chinese: 过万圣节时，小孩子们编出狼和巫婆的故事。

examples.english: When my mother was in a good mood, she would make up songs about us.
examples.chinese: 我妈妈心情好时会编有关我们的歌曲。

examples.english: That's a good riddle. Did you make it up yourself?
examples.chinese: 那是个不错的谜语。是你自己想出来的吗？

examples.english: ‘We wanted to make something new and original,’ said Colin Smith, the man who conceived the show.
examples.chinese: “我们想编出富有新意和独创性的东西，”这出戏的创意人科林·史密斯说道。

examples.english: The painting is beautifully conceived in every way -- composition, colour and texture.
examples.chinese: 那幅画各方面的构思都很美妙—无论是布局、色彩，还是质感。

examples.english: The young Edvard Munch conceived of a radically new approach to his art.
examples.chinese: 年轻的爱德华·蒙克为他的艺术创出一种全新的表达方式。

examples.english: Banks seem to spend a lot of time dreaming up ways to get more money from their customers.
examples.chinese: 银行似乎花了许多时间来想办法从客户那里赚取更多的钱。

examples.english: The machine looked like it had been dreamed up by a surrealist painter.
examples.chinese: 这台机器看上去好像是某个超现实主义画家想出来的。

examples.english: ‘It's too complicated for me,’ Polly whispered; ‘how do they dream these things up?’
examples.chinese: “对我来说这太复杂了。”波莉低声说，“他们是怎么想出这些玩艺的？”

examples.english: The term ‘black hole’ was coined in 1969 by the American scientist John Wheeler.
examples.chinese: “黑洞”这一术语是由美国科学家约翰：惠勒在1969年创造的。

examples.english: A Polish refugee coined the term ‘genocide’ to describe attempts to kill an entire group of people.
examples.chinese: 一名波兰难民首创了“种族灭绝”一词来描述对整个种族进行屠杀的企图。

examples.english: The word ‘yuppie’ is a coinage of the 1960s which found a new fame in the 1980s.
examples.chinese: “雅皮士”一词是在20世纪60年代创造出来的，到20世纪80年代该词又重新流行起来。

centers.english: someone who invents something

examples.english: Franklin was a scientist, an inventor, and a statesman.
examples.chinese: 富兰克林是科学家、发明家和政治家。

examples.english: Marconi was the inventor of radio.
examples.chinese: 马可尼是无线电的发明者。

examples.english: The patent lists six inventors who worked on the system.
examples.chinese: 专利证书上列出了六位参与设计这一系统的发明人。

examples.english: Walt Disney, the creator of Mickey Mouse
examples.chinese: 沃尔特·迪斯尼，米老鼠的创造者

examples.english: Diaghilev is considered by many to be the creator of the first modern dance company.
examples.chinese: 许多人认为佳吉列夫是第一家现代舞蹈团的创始人。

examples.english: Stokely Carmichael was probably the originator of the term ‘black power.’
examples.chinese: 斯托克利·卡迈克尔可能是“黑人权力”一词的发明人。

examples.english: Alberti was the originator of the violin's design even though Stradivari made it famous.
examples.chinese: 阿马蒂是小提琴的设计人，但斯特拉迪瓦里是使这一设计出名的制琴师。

examples.english: Sigmund Freud, the father of psychoanalysis, was born in 1856.
examples.chinese: 心理分析之父西格蒙德·弗洛伊德生于1856年。

examples.english: Lowe was the real father of modern computing and a very important figure in IBM's ranks.
examples.chinese: 洛是真正的现代电脑之父，也是国际商业机器公司中非常重要的人物。

centers.english: something that someone has invented

examples.english: The Hydro-Ram is an invention which makes it easier for firemen to get people out of crashed cars.
examples.chinese: 水压撞锤是一项发明，使得消防员把人从撞毁的车辆中救出来的工作变得容易多了。

examples.english: The wedge is an important early mechanical invention.
examples.chinese: 楔子是一项重要的早期机械发明。

examples.english: More than any other single invention, writing has transformed human consciousness.
examples.chinese: 文字比其他任何一项发明都更显著地改变了人类的意识。

examples.english: Agatha Christie's greatest fictional creation was the Belgian detective, Hercule Poirot.
examples.chinese: 阿加莎·克里斯蒂在小说方面的最大创造就是比利时侦探赫尔克里·波洛。

examples.english: Chef Michael Almay's creations will make you want to come back again and again.
examples.chinese: 厨师迈克尔·奥梅创作的菜肴会让你一次又一次地做他们的回头客。

examples.english: In those days, the automobile was a recent innovation.
examples.chinese: 那时，汽车还是刚出现不久的新事物。

examples.english: Electric lighting was still considered a daring innovation when it was installed in my grandfather's house.
examples.chinese: 我祖父的房子里装电灯时，电灯尚被视为一项大胆的革新。

examples.english: Innovations in information technology have completely transformed the way students work.
examples.chinese: 信息技术的革新已彻底改变了学生的学习方式。

examples.english: The new computer system is the brainchild of our systems manager.
examples.chinese: 这种新电脑是我们的系统主管的新创造。

examples.english: A new game, the brainchild of Andrew Wilson, was launched in 1999.
examples.chinese: 1999年推出了一种新游戏，那是安德鲁·威尔逊的发明。

centers.english: the design of something

examples.english: Conran's furniture was based on simple, modern designs.
examples.chinese: 康兰的家具以简洁、现代的设计风格为特点。

examples.english: The success of the product was largely due to good design.
examples.chinese: 这一产品的成功主要归功于出色的设计。

examples.english: The basic design of the vehicle has been improved.
examples.chinese: 这种车辆的基本设计已改良了。

examples.english: The new hockey rink is similar in design to the one in San José.
examples.chinese: 这座新建的冰球场在设计上与圣何塞的那座很相似。

centers.english: to plan how something new will look or work
centers.chinese: 对某种新东西的外观或功能进行设计

examples.english: Sally designs and makes all her own clothes.
examples.chinese: 萨莉的衣服都是她自己设计制作的。

examples.english: The car was designed and built in Korea.
examples.chinese: 这种汽车是韩国设计制造的。

examples.english: The offices weren't very well designed - the rooms are too small and it's much too hot in summer.
examples.chinese: 办公室设计得不好—房间太小，夏天时太热。

examples.english: Airbags are currently designed to protect average-sized adult males.
examples.chinese: 安全气袋目前是为保护普通身材的成年男子而设计的。

examples.english: It took them years to plan and build the plaza downtown.
examples.chinese: 他们花了多年时间在市中心规划并建造这座广场。

examples.english: The town was originally planned in the 1950s, when there were fewer cars.
examples.chinese: 这镇最初于20世纪50年代规划，那时汽车没现在多。

examples.english: We planned the building very carefully with special facilities for the disabled.
examples.chinese: 我们精心设计这幢建筑，并为残疾人士添置特殊的设施。

centers.english: someone whose job is designing things
centers.chinese: 以设计东西为工作的人

examples.english: Designers at Ford say the car's soft shape is supposed to be attractive to women.
examples.chinese: 福特汽车公司的设计人员说这种车的柔和外型应当对女性很有吸引力。

examples.english: The show features clothes by famous fashion designers like Jean-Paul Gaultier.
examples.chinese: 这次表演展示了一些著名时装设计师如让·保罗·高提耶等设计的服装。

examples.english: Anyone with experience as a Web page designer can easily get a job.
examples.chinese: 任何具有网页设计师工作经验的人都很容易找到工作。

examples.english: The Imperial Hotel in Tokyo was designed by the famous architect Frank Lloyd Wright.
examples.chinese: 东京的帝国大饭店是由著名建筑师弗兰克·劳埃德·赖特设计的。

examples.english: We're working with a team of architects on the plans for the new building.
examples.chinese: 我们在和一批建筑师一起制定建造新大楼的计划。

examples.english: City planners have been working for years on a new design for the plaza.
examples.chinese: 城市规划者已经为这座广场的新设计工作了好几年。

examples.english: Planners expect the new segment of the subway to carry as many as 3,000 people per day.
examples.chinese: 规划者希望地铁的新建路段每天可以运载3，000名乘客。

centers.english: style/elegance

examples.english: What she lacked in looks she made up for with her sensational style.
examples.chinese: 她动人的风度弥补了她外貌上的不足。

examples.english: It does not really have the style and elegance of other luxury hotels.
examples.chinese: 那里并没有其他豪华酒店所拥有的格调和高雅的品味。

examples.english: If you want a cellphone with style, this is the one for you.
examples.chinese: 如果你想要一个别具一格的手机，这一款就适合你了。

examples.english: The Thompsons always entertain in style.
examples.chinese: 汤普森一家招待客人总是很体面。

examples.english: Whitaker went out in style, beating Pernell comfortably.
examples.chinese: 惠特克最后挥出漂亮的一拳，轻松地击败珀内尔。

examples.english: Marlene Dietrich was once the symbol of glamour and elegance.
examples.chinese: 马琳·迪特里希曾经是魅力和优雅的象征。

examples.english: buildings that reflect the elegance of a bygone era
examples.chinese: 反映了一个过去时代的典雅风格的建筑

examples.english: The capital city was once known as the centre of European culture and sophistication.
examples.chinese: 这个首都城市曾经被认为是欧洲的文化和时尚之都。

examples.english: She was acutely aware of her own lack of sophistication.
examples.chinese: 她十分清楚自己缺少了一种高贵的气质。

examples.english: As a player he had a lot of flair, but it didn't help him win.
examples.chinese: 他是一名很有天赋的球员，但是这并没有帮助他取胜。

examples.english: a combination of British practicality and French flair
examples.chinese: 英国的实用、法国的品味兼容并蓄

examples.english: The room's interior was designed with taste and flair.
examples.chinese: 这房间的室内设计很有品味和创意。

examples.english: She wore her clothes with typical Italian panache.
examples.chinese: 她穿衣服有典型的意大利人的气度。

examples.english: The performance didn't have the panache you expect from a chart-topping rock band.
examples.chinese: 这次演出没有表现出一个高居榜首的摇滚乐队应有的神气。

centers.english: having a lot of style or elegance

examples.english: The room was full of stylish furniture and expensive paintings.
examples.chinese: 房间里摆满了别具风格的家具和价格昂贵的画作。

examples.english: She was a stylish woman, always dressed to suit the occasion.
examples.chinese: 她是个很时髦的女人，总是穿得很得体合时。

examples.english: The apartments are stylishly decorated and furnished, and all have sea views.
examples.chinese: 那些公寓的装修和家具布置都很有格调，每一套都能看到海景。

examples.english: The house was elegant and well kept.
examples.chinese: 这房子很雅致，收拾得也干净。

examples.english: Vienna is a city of grand public buildings and elegant private ones.
examples.chinese: 维也纳这个城市里到处是雄伟的公共建筑和典雅的私家宅院。

examples.english: The elegant figure of Mr Reed appeared in the doorway.
examples.chinese: 里德先生那优雅的身影出现在门口。

examples.english: You can tell she used to be a dancer, she moves so elegantly.
examples.chinese: 你可以看出她以前当过舞蹈演员，她走路姿势非常优美。

examples.english: She was glamorous and sophisticated, but seemed a little lonely.
examples.chinese: 她光彩照人，优雅成熟，但是看上去有点孤独。

examples.english: Nothing beats black for the classic sophisticated look.
examples.chinese: 黑色最经典、最高贵，哪种颜色都比不上。

examples.english: The suave, sophisticated 60-year-old singer is still performing and drawing crowds.
examples.chinese: 这位花甲之年的歌手温文尔雅，老成世故，依然活跃在舞台上，吸引着观众。

examples.english: Their wedding was a very classy affair.
examples.chinese: 他们的婚礼很有排场。

examples.english: a classy restaurant
examples.chinese: 一家高级餐馆

examples.english: She's smart, witty, and classy.
examples.chinese: 她机敏、风趣、高雅。

centers.english: to copy something

examples.english: Would you go down to the print room and copy these documents for me?
examples.chinese: 你能否到楼下打印室替我把这些文件复印一下？

examples.english: They were arrested for illegally copying video recordings.
examples.chinese: 他们因非法复制录像带遭逮捕。

examples.english: Each artist was asked to copy the scene exactly as he or she saw it.
examples.chinese: 每一位画家都被要求将自己所见的场面确切地描绘下来。

examples.english: The drawings had been copied from photographs.
examples.chinese: 这些画是从照片临摹下来的。

examples.english: Copy all the files onto disk.
examples.chinese: 将所有文件复制到磁盘中。

examples.english: Can you make some extra copies for the staff?
examples.chinese: 你能多复印几份给员工吗?

examples.english: John said he'd make a copy of the will and send it over to the house.
examples.chinese: 约翰说他要将那份遗嘱复印一份寄给议院。

examples.english: The program does not automatically make backup copies of your files.
examples.chinese: 这种程序不会自动将文件复制备份。

examples.english: Photocopy the application before sending it.
examples.chinese: 将申请书寄出之前先复印一份。

examples.english: This form needs to be copied and sent to Paul with the letter.
examples.chinese: 这份表格需要复印，连那封信一起寄给保罗。

examples.english: We'll need to ask the New Yorker for permission to reproduce the cartoon.
examples.chinese: 我们得征求《纽约客》同意转载这幅漫画。

examples.english: Letters and rare maps are handsomely reproduced in the book.
examples.chinese: 那本书中的信件和珍贵地图复制得很精美。

examples.english: The process allowed Scottish scientists to clone the sheep named Dolly.
examples.chinese: 这方法使苏格兰科学家能克隆出那头名叫多利的羊。

examples.english: It is only a matter of time before we are able to clone human beings.
examples.chinese: 克隆人类只是时间上的事。

examples.english: Marino obtained the drugs by forging his doctor's signature on a prescription.
examples.chinese: 马里诺在处方上伪造医生签名获得药品。

examples.english: He entered the country using a forged passport.
examples.chinese: 他用伪造的护照进入该国。

examples.english: Spearman is now serving a three-year prison sentence for forgery.
examples.chinese: 斯皮尔曼因为伪造罪，正在服三年徒刑。

examples.english: Mason is a convicted forger from Rialto.
examples.chinese: 梅森是里阿尔托人，因伪造被判有罪。

examples.english: Don't forget to back up all the new files you create.
examples.chinese: 别忘记给新建文档作备份。

examples.english: I didn't back the document up and lost the whole lot.
examples.chinese: 我没给文件备份，结果全都弄丢了。

centers.english: to write down exactly what someone has said or written
centers.chinese: 一字不差地记下某人的话或写的东西

examples.english: Can I copy your notes?
examples.chinese: 我能抄你的笔记吗?

examples.english: She copied the poem from an old book of Grandma's in the attic.
examples.chinese: 她从阁楼上祖母的一本旧书中抄录下这首诗。

examples.english: I need to copy these phone numbers into my address book.
examples.chinese: 我得将这些电话号码抄在通讯录中。

examples.english: At school we often had to copy out whole chapters from the Bible.
examples.chinese: 学生时代，我们常常得整章整章地抄写《圣经》。

examples.english: As a kid, I used to copy song lyrics out and keep them in notebooks.
examples.chinese: 小时候我常把歌词抄在笔记本上。

examples.english: The witness had copied down the license plate number of the taxi the suspect used to get away.
examples.chinese: 证人记下了嫌犯逃跑时乘坐的出租车的车牌号。

examples.english: Roger copied the train times down on the back of an envelope.
examples.chinese: 罗杰在信封的背面抄下了列车时刻表。

examples.english: I record my business letters, and my secretary transcribes them.
examples.chinese: 我将商业信函口述录音，由秘书转成文字。

examples.english: The conversation had been transcribed into phonetic script.
examples.chinese: 谈话记录被转成了音标。

centers.english: to copy someone else's work or ideas
centers.chinese: 抄袭别人的工作或想法

examples.english: Any student caught copying will fail the test.
examples.chinese: 被发现抄袭的学生该门考试将不予及格。

examples.english: The company has been accused of copying software ideas from larger competitors.
examples.chinese: 该公司被指责抄袭大竞争对手的软件设计思路。

examples.english: Most of his answers had been copied straight from the student who sat next to him.
examples.chinese: 他的大部分答案都是直接抄袭旁边学生的。

examples.english: He got kicked out of school because he plagiarized a term paper.
examples.chinese: 他因抄袭学期论文被勒令退学。

examples.english: She claimed that she didn't plagiarize - she just paraphrased.
examples.chinese: 她声称自己没有抄袭，只是改述了一下。

examples.english: Donahue's reputation was damaged when he was accused of plagiarism.
examples.chinese: 多纳休被指责剽窃他人文章，名声受到损害。

examples.english: One paragraph of his essay has been lifted from an economics textbook.
examples.chinese: 他文章里有段话是从一本经济学教科书里抄来的。

expressions.text: be lifted straight from/out of something

examples.english: The plot of the play had been lifted straight out of an old episode of ‘The Honeymooners’.
examples.chinese: 这部戏的情节是从旧连续剧《蜜月佳偶》的一集中直接抄来的。

examples.english: Professional designers and architects steal ideas from each other all the time.
examples.chinese: 专业设计师和建筑师总是相互抄袭设计思路。

examples.english: She claims that the director stole ideas from her historical novel and used them in the movie.
examples.chinese: 她声称那位导演抄袭她历史小说的构思并用于影片中。

examples.english: a derivative artistic style
examples.chinese: 一种模仿他人的艺术风格

examples.english: This relatively new style of music is derivative of ragtime and blues.
examples.chinese: 这种相对新兴的音乐风格是拉格泰姆和布鲁斯的衍生物。

centers.english: something that has been copied from something else

examples.english: I don't have my original birth certificate. Will you accept a copy?
examples.chinese: 我没有出生证的原件，复印件行吗？

examples.english: Connie left copies of the document on everybody's desk.
examples.chinese: 康妮把文件副本放在大家的桌子上。

examples.english: a 19th century copy of the popular Rembrandt painting
examples.chinese: 伦勃朗名画的19世纪复制品

examples.english: Please send a photocopy of your passport.
examples.chinese: 请寄上一份护照的复印件。

examples.english: Can you make seven copies of this, please?
examples.chinese: 请复印七份，好吗？

examples.english: I only have one house key, but I'll have a duplicate made for when you visit.
examples.chinese: 我只有一把家里的钥匙，但你来的时候给你一把复制的。

examples.english: It's a good idea to keep duplicate files on floppy disk.
examples.chinese: 将文件副本保存在软盘上是个好主意。

examples.english: White's team made a model of the new ballpark to show the public.
examples.chinese: 怀特的小组制作了新棒球场的模型向公众展示。

examples.english: There was a shelf in his bedroom full of model planes.
examples.chinese: 他卧室的一个架子上全是模型飞机。

examples.english: The 1957 photo shows him holding a scale model of an ocean liner he built entirely by hand.
examples.chinese: 在这张摄于1957年的照片上，他拿着一艘自己完全用手工制作的按比例缩小的远洋邮轮模型。

examples.english: a replica fire truck from the 1920s
examples.chinese: 一辆20世纪20年代消防车的复制品

examples.english: A replica of the space shuttle is parked at the center's entrance.
examples.chinese: 一架航天飞机的复制品停在该中心的入口处。

examples.english: The building is an exact replica of the original Globe theatre.
examples.chinese: 这建筑是完全按照原环球剧院建造的。

examples.english: The store sells a range of reproduction furniture in Colonial style.
examples.chinese: 该商店出售殖民地时期式样家具的一系列仿制品。

examples.english: a reproduction of a beautiful Ming vase
examples.chinese: 一件精美的明代花瓶的仿制品

examples.english: an imitation sheepskin seat cover
examples.chinese: 一件仿羊皮座椅套

examples.english: The original woodframe house had been covered with imitation brick siding.
examples.chinese: 原先的木结构房屋已覆上了仿制的砖墙板。

examples.english: The necklace was a cheap imitation, but she was obviously very proud of it.
examples.chinese: 那条项链是廉价的仿制品，但她显然非常以此为傲。

examples.english: A facsimile of the 1896 book was published in February.
examples.chinese: 这本1896年版图书的摹本于2月出版。

examples.english: Make sure to make backup copies of all your data.
examples.chinese: 确保所有数据都做了备份。

examples.english: Don't store the backups near the computer, where someone could easily steal them both.
examples.chinese: 备份文件不要放在电脑附近，可能两样都会被人轻易偷走。

examples.english: These plants are all clones of the same original plant.
examples.chinese: 这些植物都是同一株植物的克隆体。

centers.english: a copy of something that is intended to deceive people
centers.chinese: 目的在于骗人的复制品

examples.english: Three paintings now thought to be forgeries are included in the show
examples.chinese: 三幅现在被认为是赝品的画也包括在展览中。

examples.english: Further investigation showed that the so-called ‘Hitler Diaries’ were a forgery.
examples.chinese: 进一步的调查显示，所谓的《希特勒日记》是伪造品。

examples.english: They were selling fake Rolex watches on the street.
examples.chinese: 他们在大街上兜售假劳力士手表。

examples.english: His I.D. is obviously fake.
examples.chinese: 他的身份证明显然是假的。

examples.english: Three months after I bought it, a friend who works at the museum told me it was probably a fake.
examples.chinese: 我买下那件东西三个月后，一个在博物馆工作的朋友告诉我这可能是假货。

examples.english: Police have warned stores to look out for counterfeit $50 bills.
examples.chinese: 警方提醒商店小心面值50美元的假钞票。

examples.english: The new twenty-dollar bills contain features designed to prevent counterfeiting.
examples.chinese: 新版的20美元纸币含有防止伪造的特征。

examples.english: Counterfeiters are now able to produce almost perfect notes.
examples.chinese: 造假币者现在能制造出几乎完美的钞票。

examples.english: The government has closed a factory that was producing pirate CDs.
examples.chinese: 政府已关闭一家生产盗版激光唱片的工厂。

examples.english: It's pretty easy to get pirated copies of the software.
examples.chinese: 购买盗版软件相当容易。

centers.english: to do the same as someone else does

examples.english: Children learn swearing from copying their parents and siblings.
examples.chinese: 小孩子模仿父母和兄弟姐妹学会粗话。

examples.english: Martin often claimed he copied Bing Crosby's singing style, but there was much more to his music than that.
examples.chinese: 马丁常称自己模仿宾·克罗斯比的歌唱风格，其实他的音乐内涵丰富得多。

examples.english: ‘Don't you talk to me like that!’ she said imitating her mother's high-pitched voice.
examples.chinese: “别对我那样说话！”她模仿母亲的嗓音尖声说道。

examples.english: A lot of writers have tried to imitate Lawrence's style.
examples.chinese: 许多作家试图模仿劳伦斯的风格。

examples.english: Harmon is charged with impersonating a police officer.
examples.chinese: 哈曼被控假冒警察。

examples.english: She makes a living out of impersonating Tina Turner in shows and films.
examples.chinese: 她依靠在演出和影片中假扮蒂娜·特纳谋生。

examples.english: Katy does a great impersonation of Grandpa when he's annoyed.
examples.chinese: 凯蒂模仿爷爷生气的样子惟妙惟肖。

examples.english: His music attempts to ape classical styles, but the results are not very original.
examples.chinese: 他的音乐想模仿古典风格，但结果却不具原创性。

examples.english: California wine makers are trying to do new things with Sauvignon blanc instead of just aping French styles.
examples.chinese: 加利福尼亚州的酿酒商正试图用苏特恩葡萄酿出新品，而不只是一味模仿法国风味。

examples.english: Just watch and do what I do. It's pretty easy.
examples.chinese: 就看着照我的样子做，很容易的。

examples.english: Brian persuaded his brothers to follow his example and join the navy.
examples.chinese: 布赖恩说服他的兄弟像他一样去参加海军。

examples.english: Following the example of Nixon, a politician he greatly admired, he decided to try to make himself more appealing to voters.
examples.chinese: 他以自己十分崇拜的政治家尼克松为榜样，决定让自己对选民更具吸引力。

examples.english: My father was always disappointed that Joey didn't follow in his footsteps and take over the farm.
examples.chinese: 我父亲一直感到失望，因为乔伊没有继承他的事业接管农场。

examples.english: We will watch with interest what happens to these two women officers and to the young women who wish to follow in their footsteps.
examples.chinese: 我们将饶有兴趣地观察两位女军官以及想步她们后尘的年轻女子会怎样。

examples.english: We're hoping that Europe will follow the US's lead and ban all use of these poisonous gases.
examples.chinese: 我们希望欧洲会仿效美国，全面禁止使用这些毒气。

examples.english: Because the Black community has long experience with civil rights issues, other minority groups may follow its lead.
examples.chinese: 黑人群体对民权问题经验丰富，其他少数民族团体可能会仿效。

examples.english: Other oil companies are expected to follow suit and raise prices before the end of the month.
examples.chinese: 其他石油公司大概会跟随在月底之前提价。

centers.english: to copy someone you admire

examples.english: There is much in Cheng's work that we can admire and emulate.
examples.chinese: 程的作品中有许多我们能够欣赏和效仿的方面。

examples.english: Developing countries often try to emulate experiences of developed countries, but this is not always a good idea.
examples.chinese: 发展中国家常常设法效仿发达国家的发展之路，但这并不总是个好主意。

examples.english: The junior Wimbledon champion said that she tried to model herself on Martina Navratilova.
examples.chinese: 温布尔登网球赛少年赛冠军称她以马丁娜·纳夫拉蒂洛娃为榜样。

examples.english: Pender says his show models itself on the old-style talk shows.
examples.chinese: 彭德说他的节目模仿旧式的脱口秀。

centers.english: to do the same things as other people in a group

expressions.text: follow the crowd/go (along) with the crowd

examples.english: That experience taught me never to follow the crowd blindly.
examples.chinese: 那次经历教会我不要盲目随大流。

examples.english: It's hard, as an investor, to resist the urge to go along with the crowd, but that isn't where the money is.
examples.chinese: 作为一名投资者，很难抵抗随大流的冲动，但随大流是赚不到钱的。

examples.english: When they realized there was money to be made from games such as snooker, sportswear advertisers soon jumped on the bandwagon.
examples.chinese: 意识到能从斯诺克等比赛中获利，运动服广告商很快一窝蜂随起大流来。

examples.english: Opposition leaders have accused the government of jumping on the asylum seeker bandwagon.
examples.chinese: 反对党领导人指责政府随大流支持寻求政治避难者。

centers.english: someone who other people copy

examples.english: As the eldest in the family, she was expected to be an example to her younger brothers and sisters.
examples.chinese: 作为家里的老大，她应该为弟弟妹妹作个榜样。

examples.english: The school is a shining example of what parent-teacher cooperation can achieve.
examples.chinese: 该校是父母和老师合作成果的典范。

examples.english: If Saunders is sincere about reform, he should set an example by taking a pay cut.
examples.chinese: 如果桑德斯对于改革是认真的话，他应当树立榜样减薪。

examples.english: Senior officers should be setting a good example for the men.
examples.chinese: 高级军官要为士兵树立好榜样。

examples.english: He's a wonderfully kind man and an excellent role model for the children.
examples.chinese: 他是个极其和善的人，是孩子们的好榜样。

examples.english: There aren't enough positive role models for young people today, especially for minority groups.
examples.chinese: 对如今的年轻人，尤其是少数民族群体来说，缺乏正面榜样。

centers.english: to copy someone or something to make people laugh
centers.chinese: 模仿某人或某物以使人发笑

examples.english: She's really good at imitating our teacher's Scottish accent.
examples.chinese: 她模仿我们老师的苏格兰口音惟妙惟肖。

examples.english: He made her laugh hysterically during their walks, with his impression of Gene Kelly doing ‘Singin' in the Rain.’
examples.chinese: 散步时，他模仿吉恩·凯利在《雨中曲》里的动作令她狂笑不止。

examples.english: ‘Hmm,’ Phil said. ‘Hmm,’ Graham mimicked.
examples.chinese: “唔，”菲尔说。“唔，”格雷厄姆学他的样子。

examples.english: Yolanda mimicked their father opening the letter.
examples.chinese: 约兰达学父亲拆信的样子。

expressions.text: a take-off of somebody/something/ a take-off on somebody/something

examples.english: A local television reporter dubbed him StyroCop - a take-off on the movie ‘RoboCop’ .
examples.chinese: 一位地方电视台记者戏称他为聚苯乙烯战警，这是对影片《铁甲威龙》的滑稽模仿。

examples.english: Karen can do a hilarious take-off of Bette Davis.
examples.chinese: 卡伦能滑稽模仿贝特·戴维斯。

centers.english: not made of natural materials or substances
centers.chinese: 不是由天然材料或天然物质做成的

examples.english: The juice contains no artificial coloring or flavors.
examples.chinese: 这种果汁不含人工色素或香精。

examples.english: I usually use artificial sweetener in my coffee instead of sugar.
examples.chinese: 我一般都在咖啡里放人造甜味剂而不放糖。

examples.english: The plants can grow just as well in artificial light.
examples.chinese: 这种植物在人工光照条件下也能生长。

examples.english: The rug is made from a mixture of wool and synthetic fibres.
examples.chinese: 这地毯是用羊毛和合成纤维的混纺织物制成的。

examples.english: Many old herbal remedies have disappeared and been replaced by synthetic drugs.
examples.chinese: 许多过去的草药都已不再使用，被合成药物所取代。

examples.english: synthetic rubber
examples.chinese: 合成橡胶

examples.english: The amusement park is built around a man-made lake.
examples.chinese: 游乐园环绕一个人工湖而建。

examples.english: The coat is 80% wool and 20% man-made fibers.
examples.chinese: 这件外套有80%是羊毛，20%是人造纤维。

examples.english: Current weather problems may actually be man-made, a direct result of environmental damage.
examples.chinese: 目前的天气问题实际上可能是人为造成的，是环境受到破坏的直接后果。

examples.english: Processed foods may lack the vitamins and minerals found in fresh produce.
examples.chinese: 加工过的食品可能会缺少新鲜农产品中所含的维生素和矿物质。

examples.english: processed cheese
examples.chinese: 加工过的干酪

examples.english: Fully processed canned hams will not spoil and can be kept on the shelf.
examples.chinese: 经完全加工的罐头火腿不会坏，可以保存在货架上。

centers.english: made to look real or natural
centers.chinese: 做成看上去像真的或天然的

examples.english: On the table was a vase filled with artificial flowers.
examples.chinese: 桌子上有一只插着假花的花瓶。

examples.english: We have one of those electric heaters with artificial logs.
examples.chinese: 我们也有个那种用假木头作装饰的电暖气。

examples.english: It took Frank a while to learn to walk with the artificial leg.
examples.chinese: 弗兰克花了一段时间才学会用义肢走路。

examples.english: Nearly a third of adults in the UK have false teeth.
examples.chinese: 在英国将近有三分之一的成年人都装了假牙。

examples.english: She was heavily made up, with false eyelashes and bright red lipstick.
examples.chinese: 她化了很浓的妆，戴着假睫毛，涂了大红唇膏。

examples.english: Her coat had a fake fur collar and cuffs.
examples.chinese: 她的大衣领子和袖口是假毛皮。

examples.english: You can buy fake Gucci bags all over the city.
examples.chinese: 城里到处都能买到假的古奇牌手袋。

examples.english: Ted was wearing an imitation leather jacket.
examples.chinese: 特德穿着一件仿皮的夹克。

examples.english: The dark blue sweater had imitation pearls sewn across the front.
examples.chinese: 这件深蓝色的毛衣，前面缝着一些人造珍珠。

examples.english: It was one of those horrible simulated-leather ‘executive’ chairs.
examples.chinese: 那是一张很吓人的仿真皮“老板”椅。

examples.english: Models of the bridge have been tested under simulated earthquake conditions.
examples.chinese: 那座桥的模型被放在模拟的地震环境下进行测试。

centers.english: to become different

examples.english: She's changed a lot since she went to college.
examples.chinese: 她自从上大学以来变了许多。

examples.english: It's amazing how much things have changed since we were young.
examples.chinese: 和我们小时候相比变化太大了，真令人惊异。

examples.english: Her expression did not change, and she answered me calmly.
examples.chinese: 她面不改色，冷静地回答了我的问题。

examples.english: ‘The telecommunications industry is changing at lightning speed,’ said Richard Miller, the company's chief financial officer.
examples.chinese: “电信业正在飞速改变。”公司首席财务官理查德·米勒说道。

examples.english: The caterpillar eventually changes into a beautiful butterfly.
examples.chinese: 毛毛虫最终变成了美丽的蝴蝶。

examples.english: In the 18th century, Britain changed from a mainly agricultural society to an industrial one.
examples.chinese: 18世纪时，英国从一个以农业为主的社会转变成了工业社会。

examples.english: The lights changed to green, and the motorbike sped off.
examples.chinese: 交通信号灯变为绿色，那辆摩托车疾驰而去。

examples.english: It was the end of September, and the leaves on the trees were starting to change color.
examples.chinese: 9月底了，树上的叶子开始变色。

examples.english: The town I grew up in has changed out of all recognition.
examples.chinese: 我成长生活的小镇已经彻底变了样。

examples.english: I find it hard to keep up with changing fashions.
examples.chinese: 我觉得很难跟上时尚变化的潮流。

examples.english: His book is concerned with the changing role of fathers.
examples.chinese: 他的书写的是父亲角色的变化。

examples.english: Ansel Adams loved wide landscapes and changing light.
examples.chinese: 安塞尔亚当斯喜欢视野开阔的自然风光和变幻的光线。

examples.english: Businesses need to be flexible enough to adapt to changing conditions in a rapidly changing world.
examples.chinese: 企业得随机应变，以适应飞速变幻的世界中不断改变的情况。

examples.english: Job insecurity is widespread in the fast-changing American workplace.
examples.chinese: 工作缺乏保障普遍存在于美国飞速变化中的各行各业。

examples.english: His mood suddenly altered and he seemed a little annoyed.
examples.chinese: 他的情绪突然变了，似乎有点不高兴。

examples.english: His defence lawyer said that Wilson's lifestyle had altered dramatically since the offences three years ago.
examples.chinese: 他的辩护律师称，自从三年前犯罪以来，威尔逊的生活方式发生了戏剧性变化。

examples.english: Her face hadn't altered much over the years.
examples.chinese: 几年过去了，她的面容没有多大改变。

examples.english: In fairy tales when the princess kisses a frog, it turns into a handsome prince.
examples.chinese: 童话故事里，公主吻了青蛙后，青蛙就变成了英俊的王子。

examples.english: A trip to the beach turned into a nightmare for a local family yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天，当地一家人的海滩之游变成了一场噩梦。

examples.english: The ink-black nights were turning cold, and the stars were frosty and fewer.
examples.chinese: 漆黑的夜一下子冷起来，星星冷冰冰的，也越来越少了。

examples.english: The protest turned violent when groups of demonstrators stormed the parliament building.
examples.chinese: 示威人群冲进了议会大楼，抗议活动突然变得激烈起来。

examples.english: In less than five years, he went from being a communist to being a member of the military government.
examples.chinese: 不到五年时间，他从一名共产主义者转变成了军政府的一员。

examples.english: His face went from pink to bright red.
examples.chinese: 他的脸由粉红变得通红。

examples.english: The Mexican economy went from boom to bust very quickly, with disastrous results for the people.
examples.chinese: 墨西哥经济很快由繁荣转向崩溃，给民众带来灾难性后果。

examples.english: After Kathy lost her job, things went from bad to worse, and eventually she and Ed split up.
examples.chinese: 凯茜失业后情况变得更糟，最终她和埃德分手了。

centers.english: to change all the time or often

examples.english: His ideas about what he wants keep changing.
examples.chinese: 他对于自己想要什么一直在变。

examples.english: I'll check the regulations for you - they keep changing.
examples.chinese: 我会替你核实一下这些规定，它们一直在变。

examples.english: The police strongly suspected that she had been involved - her story kept changing and was filled with inconsistencies.
examples.chinese: 警方非常怀疑她也有份—她的说法一直在变，而且充满矛盾。

examples.english: Ticket prices to New York vary, depending on the time of year.
examples.chinese: 一年中，时间不同，去纽约的票价也不一样。

examples.english: Driving regulations vary from state to state.
examples.chinese: 各州的驾驶条例都不同。

examples.english: Her income varies considerably from one month to the next.
examples.chinese: 她的收入每个月都起落很大。

examples.english: Vegetables vary in quality according to the season.
examples.chinese: 季节不同，蔬菜的质量也不一样。

examples.english: ‘How much milk do you use a day?’ ‘Oh, it varies.’
examples.chinese: “你一天要喝多少牛奶？”“哦，每天都不一样。”

expressions.text: vary from day to day/week to week etc

examples.english: It hadn't been established where we'd all sleep - the location seemed to vary from night to night.
examples.chinese: 我们睡的地方没有确定—一地点似乎每晚都在变。

examples.english: The car industry's annual production fluctuates between 5.1 million and 9.2 million vehicles.
examples.chinese: 汽车工业的年产量在510万辆至920万辆之间波动。

examples.english: Cholesterol levels in the blood fluctuate in the course of a day.
examples.chinese: 一天内血液中的胆固醇含量会上下波动。

examples.english: Share prices on the New York Stock Exchange often fluctuate wildly.
examples.chinese: 纽约证交所里的股价经常暴涨暴跌。

examples.english: Your savings will earn fluctuating rates of interest.
examples.chinese: 你的存款会按浮动利率计息。

examples.english: Is there any way of avoiding fluctuations in coffee and tea prices?
examples.chinese: 有没有办法可以避免咖啡和茶叶价格的波动？

expressions.text: be in flux/be in a state of flux

examples.english: The computer industry is in constant flux, responding all the time to changes in technology.
examples.chinese: 随着技术的不断变化，电脑产业也一直处于不断的变化之中。

examples.english: Our education programme is in a state of flux, as new approaches are being developed.
examples.chinese: 随着各种新的教学法的发展，我们的教学计划也在不断地变化。

centers.english: often changing or likely to change

examples.english: You love him now, but at your age feelings are changeable.
examples.chinese: 你现在爱他，可在你这个年纪感情是多变的。

examples.english: I'm a changeable sort of person.
examples.chinese: 我是性情多变的人。

examples.english: changeable weather
examples.chinese: 变化无常的天气

examples.english: Her behaviour was becoming more and more erratic.
examples.chinese: 她的行为变得越来越反复无常。！

examples.english: Heating was difficult owing to erratic supplies of gas, electricity and water.
examples.chinese: 取暖困难是由于煤气、电力和水的供应不正常造成的。

examples.english: The company's erratic performance is a cause for some concern.
examples.chinese: 公司业绩不稳定引起了一些人的关注。

examples.english: My car has been performing very erratically - some days it's fine and other days it won't even start.
examples.chinese: 我这辆车的性能令人难以捉摸，有时很好，而有时就是发动不起来。

examples.english: The political situation in the Balkans is still extremely volatile.
examples.chinese: 巴尔干各国的政治局势仍旧极其动荡。

examples.english: She formed enduring friendships with women and more intense, volatile ones with men.
examples.chinese: 她与女性的友谊稳定持久，而与男性则更为激烈、多变。

examples.english: Regimes governed by violence are always unstable.
examples.chinese: 靠暴力统治的政权总是不稳固的。

examples.english: Was it safe to trust someone who was so emotionally unstable?
examples.chinese: 相信一个感情这么多变的人可靠吗？

examples.english: The area is going through a period of instability and social crisis.
examples.chinese: 该地区现在动荡不安，面临着社会危机。

examples.english: Government policies have resulted in higher inflation and financial instability.
examples.chinese: 政府制定的政策导致了通货膨胀的加剧和财政状况的不稳定。

examples.english: Demand for the company's products is variable.
examples.chinese: 市场对该公司产品的需求不稳定。

examples.english: The weather here is likely to be very variable.
examples.chinese: 这里的天气可能很多变。

examples.english: People feel threatened when decision-making is inconsistent and arbitrary.
examples.chinese: 如果决策多变而武断，人们就会感到不安。

examples.english: A succession of injuries produced an inconsistent season for one of our best players.
examples.chinese: 连续受伤使我们的最佳选手之一在整个赛季比赛中的表现时好时坏。

examples.english: The inconsistency of her work makes a really good result unlikely.
examples.chinese: 她工作表现时好时坏，这使她不大可能取得特别好的成绩。

examples.english: It is dangerous to visit there while the political situation is so unsettled.
examples.chinese: 由于政局很不稳定，去那儿很危险。

examples.english: The weather has been very unsettled lately.
examples.chinese: 最近天气很不稳定。

examples.english: Eliot led a strangely unsettled life, drifting from place to place and job to job.
examples.chinese: 埃利奥特到处游荡，无固定职业，过着一种奇怪的不稳定生活。

centers.english: someone who has changed completely

examples.english: My father came back from the war a changed man.
examples.chinese: 我父亲从战场上归来，整个人都变了。

examples.english: She returned from her travel a changed woman.
examples.chinese: 她旅行回来，变得判若两人。

examples.english: Since the birth of his baby, Mark has totally reformed.
examples.chinese: 马克在他孩子出生后就完全改好了。

examples.english: Al Pacino plays a reformed crook who gets pulled back into a life of crime.
examples.chinese: 阿尔·帕西诺饰演一个改过自新的罪犯，后来又走上犯罪道路。

centers.english: to change something or someone

examples.english: They've changed the timetable, and now there's only one bus an hour.
examples.chinese: 他们改变了时间表，现在每小时只有一班公共汽车。

examples.english: Going to college changed him a lot. It made him much more mature.
examples.chinese: 上大学改变了他许多，令他更成熟了。！

examples.english: Having a baby changes your life completely, whatever your age.
examples.chinese: 不管年龄有多大，有了孩子会完全改变你的生活。

examples.english: You can alter the color and size of the image using a remote control.
examples.chinese: 使用遥控器可以改变色彩和图像大小。

examples.english: The border was closed, and they were forced to alter their plans.
examples.chinese: 边境关闭了，他们不得不改变计划。

examples.english: Don't make any major changes yet.
examples.chinese: 不要作大改动。

examples.english: I've analysed the system and made changes where I thought they were needed.
examples.chinese: 我分析了那个系统，在认为有需要的地方作了改动。

examples.english: You'll have to make some changes in your life - stop smoking and eating fatty food, and stop working so hard.
examples.chinese: 你必须在生活中作些改变—戒烟、不吃油腻食物、工作不要太累。

examples.english: The manufacturer has agreed to make one or two changes to the computer's design.
examples.chinese: 制造商同意就电脑的设计作一两处改动。

examples.english: This discovery made them revise their old ideas.
examples.chinese: 这一发现使他们改变了原来的想法。

examples.english: You should review and revise the plan in the light of events as they unfold.
examples.chinese: 随着事情逐渐明确，你应该检讨并修改计划。

examples.english: By the time the President arrived at Keflavik, the revised speech was ready.
examples.chinese: 总统到达凯夫拉维克的时候，修改过的演讲稿已经准备好了。

centers.english: to make something completely different

examples.english: Well, you've certainly transformed this place - it looks great!
examples.chinese: 嗯，你使这地方完全变了样。看上去漂亮极了。

examples.english: In the last 20 years, Korea has been transformed into a major industrial nation.
examples.chinese: 在过去的20年里，韩国已变成了一个工业大国。

examples.english: When she smiled, her face was completely transformed.
examples.chinese: 她笑的时候，脸部完全变了样。

examples.english: We're planning to turn the spare bedroom into a study.
examples.chinese: 我们在计划将闲置的卧室变成书房。

examples.english: The war had turned Cassidy into a violent thug.
examples.chinese: 战争将卡西迪变成了暴徒。

examples.english: Edwards saved the Tivoli, an elegant 1920s art deco hotel, and turned it into a movie theatre.
examples.chinese: 爱德华兹救了蒂沃利—一家以20世纪20年代装饰派艺术风格建成的高雅酒店，并将它改建成影院。

examples.english: Computers have revolutionized the way we work.
examples.chinese: 电脑彻底改变了我们的工作方式。

examples.english: This important discovery has revolutionized our understanding of the universe.
examples.chinese: 这个重大发现使我们对宇宙的认识发生了根本变化。

examples.english: The new technology is revolutionising the way music is played, composed and studied.
examples.chinese: 这项新技术正在改革演奏、制作和研究音乐的方法。

examples.english: The longer the economic decline is allowed to go on the more difficult it will be to reverse it.
examples.chinese: 经济衰退持续的时间越长，恢复就越困难。

examples.english: Cities are expanding and using up more and more of the desert. Our aim is to reverse this trend and to protect our open spaces.
examples.chinese: 城市在扩张，蚕食越来越多的荒原地。我们的目标是改变这一趋势，保护空地。

examples.english: The court of appeal reversed the original verdict and set the prisoner free.
examples.chinese: 上诉法院推翻原判，释放了囚犯。

examples.english: Many of the former administration's policies were reversed by the new president.
examples.chinese: 新上任的总统对上届政府的许多政策作了彻底的改变。

examples.english: The execution ended a 14-year battle to have Bannister's death sentence overturned.
examples.chinese: 班尼斯特被处决了，这结束了为推翻他的死刑判决而进行的长达14年的斗争。

examples.english: Wolf was found guilty of treason, but the conviction was overturned by Germany's highest court in 1995.
examples.chinese: 沃尔夫被判叛国罪，但这一裁决于1995年被德国最高法院推翻了。

centers.english: to change something for a particular use or purpose
centers.chinese: 为某种特定用途或目的而改变某物

examples.english: They have adapted their house so they can look after their disabled son more easily.
examples.chinese: 他们把房子的结构作了一下改动，这样照顾起他们那个有残疾的儿子来能更容易一些。

examples.english: The movie was adapted by Forsyth from his own bestselling novel.
examples.chinese: 这部电影是由福赛思根据他本人的畅销小说改编的。

examples.english: The materials in the book can be adapted for use with older children.
examples.chinese: 这本书的素材可以改编一下，给大一点的孩子看。

examples.english: These recipes can be easily adapted to suit vegetarians.
examples.chinese: 这些食谱可以很方便地改动一下，以满足素食者的需要。

examples.english: We can modify the design to make it suitable for commercial production.
examples.chinese: 我们可以修改设计，使其更适合于商业生产。

examples.english: We all modify our speech when speaking to people in authority.
examples.chinese: 对有权势的人说话时，我们都要改进措辞。

examples.english: The biotech corporations argue that genetically modified crops will put an end to food shortages in the developing world.
examples.chinese: 生物工程公司辩称，转基因作物将会结束发展中国家粮食短缺的状况。

examples.english: We've converted the basement to give the children more room to play.
examples.chinese: 我们改建了地下室，以便给孩子更多游戏空间。

examples.english: A Swiss company has found a way to convert animal waste into fuel.
examples.chinese: 瑞士一家公司已找到一种方法，可以把动物粪便转化为燃料。

examples.english: This computer system converts typed words into speech.
examples.chinese: 这套电脑系统能把输入的单词转换为语音。

examples.english: The nightclub is in a converted church.
examples.chinese: 夜总会位于一座经过改建的教堂内。

examples.english: General Motors will customize Cadillacs for special clients.
examples.chinese: 通用汽车公司将为特殊顾客改装凯迪拉克汽车。

examples.english: The computer programs can be customised for individual users.
examples.chinese: 该电脑程序可以根据个别用户需要而设定。

examples.english: customized software
examples.chinese: 定制软件

centers.english: to make small changes to something in order to improve it
centers.chinese: 对某物作小改动以使其改进

examples.english: Check and adjust your brakes regularly.
examples.chinese: 定期检查并调节刹车。

examples.english: I don't think the color control on this TV is properly adjusted.
examples.chinese: 我认为这台电视机的色彩控制调节得不是很好。

examples.english: The amount of any of these ingredients can be adjusted according to your taste.
examples.chinese: 这些配料可以根据口味随意添加。

examples.english: ‘You don't have to come,’ Lewis said, as he adjusted his tie in a mirror.
examples.chinese: “你不一定要来。”刘易斯一边对着镜子整理领带，一边说道。

examples.english: You can use this tool to make adjustments in all kinds of machines.
examples.chinese: 你可以用这件工具来校准各种机器。

examples.english: Scientists were able to locate the star by making a few minor adjustments to their original calculations.
examples.chinese: 科学家将他们原来的计算稍作调整，便能确定该恒星的方位。

examples.english: Programs written in languages such as BASIC are very easy to edit and amend.
examples.chinese: 用BASIC 语言等编写的电脑程序编辑和修改起来很容易。

examples.english: Congress amended the Social Security Act in 1967 to help the disabled.
examples.chinese: 为了帮助残疾人，国会于1967年修改了《社会保障法》。

examples.english: The law was amended so that profits from drug dealing could be seized by the government.
examples.chinese: 法律作了修改，以使政府能够没收贩毒所得的利润。

examples.english: To amend the Constitution voters must approve the measure in a referendum.
examples.chinese: 为修改宪法，投票人必须在全民公决中同意这一议案。

examples.english: He gave his work to his friend to revise, because he found it hard to see his own mistakes.
examples.chinese: 他把他的作品交给朋友审订，因为他觉得很难发现自己的错误。

examples.english: The publisher will not accept your manuscript until it has been thoroughly revised.
examples.chinese: 在你未将自己的手稿彻底审订之前，出版商是不会接受它的。

examples.english: a revised edition of the novel
examples.chinese: 该小说的修订版

centers.english: to change the way something is done or organized
centers.chinese: 改变某事的完成或组织方式

examples.english: The government is considering changing the local voting system.
examples.chinese: 政府正在考虑变革地方选举制度。

examples.english: Agriculture must be changed to reduce damage to the environment.
examples.chinese: 一定要改革农业，以减少对环境的破坏。

examples.english: During the 1980s, the government reorganized the civil service.
examples.chinese: 20世纪80年代，政府改组了文官制度。

examples.english: The proposals for reorganizing the company have made many people in the workforce feel very insecure.
examples.chinese: 改组公司的建议使许多职工深感不安。

examples.english: Mr Gorbachev's attempt to restructure the Soviet economy met with criticism from traditional communists.
examples.chinese: 他重建经济体系的努力遭到了批评。

examples.english: In the coming years a lot of money will go into restructuring the education system.
examples.chinese: 今后的几年里，将投入很多资金以重建教育体系。

examples.english: They reformed the voting system, and introduced a secret ballot.
examples.chinese: 他们改革了选举制度，引进无记名投票法。

examples.english: We are working to reform the nation's prisons.
examples.chinese: 我们正努力改革国家监狱制度。

centers.english: to change facts or information in a dishonest way
centers.chinese: 以不诚实的手段改变事实或信息

examples.english: The lawyers twisted everything I said to make it look as if I was guilty.
examples.chinese: 律师们故意歪曲我所说的每一句话，让我看上去似乎有罪。

examples.english: Every time I try to talk to him about it, he just twists everything I say.
examples.chinese: 我每次试图跟他谈论这事，他就故意歪曲我的话。

examples.english: Write very clearly so that no one can twist your meaning.
examples.chinese: 要写得非常明白，这样没有人会曲解你的意思了。

examples.english: Your reporter has completely misrepresented my opinions about immigration.
examples.chinese: 你们的记者完全歪曲了我对移民的看法。

examples.english: Many women feel that the history books either ignore or misrepresent them.
examples.chinese: 许多女性觉得历史书不是忽视了她们，就是歪曲了她们。

examples.english: Newspaper readers are usually given a simplified and often distorted version of events.
examples.chinese: 报纸读者通常看到的报道是将事件简单化了，往往还歪曲了。

examples.english: These incidents were grossly distorted by police witnesses.
examples.chinese: 警方目击证人大大歪曲了这些事件。

examples.english: Journalists were accused of sensationalizing the story and distorting the facts.
examples.chinese: 记者们被指责对事件大肆渲染并歪曲事实。

examples.english: She falsified her birth certificate to get the job.
examples.chinese: 她篡改了自己的出生证明以便得到那份工作。

examples.english: A whole team was kept busy falsifying official government records.
examples.chinese: 小组里所有的人都忙于篡改政府的官方记录。

examples.english: Their accounts had been falsified over a long period of time
examples.chinese: 很长一段时间以来，他们的账目一直在作假。

examples.english: I didn't mean that at all -- you're just putting words into my mouth!
examples.chinese: 我根本不是那意思—明明是你强加于我的！

examples.english: You're putting words into her mouth. You don't know what she thinks.
examples.chinese: 你这样说是强加于人。你并不知道她的想法。

examples.english: We've just found out Alec's been cooking the books.
examples.chinese: 我们刚查出亚历克一直在做假账。

examples.english: The directors of the company made millions from cooking the books before the fraud investigators caught them.
examples.chinese: 该公司的董事在诈骗案调查员查到他们以前，通过伪造账目捞了几百万。

examples.english: Hollywood has been accused of rewriting history, by once again denying the role played by African Americans.
examples.chinese: 好莱坞又一次否定由非洲裔美国人扮演的角色，被指责是篡改历史。

centers.english: easy to change

examples.english: We need a flexible management system, able to meet the changing needs of our customers.
examples.chinese: 我们需要一套灵活的管理制度，以适应客户不断变化的要求。

examples.english: Unions would like more flexible working hours to replace the nine-to-five, forty-hour week.
examples.chinese: 工会希望工作时间更为灵活一些，不再是每天朝九晚五，一周工作四十小时。

examples.english: The rules are deliberately left flexible as each case is different.
examples.chinese: 这些条例有意制定得比较灵活，因为情况各不相同。

examples.english: In this job you need to be adaptable and able to cope with unexpected situations.
examples.chinese: 做这项工作需要适应能力强，并能够应付突发情况。

examples.english: Young children are highly adaptable -- I'm sure they won't mind moving to a different area.
examples.chinese: 小孩子适应能力极强—我肯定他们不会在意搬到别的地方去住。

examples.english: All the recent changes had tested the limits of her adaptability.
examples.chinese: 最近的一切变化考验了她适应性有多强。

centers.english: to change what you do or use
centers.chinese: 改变所做之事或所用之物

examples.english: They've changed their phone number.
examples.chinese: 他们换了电话号码。

examples.english: We had to change the tyre because we had a flat.
examples.chinese: 轮胎没气了，我们不得不换一个。

examples.english: Japanese industry is changing to alternative marketing techniques.
examples.chinese: 日本工业正转而运用非传统的营销技术。

examples.english: We've changed from traditional ways of working to an automated system.
examples.chinese: 我们已经从传统的工作方式转变为自动化操作了。

examples.english: Women have to be ambitious and willing to change jobs frequently if they want to get to the top of their profession.
examples.chinese: 女性如果想要在事业上取得成功，就必须雄心勃勃，并愿意经常换工作。

examples.english: I tried to follow him but he kept changing direction.
examples.chinese: 我试图跟着他，可他一直在改变方向。

examples.english: If you don't like the programme you can always change channels.
examples.chinese: 如果你不喜欢这个节目随时可以换台。

examples.english: I used to play golf but I switched to tennis to get more exercise.
examples.chinese: 我过去常常打高尔夫球，可是为了加大运动量，我改打网球了。

examples.english: It took a long time for Americans to switch to smaller cars.
examples.chinese: 美国人花了很长时间才改用更小的汽车。

examples.english: He switched easily and fluently from speaking English to French to German.
examples.chinese: 他在英、法、德三种语言中转换自如，而且都说得很流利。

examples.english: The book follows the life of Ann Pollock, as she moves from the optimism of young love, through the disastrous years of World War II.
examples.chinese: 这本书描写安·波洛克的一生，她经历了第二次世界大战的苦难岁月，逐渐改变了年轻恋爱的那种乐观态度。

examples.english: The bank has moved from private client work to banking for large corporations.
examples.chinese: 这家银行已经从为个人提供服务转向为大型企业提供服务。

examples.english: Many socialists were moving away from faith in revolution towards a fight for reform.
examples.chinese: 许多社会主义者正逐渐改变革命信念，转而为改革而斗争。

examples.english: The generals are transferring their allegiance to their new leader.
examples.chinese: 将军们转而效忠他们的新领袖。

examples.english: Fed up with the disastrous performances of the team he'd been watching for years, he transferred his support to their rivals.
examples.chinese: 这个队的比赛他已看了几年，对他们的糟糕表现很是不满，所以转而支持它的对手队了。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: Britain went over to decimal currency in 1971.
examples.chinese: 1971年英国改用十进制货币。

examples.english: The factory is going over to computerised machinery and many workers are losing their jobs.
examples.chinese: 工厂将改用电脑操作机械，许多工人会因此失业。

examples.english: In 1976 he converted to Islam.
examples.chinese: 1976年，他皈依伊斯兰教。

examples.english: Large numbers of people are converting to Eastern religions such as Buddhism and Hinduism.
examples.chinese: 有很多人正改信东方宗教，如佛教和印度教。

centers.english: to keep changing from one thing to another
centers.chinese: 不断从一物变为另一物

examples.english: His mother would alternate inexplicably between kindness and cruelty.
examples.chinese: 他母亲会莫名其妙地时而和蔼时而凶暴。

examples.english: The guide explained the situation, alternating between Spanish and German.
examples.chinese: 向导交替用西班牙语和德语解释情况。

examples.english: He has periods of depression, which alternate with frenzied activity.
examples.chinese: 他时而抑郁，时而亢奋。

examples.english: Leroy alternated aerobic exercises with weight training to improve his stamina.
examples.chinese: 勒罗伊交替做有氧操和负重练习，以增强耐力。

examples.english: Teachers can keep students’ interest by varying their classes.
examples.chinese: 老师可以通过变换上课的方式来保持学生的兴趣。

examples.english: One of Dickens’ great skills as a writer is the way he varies his style.
examples.chinese: 狄更斯的一大写作才能就是变换写作风格。

examples.english: If you're bored with the trip to work, try varying your route.
examples.chinese: 如果你厌倦了上班的旅程，就试着换一条路线。

examples.english: We rotate -- I teach French grammar one week, and she teaches it the next.
examples.chinese: 我们轮流教—我教一星期的法语语法，然后她再教一星期。

examples.english: We usually rotate the worst jobs so that no one gets stuck with them.
examples.chinese: 最苦的工作我们通常轮流干，这样就没有人会被它缠住。

examples.english: Don't chop and change from one style to another. It confuses the reader.
examples.chinese: 写作风格不要变来变去，会把读者搞糊涂的。

examples.english: I wish they wouldn't keep chopping and changing. There's a different team on the field every week.
examples.chinese: 我希望他们不要老是变化无常，每星期上场的队员都不同。

centers.english: to change your clothes

examples.english: The first thing I do when I get home from school is get changed.
examples.chinese: 从学校回到家我做的第一件事就是换衣服。

examples.english: Are you going to get changed before the party?
examples.chinese: 聚会开始前你要换衣服吗？

examples.english: I'll just change my shirt and I'll be with you in a minute.
examples.chinese: 我就去换一件衬衫，马上回来。

examples.english: ‘Have you got your bathing suit on?’ ‘No, I'll change when we get there.’
examples.chinese: “你穿好泳装了吗？”“没呢，我到那儿再换。”

examples.english: She changed into a sweater and some jeans.
examples.chinese: 她换上了毛线衣和牛仔裤。

centers.english: to change from one vehicle to another during a journey

examples.english: Is this a direct flight or do we have to change?
examples.chinese: 我们是直飞还是中途要换机？

examples.english: Passengers for York change at Leeds.
examples.chinese: 去约克的乘客在利兹换车。

examples.english: We stopped at Los Angeles, just to change planes.
examples.chinese: 我们在洛杉矶停留，只是为了转机。

examples.english: I must have lost my luggage when we transferred.
examples.chinese: 我一定是在换车时把行李丢了。

examples.english: The train broke down so we transferred to a bus.
examples.chinese: 火车坏了，所以我们转乘公共汽车。

centers.english: when things change

examples.english: There have been so many changes around here lately that I'm not sure what's happening any more.
examples.chinese: 最近，这儿发生了那么多变化，我都搞不懂这是怎么回事了。

examples.english: A lot of people are frightened of change.
examples.chinese: 许多人害怕变化。

examples.english: There was a sudden change in the weather.
examples.chinese: 天气突变。

examples.english: House plants are often sensitive to changes in temperature.
examples.chinese: 室内盆栽植物对温度的变化通常很敏感。

examples.english: The delay was the result of a change in the way that we administer the grants.
examples.chinese: 我们把发放补助金的方式作了些变动，所以就耽搁了。

examples.english: 1989 was a year of great political change in eastern Europe.
examples.chinese: 1989年是东欧政治巨变的一年。

examples.english: There have been big changes in the way languages are taught in schools.
examples.chinese: 学校教授语言的方法有了重大改变。

examples.english: For most ordinary workers, the new tax laws represent a change for the worse.
examples.chinese: 对于大多数普通工人来说，新税法代表着负担增加。

examples.english: The relationship between the United States and China has altered in recent years.
examples.chinese: 近年来，美中关系有了改变。

examples.english: She noticed the alteration in his looks and manner.
examples.chinese: 她注意到他的外表和举止和以前不同了。

examples.english: Max walked past her, without acknowledging her presence by the slightest alteration in his expression.
examples.chinese: 马克斯走过她身旁，表情依旧，仿佛没有注意到她。

examples.english: BRITCON's turnround has been achieved by drastic reductions in manpower.
examples.chinese: BRITCON公司通过大幅度的裁员实现了扭亏为盈。

examples.english: The team's dramatic turnaround is attributed to their new coach Bill Snyder.
examples.chinese: 该队戏剧性的转变归功于新教练比尔·斯奈德。

examples.english: The expected turnaround in the beer industry has, for various reasons, not yet occurred.
examples.chinese: 出于各种原因，啤酒工业的预期好转还未发生。

examples.english: Moving to a different school can be a big upheaval for young children.
examples.chinese: 转学对小孩子来说可能是一个很大的变化。

examples.english: The company managed to survive the economic upheavals of the last 20 years.
examples.chinese: 该公司在过去20年的经济剧变中挺了过来。

examples.english: Changing jobs can be an exciting challenge, but it can also be a time of great emotional upheaval.
examples.chinese: 换工作可以是个令人兴奋的挑战，但也可以令情绪大起大落。

examples.english: They argue that our schools are failing our children, and that the education system needs a revolution.
examples.chinese: 他们辩称，我们的学校背弃了孩子，教育体制需要一次革命。

examples.english: Einstein's General Theory of Relativity started a revolution in scientific thinking.
examples.chinese: 爱因斯坦的广义相对论引发了一场科学思维的革命。

examples.english: The 1970s saw the beginnings of a new technological revolution, based on microelectronics.
examples.chinese: 20世纪70年代在微电子学基础上兴起了一场新技术革命。

examples.english: The transformation of the Inner Harbor included new office buildings, and a marketplace of small shops and food stalls.
examples.chinese: 内港区的变化包括新建的办公大楼及拥有小商铺和食摊的市场。

examples.english: Her friends and neighbors watched her transformation from shy local girl to famous movie actress.
examples.chinese: 朋友和邻居看着她从一个害羞的当地小女孩变成著名的女影星。

examples.english: The last great overall transformation in American business took place between 1890 and 1910, when the modern corporation was forged.
examples.chinese: 美国商业最后一次重大的全面改革发生在1890年至1910年间，那时，现代的公司形成了。

examples.english: Today, spruced-up Times Square is in the midst of a surprising transformation into a family-oriented entertainment center.
examples.chinese: 如今，粉饰一新的时代广场正在发生令人称奇的改变，变成面向家庭的娱乐中心。

examples.english: It is rare for a person to undergo a dramatic transformation in his political thinking, but it does happen.
examples.chinese: 人们很少会经历政治思想戏剧化的改变，但的确有这种事。

centers.english: a change made in order to improve something
centers.chinese: 为了改进而作出的变化

examples.english: We need some changes if we are going to make this company successful.
examples.chinese: 如果我们要把公司搞好，就得作一些变革。

examples.english: I can't get used to all these changes.
examples.chinese: 变化那么多，我习惯不了。

examples.english: He hates all changes to his routine.
examples.chinese: 他讨厌日程有任何变动。

examples.english: The computers will record any changes to the system.
examples.chinese: 电脑能将该系统的任何变化记录下来。

examples.english: We are working to bring about changes in the laws concerning the rights of children.
examples.chinese: 我们正努力使涉及到儿童权利的法律有所改变。

examples.english: The producer wants to make some changes to the script before we get the director on board.
examples.chinese: 我们确定导演人选之前，制片人想对剧本作些修改。…

examples.english: Labor Secretary Lynn Martin recommended major changes in the management operations of the company.
examples.chinese: 劳工部长林恩·马丁就该公司的管理运作提议作些重大变革。

examples.english: I've sent the suit to a tailor for alterations.
examples.chinese: 我已把衣服送到裁缝那儿去改了。

examples.english: We're having some alterations made to our house.
examples.chinese: 我们在改建自家的房屋。
