examples.english: Your essay looks fine -- I've suggested one or two minor alterations here and there in the margin.
examples.chinese: 你的文章看上去很好—我在页边对一两个地方提出了小小的修改建议。

examples.english: Feminists sought legal reforms to ensure that women had genuinely equal opportunities.
examples.chinese: 女权主义者设法改革法律以确保妇女真正享有平等机会。

examples.english: The Socialists have promised a programme of radical political and economic reform.
examples.chinese: 社会党允诺一项政治经济重大改革计划。

examples.english: Reforms in agriculture, although slow, are beginning to have an impact.
examples.chinese: 农业改革尽管缓慢，但开始产生了作用。

examples.english: the reform of local government
examples.chinese: 地方政府的改革

examples.english: The revival in the island's economy has come about because of radical reforms introduced over the past three years.
examples.chinese: 该岛经济已经复苏，因为在过去三年中进行了重大改革。

examples.english: I've written the article, but it needs a lot of revision.
examples.chinese: 文章我写完了，但需要好好修改一下。

examples.english: The book went through several revisions before the publisher was finally satisfied with it.
examples.chinese: 这本书修改了好几次，出版方才终于满意。

examples.english: These amendments constitute the most significant revision of U.S. asylum law since the Refugee Act of 1980.
examples.chinese: 这些修正案是1980年《难民法》以来美国避难法最重要的修订。

examples.english: The department has not performed well and is badly in need of a shake-up.
examples.chinese: 这个部门表现不佳，极需改组。

examples.english: The Administration is planning a thorough shake-up of the welfare system.
examples.chinese: 政府正计划对福利制度作彻底的改革。

examples.english: The company is bringing in a team of consultants to oversee the reorganization.
examples.chinese: 公司请来顾问小组监管改组过程。

examples.english: Next came the total reorganization of the Mexican Attorney General's Office.
examples.chinese: 接下来是墨西哥司法部长办公室大改组。

centers.english: a small change that is made to improve or correct something
centers.chinese: 为改进或纠正所作的小改变

examples.english: The new modifications made it the finest of aircraft.
examples.chinese: 一番新近的改进使它成了一架最精良的飞机。

examples.english: The editor suggested a few modifications to the text.
examples.chinese: 编辑建议对原文作几处修改。

examples.english: We need to make some modifications to our teaching program.
examples.chinese: 我们得对教学计划作些修改。

examples.english: Congress passed an amendment ensuring that the law was fairer to everyone.
examples.chinese: 国会通过了一项修正案，以保证该法律对每个人来说更加公正。

examples.english: The committee proposed some amendments to the rules.
examples.chinese: 委员会建议对规则作些修改。

examples.english: The room was full of dancers, all making last-minute adjustments to their costumes.
examples.chinese: 房间里满是舞蹈演员，都在对演出服装作最后的调整。

examples.english: We've had to make some adjustments to our original calculations.
examples.chinese: 我们必须对最初的计算作些调整。

examples.english: I've made a few very minor adjustments to the decor, but in general it was excellent.
examples.chinese: 我对装饰作了些极小的调整，但从整体上来看原先的十分好。

centers.english: a change made in order to use something for another purpose
centers.chinese: 为另一目的使用某物而作的改变

examples.english: The company buys raw material such as wool for conversion into cloth.
examples.chinese: 该公司购入羊毛等原料来织衣料。

examples.english: Local people are protesting about the proposed conversion of a church into a late-night bar.
examples.chinese: 当地民众反对将一座教堂改建成午夜酒吧的提议。

examples.english: She was responsible for the adaptation of the book ‘The Witches of Eastwick’ into a stage play.
examples.chinese: 她负责将《东镇女巫》一书改编成舞台剧。

centers.english: a change from one thing to another
centers.chinese: 从一物到另一物的改变

examples.english: After a number of career changes, she settled into a job with a major bank.
examples.chinese: 经过一番职业变动，她最后安定下来，在一家大银行工作。

examples.english: The police must be notified of any change of address.
examples.chinese: 地址变动必须通知警方。

examples.english: There are even more broken promises with every change of government.
examples.chinese: 每次政府更替就会出现更多未实现的诺言。

examples.english: If you are thinking about a change to a different part of the country you will need to use your vacation to look for accommodation.
examples.chinese: 如果想改变一下去别的地方生活，就得利用假期寻找住处。

examples.english: French people were asked how they felt about the change from the franc to the Euro.
examples.chinese: 法国人民被问到将法郎换成欧元感觉如何。

examples.english: A switch to completly different new foods may cause stomach upsets.
examples.chinese: 突然转吃完全不一样的新食物可能会引起胃部不适。

examples.english: The switch from political activity to family life was hard to handle.
examples.chinese: 从政治活动到家庭生活的转变很难应付。

examples.english: His sudden switches of mood are difficult to deal with.
examples.chinese: 他情绪突变，很难对付。

examples.english: Let's face it -- going from an academic life to the world of business is never an easy move.
examples.chinese: 让我们面对现实吧—从学校生活迈入商业世界从来就不是容易的一步。

examples.english: It's probably time to think about a move to a new job.
examples.chinese: 现在可能是考虑换个工作的时候了。

examples.english: This picture marks the move to the big screen of some of our best television comedians.
examples.chinese: 这部影片标志着我们的一些最优秀的电视喜剧演员投身银幕。

examples.english: The profits of supermarkets declined until 1975 when a reversal began.
examples.chinese: 超级市场的利润逐年下降，直到1975年才出现转变。

examples.english: This appears to be a complete reversal of government policy.
examples.chinese: 这样看来政府的政策完全倒转了。

examples.english: The Second World War saw a dramatic reversal of traditional attitudes towards women.
examples.chinese: 第二次世界大战期间，人们对女性的传统态度有了戏剧性的转变。

examples.english: The party lost all public support after a series of U-turns and policy failures.
examples.chinese: 该党一连多次出尔反尔，加之一系列的政策失误，终于失尽了民众的支持。

examples.english: The government was forced to do a U-turn after angry protests about their taxation policy.
examples.chinese: 政府看到人们愤怒地抗议其税收政策后，不得不来个180度的大转弯。

centers.english: a gradual change from one thing to another
centers.chinese: 从一事物到另一事物的渐变

examples.english: The transition from a communist system to a free market economy will be difficult.
examples.chinese: 从殖民统治转变为自治会很困难。

examples.english: It's difficult for someone who's been a stage actor to make the transition to television.
examples.chinese: 舞台演员很难转型为电视演员。

examples.english: a scheme to help families making the transition from welfare to work
examples.chinese: 帮助家庭脱离福利救济到自食其力的计划

examples.english: The textile industry is currently in transition.
examples.chinese: 纺织工业正处于变革之中。

examples.english: The new system will be introduced gradually over a six month transition period.
examples.chinese: 新的系统将在六个月的过渡期内逐渐引进。

examples.english: There has been a big shift in attitudes towards sex during the past 50 years.
examples.chinese: 在过去的50年里，人们对于性的看法有了很大的转变。

examples.english: We've seen a marked shift in our approach to the social issues.
examples.chinese: 我们解决社会问题的方法已有了明显的转变。

examples.english: The new emphasis on human rights was a shift away from the policies of Nixon.
examples.chinese: 对人权的全新重视是不同于尼克松政策的转变。

examples.english: He is very worried about the shift towards free market thinking in Eastern Europe.
examples.chinese: 他非常担心东欧向自由市场思想靠拢。

examples.english: If present trends continue, the earth will be considerably warmer in fifty years.
examples.chinese: 如果目前的趋势继续下去的话，五十年后地球的气温将大大上升。

examples.english: Our managers are very alert to new trends in the industry.
examples.chinese: 我们的经理对于工业领域的新趋势非常敏感。

examples.english: There is a growing trend towards payment by credit card.
examples.chinese: 人们正越来越倾向于用信用卡付账。

examples.english: The current trend in this area is towards part-time employment.
examples.chinese: 这个地区目前的倾向是做兼职工作。

examples.english: There is a move towards greater equality for women in the workplace.
examples.chinese: 在工作场所，妇女的地位正变得越来越平等。

examples.english: Planners hope to encourage the move towards increased use of public transport.
examples.chinese: 规划者希望鼓励越来越多的人使用公共交通工具。

examples.english: The United Nations was supposed to supervise the move to independence.
examples.chinese: 联合国应监督这个国家迈向独立的过程。

examples.english: Public sector unions are likely to oppose Blair's move away from government investment in health and transport.
examples.chinese: 国营部门工会可能会反对布莱尔减少政府投资医疗和交通的做法。

examples.english: There is a gradual movement towards tolerance and understanding.
examples.chinese: 逐渐趋于宽容和理解。

examples.english: The modern age of movement towards democracy began with the French Revolution in 1789.
examples.chinese: 现代民主化时代始于1789年的法国大革命。

centers.english: not changing and always the same

examples.english: We live next door to a busy street and there is always a constant level of noise in the background.
examples.chinese: 我们的家紧邻着一条热闹的大街，街上传来的噪音持续不断。

examples.english: Unemployment is likely to remain more or less constant for the next two years.
examples.chinese: 在接下去的两年里，失业情况可能变化不大。

examples.english: We drove all day at a steady 65 miles an hour.
examples.chinese: 我们开了一天的车，速度都保持在每小时65英里。

examples.english: It's important to keep the temperature of the oven at a steady high heat.
examples.chinese: 使火炉保持稳定的高温很重要。

examples.english: The study also notes a steady decline in the number of college students taking science courses.
examples.chinese: 研究还注意到攻读理科的大学生数量持续减少。

examples.english: Economists say they expect continued steady growth throughout the year.
examples.chinese: 经济学家说他们期望全年持续稳步增长。

examples.english: Larger families were being rehoused at a steady rate.
examples.chinese: 人数较多的家庭正在以一定的速度重新安排住房。

expressions.text: a steady stream of visitors/enquiries etc

examples.english: A steady stream of refugees arrived at the camp.
examples.chinese: 源源不断的难民抵达营地。

examples.english: Fuel prices have become more stable after several increases last year.
examples.chinese: 燃料价格经过去年数次上涨后已稳定了许多。

examples.english: His temperature remained stable throughout the night.
examples.chinese: 他的体温整晚都保持稳定。

examples.english: The lessons began and ended at fixed times.
examples.chinese: 上下课的时间是固定的。

examples.english: In Communist Russia prices of all common commodities used to be fixed.
examples.chinese: 在共产党执政时期的苏联，所有的普通商品价格都是固定的。

examples.english: Workers are paid a fixed rate per hour.
examples.chinese: 工人按固定计时工资获得薪酬。

examples.english: a fixed-rate mortgage
examples.chinese: 固定利率抵押贷款

examples.english: ‘I'm retired and on a fixed income.’ Marson said. ‘I can't handle this myself, financially.’
examples.chinese: “我退休了，拿固定收入。”马森说道。“经济上，这个我自己负担不起。”

examples.english: The policeman told me there was a fixed penalty of $20 for driving without a rear light.
examples.chinese: 警察告诉我驾车时不开尾灯固定罚款20美元。

examples.english: the unchanging nature of God
examples.chinese: 不变的神性

examples.english: The road ran through an unchanging desert landscape.
examples.chinese: 这条路所经之处都是一模一样的沙漠。

examples.english: Here, you seem to be immersed in an unchanging rural way of life, seemingly unaffected by progress and the modern world.
examples.chinese: 在这里，你似乎沉浸于一成不变的乡村生活方式，好像不受时代进步和现代世界的影响。

centers.english: difficult or impossible to change

examples.english: People naturally get very frustrated with rigid bureaucracies.
examples.chinese: 对于死板的官僚制度，民众自然会很失望。

examples.english: The rigid class distinctions which characterised British society are beginning to break down.
examples.chinese: 作为英国社会一大特征的严格阶级差别正开始弱化。

examples.english: The President will not be able to meet enough people if he is kept to an unnaturally rigid schedule.
examples.chinese: 总统如果死守着刻板的日程表，就不能与足够多的人会面。

examples.english: The government had centralized political power and imposed rigid controls on economic activity.
examples.chinese: 该政府政治上实行中央集权，对经济活动也加以严格控制。

examples.english: The regulations are precise and inflexible in such matters.
examples.chinese: 在这些事情上，规定是明确的，而且没有商量的余地。

examples.english: It is a huge, inflexible and impersonal organization.
examples.chinese: 这是个做事古板而又没有人情味的庞大组织。

centers.english: to change your decisions, intentions, or plans

examples.english: No, I'm not going out tonight. I've changed my mind.
examples.chinese: 不，今晚我不想出去。我改变主意了。

examples.english: What if she changes her mind and doesn't turn up?
examples.chinese: 她如果改变主意不来了怎么办?

examples.english: If you change your mind about the job, just give me a call.
examples.chinese: 如果这工作你改变主意了，就给我打个电话。

examples.english: Barry hadn't changed his mind about leaving.
examples.chinese: 巴里还是坚决要走。

examples.english: Couples contemplating divorce often have second thoughts when they realize how it will affect their children.
examples.chinese: 当打算离婚的夫妇意识到会对孩子产生什么影响时，他们常常要作再三的考虑。

examples.english: It was obvious that the company was having second thoughts about the whole project.
examples.chinese: 很显然，该公司对整个计划举棋不定。

examples.english: A month before the wedding Rose seemed nervous and anxious, and I wondered if she was getting cold feet.
examples.chinese: 距婚礼还有一个月，罗丝似乎紧张不安，我怀疑她是不是要打退堂鼓。

examples.english: Some investors got cold feet, and pulled out of the project at the last minute.
examples.chinese: 一些投资者退缩了，在最后一分钟退出了这个项目。

examples.english: If union leaders start to backtrack now, they'll lose their supporters.
examples.chinese: 如果工会领导人现在开始变卦，他们将失去自己的支持者。

examples.english: The President seems to be backtracking on some of his election promises.
examples.chinese: 总统看来要违背一些他竞选时许下的诺言。

examples.english: There is increased pressure on Congress to backtrack on some of the welfare cuts imposed last year.
examples.chinese: 国会受到更大压力，要他们取消去年实施的部分福利削减。

centers.english: to change your opinion or belief about something
centers.chinese: 改变对某事物的看法或信念

examples.english: At first the doctor said I was suffering from a virus, but now he's changed his mind.
examples.chinese: 最初，医生说我的病是由病毒引起的，可现在他的看法变了。

examples.english: Everyone has a right to change their mind.
examples.chinese: 每个人都有权利改变自己的看法。

examples.english: I'm hoping Dad will change his mind about Louise after he meets her tonight.
examples.chinese: 我希望爸爸今晚见到路易丝后，能改变对她的看法。

examples.english: I've changed my mind about the Riviera. I do like it after all.
examples.chinese: 我已改变了对里维埃拉的看法。我还是挺喜欢这个地方的。

examples.english: Mrs Pemberton revised her opinion of her future son-in-law when he was accepted into law school.
examples.chinese: 彭伯顿夫人的未来女婿考进法律学院后，她改变了对他的看法。

examples.english: Since visiting the refugee camps, I have revised my opinion about immigration quotas.
examples.chinese: 自从参观了难民营，我改变了对移民限额的看法。

examples.english: You've changed your tune all of a sudden! Only yesterday you were saying you thought Christmas presents were a waste of money.
examples.chinese: 你态度变得真快！昨天你还在说你认为买圣诞礼物是浪费金钱的。

examples.english: It's hard to explain this apparent change of heart.
examples.chinese: 这种态度的明显转变很难解释。

examples.english: He didn't want kids at first, but he's had quite a change of heart.
examples.chinese: 他当初不想要孩子，可现在他的态度完全变了。

examples.english: We can only hope Congress may have a radical change of heart about welfare benefits.
examples.chinese: 我们只能希望国会对于福利金的态度会发生根本性的变化。

examples.english: He'll come around eventually. He doesn't have any choice, does he?
examples.chinese: 他最终会改变想法的。他别无选择，是吗?

examples.english: My mother stopped speaking to me when I first married Tom, but she's slowly coming around now.
examples.chinese: 我刚嫁给汤姆的时候，妈妈都不跟我说话了，但现在她慢慢改变了看法。

expressions.text: come around to somebody's view/way of thinking

examples.english: We had to talk to Sam for a long time before he came round to our way of thinking.
examples.chinese: 我们只好和萨姆长谈一次，然后他才转而同意我们的想法。

expressions.text: come around to the idea/view that

examples.english: A lot of employers are coming around to the idea that older employees have a lot to offer a company.
examples.chinese: 许多雇主正在改变看法，相信年长的员工对公司贡献很大。

examples.english: We're hoping that they'll eventually come round to accepting our offer.
examples.chinese: 我们希望他们最终会接受我们的提议。

examples.english: During the Moscow Show Trials in the 1930s, prisoners were forced to publicly recant.
examples.chinese: 20世纪30年代莫斯科举行的公审中，囚犯们被迫当众宣布放弃自己的信仰。

examples.english: After the Reformation, many Catholics recanted to avoid punishment.
examples.chinese: 宗教改革以后，许多天主教徒放弃了自己的信仰以免受惩罚。

centers.english: to keep changing your mind

examples.english: The longer you vacillate the less time you'll have to do anything worthwhile.
examples.chinese: 你越是犹豫，余下来做有价值的事的时间就越少。

examples.english: The writer seems to vacillate between approving of Collins’ actions and finding them disgusting.
examples.chinese: 对柯林斯的行为，作者一会儿赞成，一会儿又厌恶，看来还拿不定主意。

examples.english: She had been a great star once, but the fickle public now ignored her movies.
examples.chinese: 她以前是位大明星，但喜好无常的公众现在已经不看她的影片了。

examples.english: I can't tell what he wants - he keeps blowing hot and cold.
examples.chinese: 我不知道他要什么—他一直拿不定主意。

examples.english: In our dealings with the police we have found that they can blow hot and cold. Sometimes they are keen to have media help in solving a crime, other times they are more reluctant.
examples.chinese: 在与警方打交道的过程中我们发现他们反复无常，有时急于寻求媒体帮助来破案，有时却不情愿。

centers.english: willing to change the way you do something
centers.chinese: 愿意改变做事情的方式

examples.english: If you're looking for a job you need to be flexible about where you're prepared to work.
examples.chinese: 如果你在找工作，对于工作地点不能挑三拣四。

examples.english: He said the key to his business success was not forgetting to stay flexible.
examples.chinese: 他说自己生意成功的关键是不忘记灵活处事。

examples.english: Children are often more adaptable than adults.
examples.chinese: 儿童往往比成人适应性更强。

examples.english: I'm not sure Ken's adaptable enough to take a job abroad.
examples.chinese: 我无法确定肯能否适应国外的工作。

centers.english: to refuse to change your mind

examples.english: We need to do something about Craig, but he's so stubborn I just know he wouldn't listen if we tried to talk to him.
examples.chinese: 我们得管管克雷格了，可是他很倔，我知道如果试图和他谈的话，他是不会听的。

examples.english: I've got a very stubborn streak and I discovered that I couldn't bear people telling me what I could and couldn't eat.
examples.chinese: 我的个性很固执，我发觉受不了别人告诉我该吃什么，不该吃什么。

examples.english: Jean-Paul can be as a stubborn as a mule.
examples.chinese: 让-保罗倔起来像头骡子。

examples.english: When you know that you are right, you have to stand firm and defend your principles.
examples.chinese: 如果你知道自己是对的，就一定要坚持自己的原则。

examples.english: We stood firm against any deal with the terrorists.
examples.chinese: 我们坚持不与恐怖分子作任何交易。

examples.english: The president has failed to stand firm on his promise to allow gays to serve in the military.
examples.chinese: 总统未能坚守诺言允许同性恋者在军中服役。

examples.english: They tried to make him change his mind, but he stood his ground.
examples.chinese: 他们试图使他改变主意，但他仍固守己见。

examples.english: Richard always went along with Ella's plans, never once daring to stand his ground against her.
examples.chinese: 理查德总是听从埃拉的计划，从不敢反对她。

examples.english: For many years the South African government remained intransigent, despite mounting world opposition to apartheid.
examples.chinese: 许多年来，尽管全世界反对种族隔离制度的呼声日益高涨，南非政府还是持不妥协态度。

examples.english: The Church has been criticized for being intransigent on the issues of abortion and birth control.
examples.chinese: 教会因在人工流产和节育问题上不肯让步而受到批评。

centers.english: unwilling to accept changes or new ideas
centers.chinese: 不愿意接受改变或新思想

examples.english: These old teachers tend to have very fixed ideas.
examples.chinese: 这些老教师往往都很固执。

examples.english: He has very fixed ideas about the way a wife should behave.
examples.chinese: 他对为妻之道有自己的一套固有的看法。

examples.english: The seventy-year-old president has been condemned as reactionary by his radical opponents.
examples.chinese: 70岁的总统被激进的反对派指责为极端保守。

examples.english: He is known for his reactionary views on immigration and the reintroduction of the death penalty.
examples.chinese: 他因在移民问题和恢复死刑问题上态度保守而闻名。

examples.english: Cultural attitudes to women were more reactionary than in most of Western Europe.
examples.chinese: 当地文化对待女性的态度要比西欧大多数国家保守。

examples.english: a bunch of right wing reactionaries
examples.chinese: 一群右翼反动分子

examples.english: The unequal treatment of men and women in the labour market is deeply entrenched in our culture.
examples.chinese: 劳动力市场男女不平等的现象在我们的文化中根深蒂固。

examples.english: In the small towns racial prejudice was deeply entrenched.
examples.chinese: 在小镇上，种族偏见根深蒂固。

examples.english: The attitudes of adults to the mentally handicapped tend to be firmly entrenched, and difficult to change.
examples.chinese: 成年人对智障人士的态度往往根深蒂固，难以改变。

examples.english: Come on, don't be such an old stick in the mud.
examples.chinese: 得了，别这样保守了。

examples.english: She accused him of being a stick in the mud.
examples.chinese: 她指责他是个老古董。

examples.english: Apart from a few union diehards most of the men have accepted the new productivity agreement.
examples.chinese: 除了工会里的几个强硬分子以外，绝大多数人都接受了新的生产效率协议。

examples.english: Diehard opponents of the scheme say that they will appeal against the court's decision.
examples.chinese: 反对这个方案的顽固分子声称要对法院的判决进行上诉。

examples.english: The attempted coup was staged by a group of the ex-president's most diehard supporters.
examples.chinese: 这次未遂政变是由前总统的一群死硬支持者发动的。

examples.english: It was predictable that the medical establishment, so hidebound and reactionary, would reject Dr Stone's ideas.
examples.chinese: 医学界思想顽固守旧，可以预料他们会拒绝接受斯通医生的见解。

examples.english: The hidebound attitudes of Russia's powerful aristocracy made any kind of progress impossible.
examples.chinese: 俄国贵族大权在握，他们的守旧态度扼杀了任何进步的可能性。

centers.english: unwilling to change the way you do things

examples.english: Although many students adored Albers, others found him inflexible and stifling.
examples.chinese: 尽管许多学生崇拜阿伯斯，但有些人觉得他刚愎自用，令人窒息。

examples.english: Union negotiators criticized the employers for being too inflexible on the issues of pay and working conditions.
examples.chinese: 工会谈判人员指责资方在薪金和工作条件的问题上毫不让步。

examples.english: I'm too old and set in my ways to try living in a foreign country now.
examples.chinese: 我现在太老了，已很难改变自己的生活方式，所以不愿到外国去居住。

examples.english: Our manager was so rigid, he'd never listen to our ideas.
examples.chinese: 我们的经理非常固执，他从来就不听取我们的想法。

examples.english: Any major changes were prevented by the rigid conservatism of the Church.
examples.chinese: 任何重大的变革都遭到教会顽固的保守主义的阻挠。

examples.english: Andrew was even more rigid in his attitudes towards child-rearing than his father, who was himself quite strict.
examples.chinese: 在培养孩子的问题上，安德鲁的态度要比他严苛的父亲还要死板。

centers.english: when something that has been decided cannot be changed

examples.english: They thought carefully before making a final commitment to buy.
examples.chinese: 他们在最终作出购买的承诺之前仔细斟酌了一番。

examples.english: The judges’ decision is final.
examples.chinese: 法官的判决是最终判决。

examples.english: The officials have final authority when making decisions.
examples.chinese: 官员们拥有最后决定权。

examples.english: You're not going out, and that's final!
examples.chinese: 你不能出去，就这么定了！

examples.english: My boss has approved the project, but it's the Chief Executive who has the final say.
examples.chinese: 我老板同意这个计划，但有最终决定权的是总经理。

examples.english: The new school timetable has not been finally decided yet.
examples.chinese: 新的课程表还没有最后定下来。

examples.english: Her decision was immediate and irrevocable.
examples.chinese: 她的决定很迅速，而且不可改变。

examples.english: I posted the letter, then realized that what I had done was irrevocable, and that I couldn't change my mind now.
examples.chinese: 我寄了信，然后意识到我做的事情已经不可逆转，现在不能改变主意了。

examples.english: Britain could be irrevocably tied to a single European currency.
examples.chinese: 英国可能会被欧洲单一货币死死地束缚住。

examples.english: You've committed your time and money to the project now -- there's no going back.
examples.chinese: 现在，你已经把时间和金钱投入这项计划—没有回头路可走了。

examples.english: It had started as a casual affair but they both knew that now there was no going back.
examples.chinese: 此事开始时大家都不认真，但他们俩都知道现在已无法挽回。

centers.english: to repair something that is broken or damaged

examples.english: Builders spent several weeks repairing the roof.
examples.chinese: 建筑工人花了几个星期时间修补屋顶。

examples.english: The plane was too badly damaged to be repaired.
examples.chinese: 飞机损坏得太严重，无法修好了。

examples.english: How much will it cost to have the TV repaired?
examples.chinese: 修好这台电视机费用要多少？

examples.english: I'll need to fix the boat before we can go out in it.
examples.chinese: 我们乘船出去之前，我先得把它修好。

examples.english: I must get my camera fixed before we go to France.
examples.chinese: 我们去法国之前，我一定要把照相机修好。

examples.english: The children are taught to mend their own clothes.
examples.chinese: 人们教小孩自己补衣服。

examples.english: I called a service engineer in to mend the lift.
examples.chinese: 我叫来了维修技术人员来修理电梯。

examples.english: We managed to patch up the roof enough to stop it leaking.
examples.chinese: 我们设法把屋顶补了一下，使它不再漏水。

examples.english: The boat's got a hole in the side, but I'm just going to try and patch it up for now.
examples.chinese: 船的一侧有个洞，我正在设法把它暂时修补一下。

examples.english: The engine has been overhauled and runs much more smoothly now.
examples.chinese: 发动机已经检修过了，现在运转起来平稳多了。

examples.english: All the electrical wiring in the house was being completely overhauled because of the risk of fire.
examples.chinese: 因为怕有起火的危险，房子里所有的供电线路都在进行彻底检修。

examples.english: All our machinery is serviced regularly.
examples.chinese: 我们所有的机器都定期保养。

examples.english: When was the plane last serviced?
examples.chinese: 这架飞机上次检修是什么时候?

examples.english: You should have your car serviced every six months.
examples.chinese: 你应该把汽车每六个月送去检修一次。

centers.english: to repair something old to make it look or work like a new one

examples.english: The old theatre has been completely renovated and re-fitted.
examples.chinese: 旧剧场已完全修复，并重新装修。

examples.english: We decided to buy an old house and renovate it ourselves.
examples.chinese: 我们决定买幢旧房子自己来装修。

examples.english: He bought six old bicycles and renovated them.
examples.chinese: 他买了六辆旧自行车并对它们进行了整修。

examples.english: a charming old property, suitable for renovation
examples.chinese: 一栋可以整修如新的漂亮旧房子

examples.english: The building has been carefully restored after the fire.
examples.chinese: 火灾后这幢房子已被精心修复。

examples.english: Experts are still working to restore the painting.
examples.chinese: 专家们仍在为这幅画进行修复工作。

examples.english: He spent almost three years restoring a 1922 Rolls Royce.
examples.chinese: 他差不多花了三年时间修复一辆1922年的劳斯莱斯。

examples.english: The church was closed for restoration so that it could be restored.
examples.chinese: 这座教堂要关闭进行整修。

examples.english: He does up old cars and sells them.
examples.chinese: 他把旧车修好再出售。

examples.english: A builder bought the house and fixed it up.
examples.chinese: 一名建造商买下了这幢房子，然后把它装修好。

examples.english: I managed to buy a reconditioned engine quite cheaply.
examples.chinese: 我设法以很便宜的价格买下了一台修过的引擎。

examples.english: a shop selling new and reconditioned washing machines
examples.chinese: 一家出售新的和修理过的洗衣机的商店

centers.english: work done to repair something

examples.english: Who will pay for the repairs?
examples.chinese: 谁来付修理费?

examples.english: The insurance will cover the cost of all repairs to the vehicle.
examples.chinese: 这种保险承保这辆汽车的所有修理费。

examples.english: Builders are carrying out repairs to the roof and walls.
examples.chinese: 建筑工人正在修补屋顶和墙壁。

examples.english: The Highways Department is responsible for the construction and maintenance of bridges and roads.
examples.chinese: 公路管理部负责桥梁和道路的建造和养护工作。

examples.english: I knew nothing about car maintenance when I first bought my car.
examples.chinese: 我刚买汽车时对汽车保养一无所知。

examples.english: The fault was discovered during routine maintenance work.
examples.chinese: 在例行保养时发现了毛病。

examples.english: We recommend an annual service for all central heating boilers.
examples.chinese: 我们建议对所有中央取暖锅炉进行每年一次的检修。

examples.english: My car's due for service - I'll book it into a garage next week.
examples.chinese: 我的汽车该检修了，我要预约好下周把它送到车库去。

examples.english: Any major problems with the car should be picked up at the 5,000 mile service.
examples.chinese: 5,000英里保养时应该可以查出任何严重的问题。

examples.english: The electrical system needs a complete overhaul.
examples.chinese: 供电系统需要彻底的检修。

examples.english: Work on the overhaul of the boiler has just started.
examples.chinese: 对锅炉的全面检修工作刚刚开始。

examples.english: It's about time to take the car in for a tune-up again.
examples.chinese: 该把这辆汽车再送去维修了。

examples.english: If you give the engine regular tune-ups, it will last much longer.
examples.chinese: 如果定期对发动机进行微调保养，就能大大延长它的使用寿命。

centers.english: too badly damaged to be repaired
centers.chinese: 破损太严重而不能修理的

examples.english: Unfortunately, the engine is beyond repair.
examples.chinese: 很可惜，这台引擎没法修好了。

examples.english: A lot of the furniture had been damaged beyond repair.
examples.chinese: 这些家具中有许多已损坏得无法修理了。

examples.english: The explosion caused irreparable damage to several buildings.
examples.chinese: 这次爆炸使几幢建筑物损坏得无法修复。

examples.english: The forest suffered irreparable damage as a result of last year's fire.
examples.chinese: 去年的火灾对森林造成不可弥补的破坏。

centers.english: to prepare for something that will happen in the future
centers.chinese: 为将来发生的事作准备

examples.english: I've been so busy that I've had no time to prepare.
examples.chinese: 我太忙了，没有时间来准备。

examples.english: He only had a few hours to prepare for the interview.
examples.chinese: 他仅有几个小时来准备采访。

examples.english: People on the island are preparing for another storm.
examples.chinese: 岛上的人正在为另一场暴风雨的到来作准备。

examples.english: The company is preparing to expand its European network.
examples.chinese: 该公司正准备扩大其在欧洲的网络。

examples.english: a series of preparatory meetings
examples.chinese: 一系列的预备会议

examples.english: We're looking forward to the trip, but there's so much to do to get ready.
examples.chinese: 我们盼着这次旅行，但还有许多准备工作要做。

examples.english: We've spent the last few days getting ready for Christmas.
examples.chinese: 过去几天我们在为圣诞节作准备。

examples.english: It seems the whole country is getting ready to welcome the visiting president.
examples.chinese: 似乎整个国家都在为欢迎来访的总统作准备。

examples.english: We set a date of January 8 and began to make preparations.
examples.chinese: 我们把日子定在1月8日，便开始了准备工作。

examples.english: We started to make preparations for the wedding about a year ago.
examples.chinese: 大约一年前，我们开始筹备婚礼。

examples.english: I made my preparations with great care.
examples.chinese: 我非常认真地做准备工作。

examples.english: Japan National Railways was split up in preparation for sale to private investors.
examples.chinese: 日本国立铁路公司已被拆分，准备售与私人投资者。

examples.english: In preparation for Passover, all ‘unclean’ items are removed from the house.
examples.chinese: 为准备过逾越节，房子里所有“不干净”的物品都被清理掉。

examples.english: Retailers are already gearing up to meet the Christmas rush.
examples.chinese: 零售商已作好准备，以迎接圣诞节期间的购物狂潮。

examples.english: The company will shortly be gearing up for a major expansion.
examples.chinese: 公司很快就会准备作大规模扩展。

expressions.text: do the groundwork/ do the spadework

examples.english: All the necessary groundwork for the advertising campaign has already been done.
examples.chinese: 广告宣传所有必需的前期工作都已完成。

examples.english: Although I did most of the spadework, I wasn't given any credit for it.
examples.chinese: 尽管大部分的前期工作都是我做的，可我没有得到一点表扬。

examples.english: Britain mobilized its forces.
examples.chinese: 英国动员了军队。

examples.english: While the US mobilizes, top-level diplomats are making a last attempt to reach a negotiated settlement.
examples.chinese: 当全美国都动员起来时，高层外交官还在作最后的努力，试图通过谈判来解决问题。

centers.english: to prepare something so that it is ready to be used

examples.english: Before you start painting, prepare the walls by cleaning them and filling any cracks.
examples.chinese: 粉刷之前，先清理墙面、修补裂缝，做好准备工作。

examples.english: When they are not in the classroom, teachers spend much of their time preparing lessons.
examples.chinese: 不在教室里上课时，老师大部分时间在备课。

examples.english: The Americans are preparing two new satellites for launch.
examples.chinese: 美国人正准备发射两颗新卫星。

examples.english: Maintenance staff are busy preparing the field for tomorrow's big game.
examples.chinese: 维修人员正忙着为明天的大赛准备场地。

examples.english: I'll get the car ready.
examples.chinese: 我会把车子准备好的。

examples.english: Try to get all your things ready for school the night before.
examples.chinese: 前一天晚上尽量把上学所需的东西都准备好。

examples.english: Her main job is to do general cleaning and get the rooms ready for guests.
examples.chinese: 她主要是做一般清理工作，并为客人准备好房间。

examples.english: We've set up a microphone in the corner.
examples.chinese: 我们已在角落里安装了一只麦克风。

examples.english: It was 6:30 and traders were already setting up their market stalls.
examples.chinese: 6点半时，小贩们已经在集市搭建摊位了。

examples.english: It'll take a few minutes to set the camera up.
examples.chinese: 架设摄像机要花几分钟。

centers.english: to prepare yourself for something that you have to do
centers.chinese: 为自己必须做的事作准备

examples.english: Before starting to write an answer in an exam, prepare yourself by thinking about what you want to say.
examples.chinese: 考试时开始写答案前，先想好要说些什么。

examples.english: They prepared themselves for a long wait.
examples.chinese: 他们作好了长时间等待的准备。

examples.english: She has spent the last year preparing herself for the race.
examples.chinese: 她花了去年整整一年的时间，来为这次赛跑作准备。

examples.english: The children were seasick last time, so this time we're prepared .
examples.chinese: 上次孩子们晕船，所以这次我们有所准备。

examples.english: I just wasn't prepared for such a difficult interview.
examples.chinese: 我没料到面试那么难。

examples.english: Clark's lawyers were well prepared and confident.
examples.chinese: 克拉克的律师准备充分、充满自信。

examples.english: You'd better go get ready - it's almost 8 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 你最好作好准备—差不多8点了。

examples.english: I was just getting ready to go out when Tim called.
examples.chinese: 蒂姆打电话来时我正在准备出去。

examples.english: In the stadium, the sprinters are getting themselves ready for the 100-metre race.
examples.chinese: 体育场里，短跑选手们在为100米赛跑作准备。

examples.english: Here comes the boss, and she's not looking happy! You'd better brace yourself!
examples.chinese: 老板来了，她看上去不太高兴！你最好有所准备！

examples.english: Socialist party leaders are bracing themselves for defeat.
examples.chinese: 社会党领导人在准备迎接失败。

examples.english: I didn't really want to hear the rest, but I braced myself to listen.
examples.chinese: 我实在不愿听下去，但我作好了继续听的准备。

examples.english: I had to steel myself before I could tell her about the accident.
examples.chinese: 我必须先让自己坚强起来，再把意外告诉她。

examples.english: She steeled herself to look at the body again.
examples.chinese: 她定了定神，又看了一眼那具尸体。

examples.english: Jim steeled himself for a fight.
examples.chinese: 吉姆准备好打一架。

examples.english: I tried to psych myself up before the interview.
examples.chinese: 我尽量在面试前作好思想准备。

examples.english: A lot of athletes use music to psych themselves up for a game.
examples.chinese: 许多运动员听音乐来为比赛作好思想准备。

examples.english: I haven't asked him yet, but I'm working up to it.
examples.chinese: 我还没问过他，我正在使自己鼓起勇气。

examples.english: She's been working up to telling her boyfriend it's over.
examples.chinese: 她鼓起勇气要告诉男朋友一切都结束了。

examples.english: The game's on Friday, so we're starting to gear ourselves up during training.
examples.chinese: 比赛在星期五，因此我们在训练时开始让自己进入状态。

examples.english: He's been gearing himself up for his exams over the past few weeks.
examples.chinese: 在过去几周里，他一直在使自己进入状态参加考试。

centers.english: to prepare someone for something that they will have to do
centers.chinese: 使某人为必须做的事作准备

examples.english: The programs are aimed at preparing people who want to start up their own business.
examples.chinese: 这些课程的目的是让那些想自己创业的人作好准备。

examples.english: Schools should do more to prepare children for the world of work.
examples.chinese: 学校应该多做工作，让孩子们为职业世界作好准备。

examples.english: Nothing could have prepared him for what he saw during the war.
examples.chinese: 什么都无法让他准备好面对战争中看到的一切。

examples.english: The team is currently training in Hampshire.
examples.chinese: 该队目前在汉普郡接受训练。

examples.english: The staff must be trained to use the software correctly.
examples.chinese: 全体职员必须接受培训，学会正确使用该软件。

examples.english: The troops had been trained for an important role in the battle.
examples.chinese: 这支军队已经过训练，在战斗中担任重要角色。

examples.english: She's been training for the marathon for six months.
examples.chinese: 六个月来，她一直在进行马拉松训练。

examples.english: Jiang was groomed as Deng's replacement
examples.chinese: 安德森被培养成他的接班人。

examples.english: Mrs Adams had groomed her only daughter to be a perfect wife and mother.
examples.chinese: 亚当斯太太已把她的独生女儿培养成一位十全十美的妻子兼母亲。

examples.english: Most people believe he is being groomed for the party leadership.
examples.chinese: 大多数人认为他正被培养成为该党领导人。

examples.english: A good education will equip your children to get a good job.
examples.chinese: 良好的教育能使你的孩子谋得一份好职业。

examples.english: We do our best to equip refugees with the skills they need for survival in a foreign culture.
examples.chinese: 我们尽力使难民具备在异域文化中生存所需的技能。

centers.english: to provide the necessary conditions for something to happen
centers.chinese: 提供某事发生所必需的条件

examples.english: The negotiations in Geneva have set the scene for a possible agreement later in the year.
examples.chinese: 日内瓦谈判已为今年稍后时候可能会达成的协议提供了条件。

examples.english: Recent events have set the scene for a potentially violent confrontation between the demonstrators and the army.
examples.chinese: 近来发生的事情导致示威人群和军队之间存在着引发暴力冲突的危险。

examples.english: These experiments may pave the way for a vaccine against some forms of cancer.
examples.chinese: 这些实验也许会为培养出一种能预防某些癌症的疫苗铺平道路。

examples.english: The Married Women's Property Act paved the way for further legislation on women's rights.
examples.chinese: 《已婚妇女财产法》为进一步立法保障妇女权利铺平了道路。

examples.english: Long-term planning after the war laid the foundations for the nation's steady economic growth.
examples.chinese: 战后的长期规划为该国经济稳定发展打下基础。

examples.english: The two sides met in an attempt to lay the foundations of a future peace settlement.
examples.chinese: 双方会面以期为未来达成和平协议打下基础。

centers.english: when you prepare something

examples.english: Months of preparation have gone into organizing the festival.
examples.chinese: 数月的准备工夫都花在组织那个节日上。

examples.english: This dessert needs very little preparation, and you can serve it right away.
examples.chinese: 这道甜食几乎不需要作什么准备，你可以马上把它装盘上桌。

examples.english: This is all part of the preparation for next month's vital election.
examples.chinese: 这全都是下月举行的重要选举的准备工作的一部分。

examples.english: Correct preparation of the canvas for painting is extremely important.
examples.chinese: 画布的正确处理极其重要。

examples.english: Despite their preparations, hospital officials worry that they could not cope with a major epidemic.
examples.chinese: 尽管作了准备工作，医院管理人员还是担心无法应付大规模流行疾病。

examples.english: She's busy with the final preparations for the wedding.
examples.chinese: 她正忙于为婚礼做最后的准备工作。

examples.english: Preparations for the conference are well under way.
examples.chinese: 会议的准备工作早已开始。

centers.english: to mix substances or liquids together
centers.chinese: 把物质或液体混合起来

examples.english: You can make green by mixing blue and yellow paint.
examples.chinese: 把蓝色和黄色油漆混合，就配成了绿色油漆。

examples.english: Mix all the ingredients together in a large bowl.
examples.chinese: 把所有的原料都放在一只大碗里混合起来。

examples.english: If these two chemicals are mixed together, they will explode.
examples.chinese: 这两种化学品如果混合起来就会爆炸。

examples.english: Concrete is made by mixing gravel with sand, cement, and water.
examples.chinese: 混凝土是通过把碎石、沙子、水泥和水搅拌在一起制成的。

examples.english: Combine the egg yolks and the cream, and cook over a low heat.
examples.chinese: 把蛋黄和奶油混合，再用小火烧。

examples.english: Steel is produced by combining iron with carbon.
examples.chinese: 钢是由铁和碳组合而成的。

examples.english: To maintain a constant standard, some wine producers combine this year's wine with stocks from the previous year.
examples.chinese: 为保持质量稳定，有些酒商把今年的酒与去年的存酒混合在一起。

examples.english: Stir the paint to make sure that the colours are thoroughly mixed.
examples.chinese: 把颜料搅拌一下，以确保两种颜料完全混合。

examples.english: I watched him as he stirred sugar into his coffee.
examples.chinese: 我看着他把糖搅拌到他的咖啡中去。

examples.english: When the butter has melted, stir in the soy sauce and ginger.
examples.chinese: 黄油融化后，把酱油和生姜搅拌进去。

examples.english: Add the grated cheese to the sauce and stir it in.
examples.chinese: 把磨碎的干酪加进调味汁中搅拌。

examples.english: Carry on beating the eggs with a fork until they're light and fluffy.
examples.chinese: 继续用叉子打鸡蛋，直到它变得又薄又松。

examples.english: In a separate bowl, beat together the oil and flour.
examples.chinese: 用另外一只碗，把油和面粉搅拌一下。

examples.english: Beat the cream into the fruit puree, pour into bowls, and chill.
examples.chinese: 把奶油倒入果酱中搅拌，之后再倒入碗中冷却。

examples.english: Blend the sugar, eggs, and flour.
examples.chinese: 把糖、蛋和面粉搅拌均匀。

examples.english: The ingredients should be blended together until they are smooth.
examples.chinese: 各种成分要搅拌到均匀为止。

examples.english: Beat the egg yolks with 2 tablespoons of water and blend them into the white sauce.
examples.chinese: 给蛋黄加两大汤匙水搅打，再搅拌到白色调味汁里。

examples.english: Whisk the eggs and sugar in a bowl over a pan of hot water.
examples.chinese: 把一只碗放在一锅热水中，把鸡蛋和糖放在碗里搅打。

examples.english: He whisked the butter and eggs together, wondering if this was the right way to make an omelette.
examples.chinese: 他把黄油和鸡蛋搅拌在一起，心里在想不知道这样做鸡蛋饼是否正确。

examples.english: For babies, dilute the fruit juice with at least the same amount of water.
examples.chinese: 喂婴儿的话，要加入至少相同量的水稀释这种果汁。

examples.english: Concentrated bleach can be diluted with water.
examples.chinese: 浓缩的漂白剂可以加水稀释。

centers.english: to become mixed

examples.english: Oil and water do not mix.
examples.chinese: 油和水不相溶。

examples.english: After a short time the oxygen and the nitrogen molecules will start to mix.
examples.chinese: 再过片刻，氧分子和氮分子将开始结合在一起。

examples.english: A heater introduces warm air to mix with incoming cold air.
examples.chinese: 一个加热器引入了暖空气，使之与新进来的冷空气相混合。

examples.english: When the two chemicals combine, they form an explosive compound.
examples.chinese: 这两种化学品能化合成一种会爆炸的化合物。

examples.english: Greenhouse gases combine with hydrocarbons to form smog.
examples.chinese: 温室气体与碳氢化合物相混合就形成了烟雾。

examples.english: The noise was tremendous; bombs, guns, and engines mingled in discordant sound.
examples.chinese: 噪声震耳欲聋——炸弹声、枪声和引擎声交织成刺耳的声音。

examples.english: The smell of the sea mingled with the faint scent of the grass.
examples.chinese: 海水的气味与淡淡的草味混杂在一起。

examples.english: Water spread across the floor in a greasy stream, mingling with the pile of filthy rubbish.
examples.chinese: 一股油腻腻的水流过地板，与一堆肮脏的垃圾混杂在一起。

centers.english: substances that have been mixed together

examples.english: Place all the ingredients in a bowl and beat them until the mixture is smooth.
examples.chinese: 把所有材料都放进一个碗内，然后搅拌至均匀为止。

examples.english: The car runs on a special ether-alcohol mixture that won't work in an ordinary engine.
examples.chinese: 这部车的燃料是一种特制的乙醚和酒精的混合物，这种燃料在普通的引擎里不能使用。

examples.english: A special mixture of peat and soil is used for growing bonsai trees.
examples.chinese: 使用了一种泥炭和泥土的特殊混合物来种植盆景树。

examples.english: Banana, orange juice, and cream may seem an odd combination, but together they make a delicious drink.
examples.chinese: 香蕉、橙汁和奶油看上去或许是奇怪的搭配，但用它们做出的饮料很好喝。

examples.english: The sweater is made of a combination of natural and synthetic fibres.
examples.chinese: 这件毛衣是由天然和合成纤维混合织成的。

examples.english: The soil was tested to make sure that it was free from ammonia or any other nitrogen compound.
examples.chinese: 土壤经过了测定，以保证当中不含有氨或其他氮的化合物。

examples.english: Sulphur dioxide and carbon dioxide are two common chemical compounds.
examples.chinese: 二氧化硫和二氧化碳是两种常见的化合物。

examples.english: Make a salt solution by dissolving 9 tablespoonfuls of cooking salt in a pint of water.
examples.chinese: 把九大汤匙食盐溶于一品脱水中，制出一种盐溶液来。

examples.english: We are now going to measure the boiling points of the different solutions.
examples.chinese: 我们现在准备测定这几种不同溶液的沸点。

centers.english: mixed untidily together

examples.english: The drawer was full of mixed up bits of paper, old letters, and photographs.
examples.chinese: 抽屉中满是杂乱的纸片、旧信和照片。

examples.english: The tapes are a bit mixed up, but it shouldn't take too long to sort them out.
examples.chinese: 磁带放得有些乱，不过应该用不了多久就能整理好。

examples.english: A jumbled collection of clothes lay on the floor.
examples.chinese: 地板上放着一堆杂乱的衣服。

examples.english: The rucksack contains several pockets to prevent odds and ends getting jumbled up.
examples.chinese: 这个背包有几个口袋，以免零零碎碎的东西混起来。

examples.english: a drawer full of letters all jumbled together
examples.chinese: 乱糟糟塞满了信件的抽屉

examples.english: He ran a hand through his tangled hair.
examples.chinese: 他用一只手把自己的乱发拢了拢。

examples.english: The concrete highway was edged with tangled dry grass.
examples.chinese: 水泥公路两旁是杂乱的干草。

centers.english: to mix ideas, feelings, styles etc
centers.chinese: 不同的观念、感受、风格等混合在一起

examples.english: This is a computer system that combines maximum flexibility with absolute accuracy.
examples.chinese: 这是一种把最大程度的灵活性和绝对的可靠性结合在一起的电脑系统。

examples.english: He designed the first great suspension bridge, an idea that combines beauty and function perfectly.
examples.chinese: 他设计了第一座大型吊桥，这种设计理念把美观和实用性结合得十分好。

expressions.text: be a mixture of something and something

examples.english: Her work is a mixture of classical and modern styles.
examples.chinese: 她的作品是古典与现代风格的混合物。

examples.english: Billy's voice was a mixture of apprehension and indignation.
examples.chinese: 比利的嗓音中焦虑和气愤兼而有之。

examples.english: It is a marvellous book, which brings together all the necessary elements of romance and adventure.
examples.chinese: 这是部出色的小说，浪漫和冒险的成分应有尽有。

examples.english: These opposing views should be brought together in a single paragraph, to form the conclusion to your essay.
examples.chinese: 这些相反的观点应放在同一段落中作为你文章的结论。

examples.english: The ballet company's repertoire blends tradition and creative innovation.
examples.chinese: 这个芭蕾舞团的节目把传统和创新融合在一起。

examples.english: Her first novel successfully blends a sense of innocence with overwhelming bitterness.
examples.chinese: 她的第一部小说把纯真感和强烈的愤恨成功地交融在一起。

examples.english: Heraklion mingles traditional charm with a bustling centre of pavement cafes and shops.
examples.chinese: 伊拉克利翁市把传统的魅力与街边咖啡馆和商店组成的繁华闹市区融合为一体。

examples.english: Mingling genuine news with gossip, she made a lively companion.
examples.chinese: 她的言谈结合了真实新闻与流言蜚语，是个充满活力的同伴。

examples.english: The library profession is merging new techniques with old to produce an unbeatable combination of management skills.
examples.chinese: 图书馆专业把新式的与传统的技术相结合，形成了一种无与伦比的管理技巧。

centers.english: a mixture of different people, qualities, ideas etc
centers.chinese: 不同的人、特点、观点等的混合物

examples.english: The house behind us was a strange architectural mixture.
examples.chinese: 我们后面的那座房子是个奇怪的建筑组合。

examples.english: He looked at her with a mixture of admiration and curiosity.
examples.chinese: 他用羡慕而又好奇的目光看着她。

examples.english: A long French liner slipped majestically by with a mixture of European and Asian faces staring curiously from the decks.
examples.chinese: 一艘长长的法国客船姿态庄严地迅速开过，甲板上一张张欧洲人的、亚洲人的脸好奇地向外张望着。

examples.english: Our problems were due to a combination of bad management and lack of experience.
examples.chinese: 我们的问题是由于管理不善和缺乏经验造成的。

examples.english: Their music is an odd combination of jazz and opera.
examples.chinese: 他们的音乐是爵士乐与歌剧的奇怪混合体。

examples.english: They were a perfect combination - Anton as chef and Guy as restaurant manager.
examples.chinese: 安东做厨师，盖伊做餐馆经理，他俩是对完美的搭档。

examples.english: If all the team are playing well, then don't change a winning combination.
examples.chinese: 如果全队都打得很好，那就不要改变这个赢球的组合。

examples.english: The market square is a fascinating mix of ancient and modern.
examples.chinese: 集市广场引人入胜，古今共冶一炉。

examples.english: She went to New York, where she began to meet a different mix of people -- artists, designers, and art collectors.
examples.chinese: 她去了纽约，在那儿她开始遇到各种各样的人——艺术家、设计师和艺术品收藏家。

examples.english: The England team is a good side, with a nice blend of experience and youthful energy.
examples.chinese: 英格兰队很不错，有经验的队员和朝气勃勃的队员配合得很好。

examples.english: Sometimes he seems to be an extraordinary blend of artist, poet and businessman.
examples.chinese: 有时他似乎是个集艺术家、诗人与商人于一身的怪杰。

expressions.text: a cross between something and something

examples.english: The expression on Paul's face was a cross between amusement and disbelief.
examples.chinese: 保罗脸上的表情是又好笑又怀疑。

examples.english: It's difficult to describe my job. I suppose I'm a cross between a secretary and a translator.
examples.chinese: 我的工作难以形容。我想大概是秘书和翻译的混合体。

examples.english: The use of chemical fertilizers has turned the farmer into a cross between an industrial chemist and a mechanic.
examples.chinese: 化学肥料的使用把农民变成了工业化学家和机械工。

examples.english: The film is a fusion of history and contemporary events.
examples.chinese: 这部电影中既有历史事件又有当代事件。

examples.english: His philosophy is a fusion of intellect and spiritual belief.
examples.chinese: 他的哲学融合了理智和灵性的信仰。

examples.english: a foodcrop that is a hybrid of wheat and rye
examples.chinese: 由小麦和黑麦杂交成的一种粮食作物

examples.english: The new constitution was a hybrid of presidential and parliamentary systems.
examples.chinese: 这一新宪法是总统制与议会制的混合体。

examples.english: a hybrid approach combining the merits of both methods
examples.chinese: 把两种方法的优点相结合的一种混合处理方法

centers.english: different emotions that are mixed together
centers.chinese: 交织在一起的不同感情

examples.english: Reactions to the announcement were somewhat mixed.
examples.chinese: 人们对这一声明有些反应不一。

examples.english: The other girls had mixed feelings, some of them were happy for me but some were jealous.
examples.chinese: 其他女孩子的感情很不同，有些人为我高兴，有些人则很嫉妒。

examples.english: Many new step-parents will admit to having mixed emotions about their new family.
examples.chinese: 许多刚做继父继母的人承认他们对于新的家庭有种复杂的感情。

examples.english: He had an air of combined gloom and relief.
examples.chinese: 他的神情既忧郁又宽慰。

examples.english: Their relief that war had been avoided was combined with sadness at what they had lost.
examples.chinese: 战争避免了，他们松了一口气，可同时又为所失去的东西感到难过。

examples.english: The mingled emotions that haunted his mind were reflected in his eyes.
examples.chinese: 萦绕在他心头的交织情绪在他眼中流露了出来。

examples.english: As I spoke his expression was one of amazement mingled with fury.
examples.chinese: 我讲话时，他的神情既吃惊又愤怒。

centers.english: when different things do not mix well
centers.chinese: 不同事物之间不相协调

examples.english: People having affairs at work often find that business and romance don't mix.
examples.chinese: 与同事有暧昧关系的人经常会觉得工作和浪漫不相容。

examples.english: Heavy drinking does not mix with a successful family life.
examples.chinese: 酗酒与美满的家庭生活互不相容。

examples.english: The centre gives advice to women who find the demands of marriage and work incompatible.
examples.chinese: 这个中心为那些觉得婚姻和工作互不相容的妇女提供建议。

examples.english: After we got married, we realized we were completely incompatible.
examples.chinese: 我们婚后发现我俩完全格格不入。

examples.english: These computers are incompatible with our present system.
examples.chinese: 这些电脑与我们现在的系统不兼容。

examples.english: In the experience of many European countries, socialism and religion do not go well together.
examples.chinese: 从许多欧洲国家的经历来看，政治和宗教不能很好地共存。

centers.english: art and culture

examples.english: I studied art at school.
examples.chinese: 我在学校里学过美术。

examples.english: The statue is a fine example of early Christian art.
examples.chinese: 这尊塑像是早期基督教艺术的典范。

examples.english: Is a pile of bricks in a museum really art?
examples.chinese: 博物馆里的一堆砖块真的能算是艺术吗?

examples.english: There was an exhibition of Adams’ paintings at the Museum of Modern Art.
examples.chinese: 现代艺术博物馆里举行过一次亚当斯的画展。

examples.english: Many people find it difficult to understand abstract art.
examples.chinese: 许多人都觉得抽象艺术很难明白。

examples.english: Art critics were not impressed by the collection.
examples.chinese: 艺术评论家对这批收藏不以为然。

examples.english: The government should provide more money for the arts.
examples.chinese: 政府应该提供更多的钱来发展艺术。

examples.english: They have drama classes at the arts centre every Thursday night.
examples.chinese: 他们每个星期四晚上在艺术中心上戏剧课。

examples.english: I've always been interested in the arts even though I didn't have much talent myself.
examples.chinese: 我一向对艺术很感兴趣，虽然我本人并没有多少艺术天赋。

examples.english: Under the new government much of the funding for the performing arts would be cut.
examples.chinese: 在新政府的控制下，表演艺术的资金将被大幅削减。

examples.english: Granston is a graphic artist who now teaches visual arts and journalism at the college.
examples.chinese: 格兰斯通是平面造型艺术家，目前他在大学里教授视觉艺术和新闻学。

examples.english: Pitt worked as a medical illustrator before turning to fine art.
examples.chinese: 皮特改行搞美术之前是医学书籍的插图画家。

examples.english: Sales of fine art on the Internet are not booming, but many experts feel that the net will play a significant role in the market.
examples.chinese: 美艺术品的网上销售生意不是很好，但许多专家认为网络将会对这个市场起很大的作用。

examples.english: Morris and other artists sought to close the chasm between the decorative or ‘minor’ arts and the fine arts.
examples.chinese: 莫里斯以及其他一些艺术家在努力弥补装饰艺术或称“次要”艺术和美术之间的分歧。

examples.english: The magazine is devoted to rock music, fashion, and other aspects of youth culture.
examples.chinese: 这本杂志专门介绍摇滚乐、时装等青年文化。

examples.english: Johnson's mother stressed intellectual and artistic achievement, while his father considered intellect and culture to be unmanly.
examples.chinese: 约翰逊的母亲重视知识和艺术成就，而他父亲却认为才识和文化缺乏阳刚之气。

examples.english: Ballet is a 400-year-old art form, born in the courts of Europe.
examples.chinese: 芭蕾舞是一种有400年历史的艺术形式，始见于欧洲的宫廷中。

examples.english: Lehr tries to help her students understand that theater is an expressive art form.
examples.chinese: 莱尔试图让学生明白，戏剧是一种表现艺术形式。

centers.english: something that an artist has produced

examples.english: The collection contains works by Kahlo and Picasso.
examples.chinese: 收藏品中有卡洛和毕加索的作品。

examples.english: Her later works reflected her growing depression.
examples.chinese: 她的后期作品反映出她越来越严重的忧郁倾向。

examples.english: Some of the director's best works were created during his neo-realist period.
examples.chinese: 这位导演的最佳作品中有些是在他的新现实主义时期创作的。

examples.english: From a single lump of clay, Torrence had produced a work of art.
examples.chinese: 托兰斯就用单单的一块陶土创作出了一件艺术品。

examples.english: The sketches were never meant to be works of art but are beautiful nonetheless.
examples.chinese: 这些素描根本不是什么艺术作品，但是却非常漂亮。

examples.english: The best works of art deal with man's struggle with the human condition.
examples.chinese: 最好的艺术作品都是以人与生存环境作斗争为主题。

examples.english: Adam Smith's masterpiece ‘The Wealth of Nations’ was written in the 18th century.
examples.chinese: 亚当·斯密的代表作《国富论》于18世纪写成。

examples.english: Thirteen people helped Michelangelo create his masterpiece on the ceiling of the Sistine Chapel.
examples.chinese: 有13个人帮助米开朗琪罗完成了他在西斯廷礼拜堂天顶上的代表作。

examples.english: The Davis-Evans recording of ‘Porgy and Bess’ has been rightly called a jazz masterpiece.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯和埃文斯录制的《波吉和贝丝》堪称爵士乐的代表作。

centers.english: relating to art or culture

examples.english: The Czech Republic has a long artistic tradition.
examples.chinese: 捷克共和国有着悠久的艺术传统。

examples.english: In 1881 when the first moving pictures were shown to the public, it was hailed as an ‘artistic revolution’.
examples.chinese: 1881年，第一部电影在向公众播映之后，被誉为“艺术的革命”。

examples.english: The director feared that business decisions would affect the film's artistic quality.
examples.chinese: 导演担心，商业决策将会影响电影的艺术品质。

examples.english: The Principal feels that cultural education is very important.
examples.chinese: 校长认为文化教育非常重要。

examples.english: Baroque music was part of a broader cultural movement that affected all the arts.
examples.chinese: 巴罗克音乐属于广义的文化运动，它影响了所有的艺术。

centers.english: someone who produces art

examples.english: Leonardo was the greatest artist of his time.
examples.chinese: 莱奥纳多是他那个时代最伟大的艺术家。

examples.english: I bought some post cards of prints by Japanese artists.
examples.chinese: 我买了一些日本画家版画作品的明信片。

examples.english: The obituary described Nureyev as ‘a great dancer and a true artist’.
examples.chinese: 讣文上称努里耶夫是一个“伟大的舞蹈家和真正的艺术家”。

centers.english: good at producing art

examples.english: She described her mother as ‘very intelligent and artistic’.
examples.chinese: 她说她母亲“非常聪慧，精于艺术”。

examples.english: That's a lovely picture - I never realized you were so artistic.
examples.chinese: 那幅画画得很好一没想到你那么有艺术天分。

examples.english: We encourage the children to use their creative abilities.
examples.chinese: 我们鼓励孩子们发挥自己的创造力。

examples.english: Ed, you are so creative - where did you learn to draw like that?
examples.chinese: 埃德，你真有创造力啊—你那样画是从哪里学的？

examples.english: Davis was one of the most creative jazz musicians of our time.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯是我们那个时代最有创造力的爵士音乐家之一。

centers.english: someone who is very interested in the arts

examples.english: Sempaio is a highly cultured lawyer with a love of classical music.
examples.chinese: 塞佩奥热爱古典音乐，是一个非常儒雅的律师。

examples.english: The Art Nouveau Cafe is a popular meeting place for the city's cultured classes.
examples.chinese: “新艺术咖啡馆”是这个城市文人雅士经常光顾汇聚的场所。

examples.english: A genuine culture lover, the Prime Minister was a patron of the arts on a grand scale.
examples.chinese: 作为一名真正的文化爱好者，首相是一个很大的艺术赞助人。

examples.english: Performances are sponsored by fast food restaurants and other unlikely patrons of the arts.
examples.chinese: 演出由快餐店等与艺术不大有关的团体赞助。

examples.english: While the culture vultures looked round the ruined temples, the rest of us headed straight for the beach.
examples.chinese: 那些艺术爱好者去参观破败的庙宇，我们其他人却直奔海滨了。

examples.english: He's a bit of a culture vulture - he goes to the theatre just about every week.
examples.chinese: 他可算是酷爱艺术，几乎每个星期都要去看戏。

examples.english: Jake's having a party for all his arty friends.
examples.chinese: 杰克正在为他那些附庸风雅的朋友搞一个聚会。

examples.english: He thought of the band as just an artsy-fartsy bunch of students pretending to play rock ‘n’ roll.
examples.chinese: 他认为那个乐队不过是一群附庸风雅的学生在装模作样地演奏摇滚乐。

centers.english: someone who does not like art

examples.english: I wouldn't expect a philistine like you to understand my paintings.
examples.chinese: 我才不会指望像你这样一个艺术的门外汉能看懂我的画。

examples.english: The American desire for material goods caused Europeans to dismiss them as philistines.
examples.chinese: 美国人的物欲使欧洲人对他们不屑一顾，认为他们不懂艺术。

centers.english: a place where art is shown

examples.english: One of the rooms has been made into a small modern art gallery.
examples.chinese: 其中一个房间已改成一个小小的现代艺术画廊。

examples.english: We spent the afternoon looking at paintings in the National Gallery.
examples.chinese: 下午我们在国家美术馆看画。

examples.english: Dale is showing some of his work in one of the galleries downtown.
examples.chinese: 戴尔要在城里的一家画廊展出他的部分作品。

examples.english: The museum has a few of Van Gogh's early paintings.
examples.chinese: 博物馆里藏有梵高的一些早期画作。

examples.english: Baldesaro is in New York preparing a showing at the Museum of Modern Art.
examples.chinese: 鲍尔德萨罗正在纽约准备在现代艺术博物馆举行的一场画展。

examples.english: Have you seen the O'Keefe exhibition yet?
examples.chinese: 你看过奥基夫的画展了吗？

examples.english: The exhibition of works by Hans Memling opens next week.
examples.chinese: 汉斯·梅林的作品展将于下周开展。

examples.english: Many of the photographs on exhibition were taken by artists who worked primarily in other media.
examples.chinese: 许多参展的摄影作品由主要在其他媒体工作的艺术家拍摄。

examples.english: Tomorrow is the opening night of her show in Cork Street, London.
examples.chinese: 明天晚上她在伦敦科克街举行的个人展品正式开幕。

examples.english: a show of new work by young artists
examples.chinese: 青年艺术家的新作展

centers.english: to paint pictures

examples.english: Geraint was sitting on the beach, painting the seagulls and the fishing boats.
examples.chinese: 杰兰特坐在海滩上画海鸥和渔船。

examples.english: The exhibition focuses on the urban pictures painted by Camille Pissarro in the last decade of his career.
examples.chinese: 展览着重于卡米耶·毕沙罗创作生涯最后十年画的城市生活。

examples.english: I'm going to paint a picture of the church.
examples.chinese: 我打算把那座教堂画下来。

examples.english: The pictures in Paul Gunn's exhibition were all landscapes, most beautifully painted in oils.
examples.chinese: 保罗·岗恩画展的作品都是很美的风景画，大部分是油画。

examples.english: I'm not very good at painting.
examples.chinese: 我不太擅长绘画。

examples.english: a painting class
examples.chinese: 绘画课

centers.english: someone who paints pictures

examples.english: This is by the great Spanish painter, Goya.
examples.chinese: 这是西班牙大画家戈雅的作品。

examples.english: Michelangelo, sculptor, painter, architect, and poet, died in 1564.
examples.chinese: 雕塑家、画家、建筑师兼诗人米开朗基罗于1564年去世。

examples.english: Sir Henry Raeburn, the famous Scots portrait painter
examples.chinese: 亨利·雷伯恩爵士，著名的苏格兰肖像画家

examples.english: Turner was probably the greatest landscape painter that England has ever produced.
examples.chinese: 透纳很可能是英国有史以来最伟大的风景画家。

examples.english: an exhibition of works by Italian artists
examples.chinese: 意大利画家作品展

examples.english: At that time Picasso was a struggling artist, little known outside Paris.
examples.chinese: 那时候，毕加索是位正在苦苦奋斗的画家，其知名度仅局限于巴黎市内。

examples.english: We asked a local artist to come and show her work to the students.
examples.chinese: 我们请来一位本地画家，将她的作品展示给学生看。

centers.english: to paint walls/doors/rooms etc

examples.english: I'm going to paint the bathroom tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我打算明天粉刷浴室。

examples.english: What colour did you paint the doors?
examples.chinese: 你把门漆成了什么颜色?

examples.english: The walls were painted tomato red, with matching red drapes.
examples.chinese: 墙壁被粉刷成了番茄红，配上相配的红窗帘。

examples.english: They've just finished decorating the kitchen.
examples.chinese: 他们刚粉刷过厨房。

examples.english: We spent all weekend decorating.
examples.chinese: 整个周末我们在贴墙纸。

examples.english: Mum had the whole house decorated before she moved in.
examples.chinese: 妈妈搬进去住之前，让人把整座房子装修了一遍。

examples.english: When they first moved in, they completely redecorated the whole house.
examples.chinese: 他们最初迁入时，把整幢房子彻底重新装潢过。

examples.english: We're thinking of having our house redecorated -- can you recommend anyone?
examples.chinese: 我们正在考虑请人来把房子重新装潢一遍——你能否推荐一下？

examples.english: The thieves had resprayed the truck and changed the license plates.
examples.chinese: 窃贼重新喷涂了卡车车身，并改换了号码牌。

examples.english: After the accident I took the car to a garage to have it resprayed.
examples.chinese: 事故发生后，我把汽车开到修理厂，请人重新喷涂车身。

centers.english: someone who paints walls, houses etc as their job
centers.chinese: 以油漆墙壁、门窗等为职业的人

examples.english: The painters are upstairs painting the offices at the moment.
examples.chinese: 漆匠们现在正在楼上油漆办公室。

examples.english: Adolf Hitler worked as a house painter in Austria before becoming involved in politics.
examples.chinese: 阿道夫·希特勒涉足政界前在奥地利当房屋油漆匠。

examples.english: The decorators have left their ladders and paints all over the house -- it a real mess.
examples.chinese: 装潢工人把梯子和油漆罐在房子里放得到处都是—真是一团糟。

examples.english: We wanted the work to be done properly, so we decided to get the decorators in.
examples.chinese: 我们想把事情干好，所以我们决定雇用装修工。

centers.english: words for describing something that has been painted
centers.chinese: 描述已被涂上颜料或油漆的东西的词语

examples.english: On the shelf there was a painted statue of the Virgin Mary.
examples.chinese: 架子上放着一尊上了色的圣母马利亚像。

examples.english: The temple was decorated with brightly painted figures and bits of colored glass.
examples.chinese: 那座庙的墙上装饰着色彩鲜艳的人像和彩色玻璃片。

examples.english: a beautiful hand-painted vase
examples.chinese: 一只精美的手漆花瓶

examples.english: The front door was painted yellow.
examples.chinese: 前门被漆成黄色。

examples.english: beautiful jewel boxes painted in distinctive shades of red, yellow, blue, green
examples.chinese: 被漆成红、黄、蓝、绿等独特色彩的漂亮珠宝盒

examples.english: a row of humble fisherman's cottages, painted in pastel tones of pink, ochre, and yellow
examples.chinese: 粉红、赭色、黄色等色调柔和的一排渔人小屋

examples.english: The vases were painted with pictures of flowers and butterflies.
examples.chinese: 这些花瓶上绘有花卉与蝴蝶的图案。

centers.english: to draw a picture, pattern, line etc

examples.english: What are you drawing?
examples.chinese: 你在画什么？

examples.english: She can draw really well.
examples.chinese: 她的画画得非常好。

examples.english: I'm good at drawing animals, but I can't draw people.
examples.chinese: 我擅长画动物，但画人物不行。

examples.english: Mike was sitting outside, drawing a picture of the trees at the bottom of the garden.
examples.chinese: 迈克坐在外面画花园尽头的那些树。

examples.english: Someone had drawn a line under my name.
examples.chinese: 有人在我名字下划了一条线。

examples.english: Maggie grabbed a piece of paper and quickly sketched the bird before it flew away.
examples.chinese: 玛吉抓过一张纸，趁那只鸟没飞走前赶快把它画下来。

examples.english: He sat by the river, sketching.
examples.chinese: 他坐在河边画素描。

examples.english: I always doodle while I'm talking on the phone.
examples.chinese: 我在打电话时总是乱涂乱画。

examples.english: Simon was lying on the floor, doodling on a sheet of paper.
examples.chinese: 西蒙躺在地板上，在一张纸上乱涂画。

examples.english: Katie can't draw a real picture yet but she enjoys scribbling with crayons.
examples.chinese: 凯蒂还不能很正经地画画，但她喜欢用蜡笔乱涂乱画。

examples.english: Oh no! One of the kids has scribbled all over my report!
examples.chinese: 噢，糟了！有个孩子把我的报告画得一塌糊涂！

examples.english: The children traced the map of France and then wrote in the names of the places they had visited.
examples.chinese: 孩子们映描了法国地图，并写上他们到过的地名。

centers.english: something that you draw

examples.english: Leonardo da Vinci's drawings show an immensely inventive and inquiring mind.
examples.chinese: 莱奥纳多·达·芬奇的画显示出他极富创造性与探索精神的心智。

examples.english: I did a drawing of the church.
examples.chinese: 我画了一幅这座教堂的画。

examples.english: She opened her folder and took out a sketch of her mother.
examples.chinese: 她打开文件夹，取出一张她母亲的速写画。

examples.english: Phil drew a sketch to show us what the new school would look like.
examples.chinese: 菲尔画了张速写给我们看新学校是什么样子的。

examples.english: I've done a rough sketch of how to get to the church.
examples.chinese: 我粗略地画了张怎么去教堂的路线图。

examples.english: By the end of the lecture the back of my book was covered in little doodles.
examples.chinese: 讲座结束时，我的书背面全是一块块涂涂画画。

examples.english: How am I going to get all these scribbles off the wallpaper?
examples.chinese: 我怎么把墙纸上那些乱涂乱画擦掉呢？

centers.english: a picture that you paint or draw

examples.english: Van Gogh's "Sunflowers’ is one of the most famous pictures in the world.
examples.chinese: 梵高的《向日葵》是世界上最著名的画作之一。

examples.english: an early picture by the French Impressionist painter Claude Monet
examples.chinese: 一幅法国印象主义画家克劳德·莫奈的早期作品

examples.english: There was a picture of a windmill on the bedroom wall.
examples.chinese: 卧室的墙上有一幅画着风车的画。

examples.english: The house belonged to the Duke of Wellington, and his picture hangs in the hall.
examples.chinese: 这宅子属于威灵顿公爵，他的画像悬挂在大厅里。

examples.english: I didn't know the word in Japanese so I drew a little picture.
examples.chinese: 我不知道怎么用日语表达这个单词，于是便画了幅小小的图。

examples.english: Daisy did a lovely picture of a cat at school today.
examples.chinese: 黛西今天在学校画了一只漂亮的猫咪。

examples.english: an exhibition of paintings by French artists
examples.chinese: 法国艺术家绘画展

examples.english: The museum has an impressive collection of early 20th century American paintings.
examples.chinese: 该博物馆收藏有大量20世纪初的美国绘画作品。

examples.english: a painting of the Grand Canal in Venice by Canaletto
examples.chinese: 卡纳莱托画的威尼斯大运河

examples.english: Gaugin is famous for his paintings of native women on the Pacific island of Tahiti.
examples.chinese: 高更以表现太平洋塔希提岛上的土著女性的绘画作品而著称。

examples.english: Dali did several paintings of his wife.
examples.chinese: 达利画了几幅他妻子的画像。

examples.english: The classroom was bright and cheerful, with childrens’ drawings on the walls.
examples.chinese: 教室明亮宜人，墙上是孩子们的画作。

examples.english: On the wall was a drawing of a woman's head by Matisse.
examples.chinese: 墙上有一幅马蒂斯画的女性头像。

examples.english: Degas did a series of drawings of dancers at the ballet school in Paris.
examples.chinese: 德加画了一系列巴黎的芭蕾舞学校舞蹈者的素描。

examples.english: I thought your sketches of the garden were very attractive.
examples.chinese: 我觉得你那些花园的速写很漂亮。

examples.english: The architect did a sketch of how the building will look when it's finished.
examples.chinese: 建筑师画了一张建筑建成后的效果草图。

examples.english: Gabriella did a quick sketch of her baby daughter.
examples.chinese: 加布里埃拉很快画了一张宝宝女儿的速写。

examples.english: The new encyclopedia is full of color illustrations and photographs.
examples.chinese: 新的百科全书里有很多彩色插图和照片。

examples.english: Who did the illustrations for the book? They're lovely.
examples.chinese: 这本书里的插图谁画的？真漂亮。

examples.english: Anna's bedroom wall was covered in posters of James Dean and Marilyn Monroe.
examples.chinese: 安娜的卧室墙上全是詹姆斯·迪安和玛丽莲·梦露的海报。

examples.english: A full-length portrait of the Queen hung on the wall.
examples.chinese: 墙上挂着女王的全身像。

examples.english: The artist Hans Holbein was best known for painting portraits.
examples.chinese: 画家汉斯·霍尔拜因以肖像画著称。

examples.english: Rembrandt's ‘Self-portrait with feather in cap’
examples.chinese: 伦勃朗的《头戴有羽毛的帽子的自画像》

examples.english: A series of 43 self-portraits by Greek-born American Lucas Samaras (b. 1936) have been donated to the Museum of Modern Art, New York.
examples.chinese: 希腊出生的美国人卢卡斯·萨马拉斯〔生于1936年〕的43幅系列自画像被捐赠给了纽约现代艺术博物馆。

examples.english: ‘What kind of photographs do you take?’ ‘Mostly landscapes, and some portraits.’
examples.chinese: “你拍什么样的照片？”“大多数是风景照，有些是肖像照。”

examples.english: Constable is probably England's most famous landscape artist.
examples.chinese: 康斯太布尔可能是英国最著名的风景画家。

examples.english: Renoir did several studies of small plants and flowers.
examples.chinese: 雷诺阿画了几张植物和花卉的试画。

examples.english: The exhibition includes a series of studies by Picasso for his painting Guernica.
examples.chinese: 展览中包括毕加索为了创作《格尔尼卡》而作的一系列试画。

examples.english: To be honest, I prefer his flower pictures to his nudes.
examples.chinese: 说实话，与他的裸体画相比，我更喜欢他的花卉作品。

examples.english: a nude by Picasso
examples.chinese: 毕加索创作的一幅裸体画

centers.english: a humorous drawing

examples.english: The cartoon shows a group of elephants trying to get into a phone-box.
examples.chinese: 这幅漫画表现了一群大象想挤入一个公共电话亭的场面。

examples.english: a satirical cartoon that appears in the Washington Post
examples.chinese: 《华盛顿邮报》上的一幅讽刺漫画

examples.english: We had our caricatures drawn by a street artist while we were on vacation in Turkey.
examples.chinese: 我们在土耳其度假时请了一位街头画家给我们画人物漫画。

examples.english: Politicians are used to having caricatures of themselves printed in newspapers.
examples.chinese: 政治家对报纸上刊出讽刺自己的漫画已习以为常。

centers.english: a photograph

examples.english: Ansel Adams’ photographs of the American wilderness are now worth thousands of dollars.
examples.chinese: 安塞尔·亚当斯拍摄的美国旷野风景照现在价值数千美元。

examples.english: Visitors are not allowed to take photographs inside the Museum.
examples.chinese: 游客不准在博物馆内拍摄照片。

examples.english: My camera's fully automatic and takes really good photographs.
examples.chinese: 我的照相机是全自动的，拍出的照片非常棒。

examples.english: I hate having my photograph taken.
examples.chinese: 我讨厌别人给我拍照。

examples.english: The photographer asked all the guests to stand still and pose for the wedding photograph.
examples.chinese: 摄影师请所有的宾客站着不动，摆好姿势拍婚礼照。

examples.english: Karen showed me a picture of her new boyfriend -- he's very good-looking!
examples.chinese: 卡伦给我看她新男友的照片一他非常英俊！

examples.english: Did you take any good photos while you were in Paris?
examples.chinese: 你在巴黎时拍了好看的照片吗？

examples.english: Do you want me to take your photo?
examples.chinese: 你要我给你拍照吗？

examples.english: I saw her picture in the paper the other day.
examples.chinese: 几天前，我在报纸上看到了她的照片。

examples.english: They're just snapshots, but some of them are really good.
examples.chinese: 那些只是快照，但有些真的很棒。

examples.english: Did you take any snaps in Greece?
examples.chinese: 你在希腊拍过照片吗？

examples.english: She showed me a snapshot of her three children.
examples.chinese: 她给我看了她三个孩子的照片。

examples.english: Patrick was showing his holiday snaps to everyone in the office.
examples.chinese: 帕特里克在把他假日里拍的照片展示给办公室里所有人。

examples.english: I got some great shots of Mount Fuji with the sun setting behind it.
examples.chinese: 我拍了几张太阳正从富士山背后落下的好照片。

examples.english: The cars went past so quickly that she only had time to take a couple of shots.
examples.chinese: 汽车经过时速度很快，她只来得及拍了几张快照。

examples.english: The police showed me some mug shots, and I had to say if any of them looked like the man who attacked me.
examples.chinese: 警察给我看了一些犯人的脸部照片，要我指认貌似袭击我的人。

examples.english: Chris is studying photography at night school.
examples.chinese: 克里斯在夜校学摄影。

examples.english: an exhibition of Irwin Penn's renowned fashion photography for Vogue magazine
examples.chinese: 欧文·佩恩的著名《时尚》杂志时装摄影展

centers.english: what you see in a mirror, on a screen, or on water
centers.chinese: 镜中、屏幕上或水上所见

examples.english: The images on a computer screen are made up of thousands of tiny dots.
examples.chinese: 电脑屏幕上的影像是由成千上万个小点组成的。

examples.english: the flickering images of an old silent movie
examples.chinese: 一部老无声电影闪烁的影像

examples.english: The digitized images can be stored on a computer hard disk, or printed out on special photographic paper.
examples.chinese: 数字化影像可以储存在电脑硬盘上或打印到专门的相纸上。

examples.english: Anna stood looking at her reflection in the mirror.
examples.chinese: 安娜站着照镜子。

examples.english: the reflection of the moon on the surface of the lake
examples.chinese: 湖面上月亮的倒影

centers.english: the front or back of a picture

examples.english: In the foreground of the picture is a man with a black beard, dressed in rough workingman's clothes and a hat.
examples.chinese: 那幅画的前景是一个身穿粗制工装、戴帽子、蓄着黑胡子的男人。

examples.english: It was a photo of everyone in my class, with the school building in the background.
examples.chinese: 这是一张我们全班的集体照，背景是学校教学楼。

centers.english: a test of your knowledge or skill

examples.english: Several students were caught cheating on the test.
examples.chinese: 几名学生考试作弊被抓到。

examples.english: The committee is calling for national tests for American schoolchildren.
examples.chinese: 该委员会呼吁对全美小学生实行全国测验。

examples.english: I have a chemistry test tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 明天我要考化学。

examples.english: Did Lauren pass her driving test?
examples.chinese: 劳伦通过驾驶考试了吗？

examples.english: Listen carefully, because there will be a test on this next week.
examples.chinese: 仔细听好，因为下周有个测验要考这个内容。

examples.english: Students are not allowed to talk during the examination.
examples.chinese: 考试时学生不许讲话。

examples.english: He's upstairs, revising for an exam.
examples.chinese: 他在楼上温习功课迎考。

examples.english: How did you do in your exams?
examples.chinese: 你考试考得如何？

examples.english: In Japan, entrance exams are very important, and many children go to extra classes to prepare for them.
examples.chinese: 在日本，入学考试是非常重要的，许多儿童都去参加补习班来预备考试。

examples.english: We have a biology exam tomorrow, and I haven't done any work for it yet.
examples.chinese: 明天我们要考生物，但我还没有作任何准备。

examples.english: Final exams will be just before Christmas.
examples.chinese: 期末考试就在圣诞节前。

examples.english: We have a history quiz every Monday.
examples.chinese: 每周一我们都有一次历史小测验。

examples.english: He likes giving pop quizzes, to see if the kids are remembering anything.
examples.chinese: 他喜欢进行突击测验来看看孩子们是否记住了所学的内容。

examples.english: You can either take an oral exam or do a 25 page essay.
examples.chinese: 你可以参加口试，或者写一篇25页的论文。

examples.english: Nicky got an A in her Spanish oral.
examples.chinese: 尼基在西班牙语口试中得了个A。

examples.english: We've got our chemistry practical tomorrow morning.
examples.chinese: 我们明天上午要参加化学实验考试。

examples.english: During my finals I was revising till 3 o'clock in the morning most days.
examples.chinese: 大学毕业考试期间的大部分日子里，我都要温习到凌晨3点。

examples.english: This class will require two papers, a midterm, and a final.
examples.chinese: 这门课要完成两篇论文，期中和期末考试各一次。

examples.english: Assessment is by means of a written exam at the end of the course.
examples.chinese: 考核方法是在课程结束时进行笔试。

examples.english: Most schools nowadays prefer to use continuous assessment, because it gives a fairer picture of how the student has done during the whole year.
examples.chinese: 大部分学校现在都喜欢进行持续性评估，因为这样能够更加公正地反映出学生在整个学年内的表现。

examples.english: The government plans to introduce compulsory testing in junior schools from the age of 7.
examples.chinese: 政府计划在小学为七岁以上的学童推行强制考核制度。

examples.english: I believe that some sort of testing is always necessary in order to motivate students.
examples.chinese: 我相信为了激励学生学习，总需要有某种形式的考核。

centers.english: to do a test or exam

examples.english: Anna will be taking her music exam in the summer.
examples.chinese: 夏天安娜要参加音乐考试。

examples.english: Most young people take the SAT exams in their last year of high school.
examples.chinese: 大多数年轻人都在中学的最后一年参加学业能力倾向测验。

examples.english: I took my driving test when I was 18.
examples.chinese: 18岁时我参加了驾驶考试。

examples.english: I'd better go home -- I've got to do an exam in the morning.
examples.chinese: 我最好回家—明天上午还得考试呢。

examples.english: The kids are doing a test this morning.
examples.chinese: 孩子们今天上午要考试。

examples.english: We have a quiz every week on what we've been reading.
examples.chinese: 我们每周都有小测验，考读过的内容。

examples.english: I have a written exam in the morning and an interview in the afternoon.
examples.chinese: 我上午参加笔试，下午面试。

examples.english: Lucy's got her driving test next week.
examples.chinese: 露西下周要参加驾驶考试。

examples.english: I sat my final exams last year.
examples.chinese: 我去年参加了毕业考试。

centers.english: to do a test or exam again

examples.english: She wants to retake her French A-level exam.
examples.chinese: 她想重考法语的高级程度考试。

examples.english: Ralph retook his driver's test in June.
examples.chinese: 拉尔夫6月份重考了驾驶考试。

examples.english: If you fail the test, you can always take it again
examples.chinese: 如果你考试不及格总是可以重考的。

examples.english: Can you sit a retake?
examples.chinese: 你可以参加补考吗？

examples.english: It only makes sense to resit an exam if you strongly believe you will do better.
examples.chinese: 只有当你坚信自己可以考得更好时，补考才是有意义的。

examples.english: Is a resit possible?
examples.chinese: 可以参加补考吗？

centers.english: someone who does an exam

examples.english: Candidates should be at their desks 5 minutes before the start of the examination.
examples.chinese: 考生应在开考前五分钟就座。

centers.english: to give students a test or exam
centers.chinese: 对学生进行测验或考试

examples.english: Schools are required to give students national standardized tests.
examples.chinese: 学校需要对学生进行全国统一考试。

examples.english: The French teacher gave us a test on irregular verbs, and I got 100%.
examples.chinese: 法语教师对我们进行了有关不规则动词的测验，我得了100分。

examples.english: New students are tested in math and reading, and placed in the appropriate class.
examples.chinese: 新生须进行数学和阅读测试，然后分配到合适的班级。

examples.english: Tomorrow you'll be tested on the main events of the Civil War.
examples.chinese: 明天要考你们美国内战时发生的重要事件。

examples.english: Next lesson I'm setting you all a test to see how much you've learned.
examples.chinese: 下堂课我要出题给大家测验，看看大家掌握了多少。

examples.english: Whoever set the exam didn't seem to know the material very well.
examples.chinese: 出考卷的人好像不太熟悉内容。

examples.english: To save time, students will be examined in groups of three.
examples.chinese: 为节省时间，学生将三人一组接受考试。

examples.english: Students will be examined on all aspects of Russian literature and history.
examples.chinese: 学生将参加俄国文学和历史各方面知识的考试。

centers.english: a person who judges a test or exam

examples.english: The examiner told him to relax and then asked him to turn on the engine.
examples.chinese: 考官叫他放松，然后叫他发动引擎。

examples.english: Students who, in the opinion of the examiners, do not reach the required standard must take the exam again.
examples.chinese: 主考人认为未达要求标准的学生必须重考。

centers.english: to pass a test

examples.english: ‘I'm taking my driving test today.’ ‘Do you think you'll pass?’
examples.chinese: “我今天要参加驾驶考试。”“你觉得自己能通过吗？”

examples.english: New recruits have to pass a physical fitness test.
examples.chinese: 新兵必须通过身体健康测试。

examples.english: She was so nervous about her examination results, but in fact she passed with flying colours.
examples.chinese: 她对自己的考试成绩感到很不安，但实际上她考得很好。

examples.english: After qualifying, she joined the NatWest Bank as a corporate advisor.
examples.chinese: 她取得资格后就成为了国民威斯敏斯特银行的一名公司顾问。

examples.english: She wanted to improve her English so she could qualify as a translator.
examples.chinese: 她想提高英语水平以便取得当译员的资格。

examples.english: What are you going to do after you graduate?
examples.chinese: 你毕业后打算干什么?

examples.english: Mitch graduated from Stanford in 1998 with a degree in biochemistry.
examples.chinese: 1998年米奇毕业于斯坦福大学，获生物化学学位。

examples.english: She graduated in modern languages and now works as an interpreter.
