examples.chinese: 她毕业于现代语言专业，现在是一位译员。

examples.english: Daniel scraped through the entrance exam.
examples.chinese: 丹尼尔勉强通过了入学考试。

examples.english: I scraped through my exams with marks just good enough to keep my place in the school of pharmacy.
examples.chinese: 我勉强通过了考试，成绩刚够我继续留在药剂系里。

examples.english: The entrance exam is very difficult and only a small minority of candidates get through.
examples.chinese: 入学考试很难，只有少数考生通过了。

examples.english: Reading that book at the last minute was the only thing that got me through the history exam.
examples.chinese: 我在最后关头读了那本书才使我通过了历史考试。

examples.english: ‘How'd his exams go?’ "He breezed through - no trouble at all.
examples.chinese: “他考试考得怎样？”“他轻松通过了，没任何困难。”

examples.english: She sailed through her driving test the first time.
examples.chinese: 她第一次参加驾驶考试就轻松过关。

examples.english: My teacher told me she passed me only because she knew I'd had a really hard year.
examples.chinese: 老师告诉我说，她让我及格只是因为她知道我这一年学习很用功。

examples.english: I didn't think the candidate deserved to be given a pass but the other examiners disagreed.
examples.chinese: 我认为不应该给这名应考者及格，但其他考官却不同意。

centers.english: to fail a test

examples.english: She failed her history class and has to take it again.
examples.chinese: 她历史考试不及格，只得重考。

examples.english: ‘How did Chris do in his driving test?’ ‘He failed.’
examples.chinese: “克里斯驾驶考试考得怎样？”“他没通过。”

examples.english: Many of the boys in the program had been failing at school.
examples.chinese: 参加该项目的男孩子中有许多都在学校考试中不及格。

examples.english: He was cutting school and flunking classes.
examples.chinese: 他逃学，考试也不及格。

examples.english: She flunked the state bar exam four times before she finally passed.
examples.chinese: 她参加州律师资格考试四次不及格后才终于通过了。

examples.english: Brant flunked out of college his first year.
examples.chinese: 布兰特上大学第一年就因所有科目都不及格而退学了。

examples.english: I bombed on the quiz he gave us.
examples.chinese: 他给我们布置的小测验我考砸了。

examples.english: ‘How'd it go?’ ‘I bombed on the written section, but I think I did okay on the multiple choice part.’
examples.chinese: “考得怎样？”“笔试部分我考得一塌糊涂，但我觉得多项选择题部分我考得还好。》

centers.english: a test on something to check it or find out about it
centers.chinese: 为进行检查或了解情况而对某物进行的测试

examples.english: a ban on nuclear tests
examples.chinese: 禁止核试验

examples.english: Teachers can use the program to create tests to check children's progress.
examples.chinese: 教师可以使用这套程序来设计考题检查学童的进度。

examples.english: A blood test can be done to determine who the baby's father is.
examples.chinese: 可以进行血液测试来确定这个婴儿的生父是谁。

expressions.text: carry out a test/do a test

examples.english: Doctors did several tests to find out what was wrong.
examples.chinese: 医生做了几次化验想找出什么地方出问题。

examples.english: We carry out safety tests on all our products.
examples.chinese: 我们对所有产品都进行安全测试。

examples.english: There is a simple test for diabetes.
examples.chinese: 有一种简单的检测方法可验出糖尿病。

examples.english: A blood test will show if you are a possible bone marrow donor.
examples.chinese: 做个血液化验就可以验出你是不是合适的骨髓捐赠者。

examples.english: Nine-month-old babies are given hearing tests by health visitors.
examples.chinese: 卫生访问员会给九个月大的婴儿做听力测试。

examples.english: In one experiment, the men were not allowed to sleep and then were tested on how well they were able to concentrate.
examples.chinese: 在一项实验中，参与者不准睡觉，然后测试这些人的注意力集中程度。

examples.english: The elderly people were taught meditation in the 12-week experiment.
examples.chinese: 这个为期12周的实验教老年人冥想。

examples.english: They are doing experiments to learn more about the affects of alcohol on the brain.
examples.chinese: 他们在做实验以更了解酒精对大脑的影响。

examples.english: The Institute plans to conduct no further experiments on monkeys.
examples.chinese: 这家研究所打算不再用猴子做试验。

examples.english: an experimental medical treatment
examples.chinese: 试验性疗法

examples.english: The FDA has granted researchers permission to use the drug experimentally on humans.
examples.chinese: 美国食品和药物管理局允许研究人员在人身上试用这种药物。

examples.english: Results of the drug trial will be available soon.
examples.chinese: 这种药的试验结果很快就会出来了。

examples.english: Probert is overseeing the trials of the new explosives.
examples.chinese: 普罗伯特在监督这种新炸药的试验。

examples.english: Until now, the drug was only available to people taking part in clinical trials.
examples.chinese: 迄今为止，这种药只提供给参加临床试验的人使用。

examples.english: The U.S. conducted atomic weapons testing in Nevada during the 1950s.
examples.chinese: 20世纪50年代美国在内华达州进行了核武器试验。

examples.english: The aircraft is still in the early stages of testing and production.
examples.chinese: 这种飞机尚在测试和制造的初期。

examples.english: Athletes will be subject to random drug testing.
examples.chinese: 运动员要接受随机抽样的药物检测。

examples.english: The national railroad is doing a few trial runs to test new equipment.
examples.chinese: 全国铁路正在进行几次试车以测试新设备。

examples.english: The results of the pilot have been encouraging.
examples.chinese: 试验结果令人鼓舞。

examples.english: The government sponsored a pilot project to find out how the education reforms would work in schools.
examples.chinese: 政府资助了一项试验计划以了解教育改革会在学校产生什么效果。

examples.english: Extensive piloting has shown us our study book will be a useful aid to students.
examples.chinese: 广泛的试验显示我们的学习用书将对学生十分有用。

centers.english: to do a test on something in order to check it or find out about it
centers.chinese: 给某物做试验以进行检查或了解其情况

expressions.text: do a test/anexperiment/ conduct/perform an experiment/a test

examples.english: He has a blood test done each week to see how effective the medication is.
examples.chinese: 他每周验一次血以了解药物的作用。

examples.english: Children can use the magnet to perform many simple experiments.
examples.chinese: 儿童可以用磁铁来做许多简单的实验。

examples.english: The company did not conduct adequate safety tests.
examples.chinese: 这家公司没有进行足够的安全试验。

examples.english: The space shuttle crew conducted experiments on plants and cells in a special lab.
examples.chinese: 航天飞机上的工作人员在一个特殊的实验室里对植物和细胞进行实验。

examples.english: Test your brakes to check they are working correctly.
examples.chinese: 试一试刹车看看是否运作正常。

examples.english: The devices were tested very carefully and are considered safe.
examples.chinese: 这些设备已仔细地检查过并被认为是安全的。

examples.english: These products have not been tested on animals.
examples.chinese: 这些产品没有在动物身上做过试验。

examples.english: The water is being tested for signs of chemical pollution.
examples.chinese: 水正进行测试，检查是否受到化学污染。

examples.english: Doctors ran tests to determine the cause of his irregular heartbeat.
examples.chinese: 医生做了一些检验以确诊他心律不齐的原因。

examples.english: We think the equipment is working fine, but we still need to run a few more tests.
examples.chinese: 我们觉得这个设备运作正常，但我们还需要再做些测试。

examples.english: Police scientists are carrying out tests on the murder victim's clothes.
examples.chinese: 警方的科学家正在对凶杀案受害者的衣服进行一系列检验。

examples.english: Results of tests carried out at this clinic are always strictly confidential.
examples.chinese: 在这个诊所进行检验所得的结果总被严格保密。

examples.english: Toy manufacturers use employees’ children to try new products out.
examples.chinese: 玩具制造商用雇员的孩子来试验他们的新产品。

examples.english: He visited the center several times, trying out different computer software packages.
examples.chinese: 他几度走访该中心，试用不同的电脑套装软件。

examples.english: The system's effectiveness will soon be put to the test.
examples.chinese: 这套系统的有效性很快将受到试验。

examples.english: The soldiers worked out a strategy which was then put to the test in a training exercise.
examples.chinese: 士兵们想出了一种策略，并在一次演习中进行了试验。

examples.english: The coursebook was piloted in schools all over Europe.
examples.chinese: 这本教科书在全欧洲的学校里试用。

centers.english: to use a person or animal in a test

examples.english: For some disease research, experimenting on animals is very important.
examples.chinese: 对某些疾病的研究而言，在动物身上做试验是很重要的。

examples.english: Some of the government labs had experimented on humans without their consent.
examples.chinese: 一些政府的实验室在未得到当事人同意的情况下在人身上做试验。

examples.english: This face cream has not been tested on animals.
examples.chinese: 这种面霜未经动物试验。

examples.english: They've just received permission to begin testing the new drug on humans.
examples.chinese: 他们刚得到批准开始在人身上试验这种新药。

examples.english: Because breast cancer is common in older women, we screen all women over 50.
examples.chinese: 因为乳腺癌常见于年纪较大的妇女，所以我们给所有年过50岁的妇女作检查。

examples.english: If you receive blood in the United Kingdom it will already have been screened for HIV.
examples.chinese: 要是在英国接受输血，这些血液是已经经过艾滋病病毒筛查的了。

examples.english: The company has recently introduced free health screening for all its employees.
examples.chinese: 这家公司最近在所有的职员中推行了免费的健康检查。

examples.english: I'm not against vivisection, but obviously we all want to avoid animals suffering unnecessarily.
examples.chinese: 我不反对动物活体试验，但显然我们都想要避免让动物遭受不必要的痛苦。

examples.english: Without vivisection many of the recent anti-cancer advances simply would not have been made.
examples.chinese: 不做动物活体实验的话，许多最新的抗癌方面的医疗进展是不可能取得的。

centers.english: a person or animal that is used in a test
centers.chinese: 被用于做实验的人或动物

examples.english: Subjects for this experiment represented a good cross-section of the American population.
examples.chinese: 这项实验的对象是全体美国人的典型代表。

examples.english: All subjects were tested for perfect hearing before the experiment began.
examples.chinese: 在实验开始前，所有接受实验者都先做了听力健全测试。

examples.english: Would you both mind being the guinea pigs for a new recipe I want to try out?
examples.chinese: 我想试做一种新菜谱，你们俩愿意当品尝者吗？

examples.english: Students are complaining that they are being used as guinea pigs for the new maths syllabus.
examples.chinese: 学生抱怨说他们成了新数学课程的实验品。

centers.english: a busy person

examples.english: She's very busy -- it's her daughter's wedding next week.
examples.chinese: 她非常忙——下周她女儿要举行婚礼。

examples.english: Angela was becoming more and more unhappy, but her husband was too busy to notice.
examples.chinese: 安杰拉越来越郁闷，但她丈夫因太忙没有注意到这情况。

examples.english: Not now Stephen, I'm busy.
examples.chinese: 现在不行，斯蒂芬，我正忙着呢。

examples.english: Critics say the mayor is too busy campaigning to do his job properly.
examples.chinese: 批评者说市长过于忙着竞选宣传，因而未能做好分内事。

examples.english: She was busy with business matters so we decided not to burden her with our problems.
examples.chinese: 她正忙于公事，所以我们决定不再拿我们的难题去增加她的负担。

examples.english: He's retired now, but his work for the youth club keeps him busy.
examples.chinese: 他现已退休，但还在为青年俱乐部做事，所以一直很忙。

examples.english: The chefs were busily preparing hundreds of tantalizing dishes for the banquet.
examples.chinese: 厨师们正忙着为宴会准备数百道令人垂涎欲滴的菜。

examples.english: I'm sorry I can't talk -- I have a lot to do before my wife gets home.
examples.chinese: 很抱歉我不能多讲，在妻子回家之前我有许多事要做。

examples.english: Let's get started. We have an awful lot to do and not much time to do it.
examples.chinese: 我们开始吧。我们有非常多的事情要做，而时间又不多。

expressions.text: have a lot on have a lot going o

examples.english: He says he'll try and see you as soon as possible, but he has a lot going on this afternoon.
examples.chinese: 他说会尽快见你，但他今天下午很忙。

examples.english: We've got so much on at work I couldn't possibly go on holiday now.
examples.chinese: 我们的工作很忙，所以我现在不可能去度假。

examples.english: It's my son's birthday party tomorrow. I've been absolutely rushed off my feet getting ready for it.
examples.chinese: 明天是我儿子的生日聚会。为了做准备工作，我一直忙个不停。

examples.english: All the sales assistants are run off their feet. The shop ought to take on more staff.
examples.chinese: 营业员全都忙个不停，商店里应该增加人手。

expressions.text: be up to your ears/neck in

examples.english: I'm sorry I can't talk to you now -- I'm up to my neck in paperwork.
examples.chinese: 很抱歉我现在无法与你谈话，我正忙于处理文件。

examples.english: Teachers nowadays are up to their ears in administration and don't have much time for teaching.
examples.chinese: 现今的老师都忙于行政工作，没有多少时间教学。

examples.english: Jerry says he's under a lot of pressure at the moment from his boss.
examples.chinese: 杰里说眼下老板给他施加了很大的压力。

examples.english: Some people don't work well under pressure.
examples.chinese: 有些人在压力下就不能把工作做好。

examples.english: Don't expect any help from them -- they're snowed under at the moment.
examples.chinese: 不要指望从他们那里得到任何帮助，他们眼下正忙得透不过气来。

examples.english: Since the hurricane, builders and roofers have been snowed under with work.
examples.chinese: 飓风过后，建筑工人和盖屋顶的工人一直忙得团团转。

examples.english: I've been on the go all week -- I'm looking forward to a relaxing weekend now.
examples.chinese: 我一整个星期都在忙个不停——正盼望周末放松一下呢。

examples.english: She's always on the go. I don't know how she does it.
examples.chinese: 她总是忙忙碌碌。我不知道她是怎么过的。

examples.english: I'm sorry I can't help you -- I have my hands full right now.
examples.chinese: 很抱歉我帮不了你—此刻我正忙得不可开交。

examples.english: You must have your hands full with all this work to do and the children to look after.
examples.chinese: 你有这么多工作要做，还要照顾孩子，肯定是忙得脱不开身了。

expressions.text: have your hands full doing something

examples.english: The Mexican government had its hands full fighting a war on three fronts.
examples.chinese: 墨西哥政府要打一场三面受敌的仗简直是穷于应付了。

centers.english: a busy time

examples.english: I'm going to bed. We have a busy day ahead of us tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我要去睡觉了。明天我们要忙一天呢。

examples.english: When you are in the police force, the night shift is always busiest.
examples.chinese: 当警察上夜班总是最忙的。

examples.english: Restaurant managers often employ temporary staff at busy times of the year.
examples.chinese: 餐馆经理常在一年中最忙的时候雇用临时工。

examples.english: Tomorrow will be a very full day. You have several clients to see and two meetings in the afternoon.
examples.chinese: 明天的日程非常紧密。你要会见几个客户，下午还要开两个会。

examples.english: It was really hectic at work today.
examples.chinese: 今天的工作非常繁忙。

examples.english: He'd just returned from a hectic 10-day trip to New York.
examples.chinese: 他去纽约马不停蹄地工作了十天，刚刚回来。

examples.english: I know you have a hectic schedule, but could you pick something up for me on your way home?
examples.chinese: 我知道你有很多事要做，但你回家时能顺道帮我买点东西吗？

examples.english: It's all go around here this morning. Ten new orders, all marked "URGENT'.
examples.chinese: 今天上午这里真忙个不停。来了十张新订单，上面都标着“紧急”的字样。

centers.english: not busy

examples.english: Let's find a time when you're not so busy, and talk about this calmly.
examples.chinese: 等你不这么忙的时候，大家心平气和地谈谈这件事吧。

examples.english: Hopefully by March we won't be so busy.
examples.chinese: 但愿到了3月份我们就不会这么忙了。

examples.english: I could help if you want -- I don't have much to do this weekend.
examples.chinese: 你需要的话我可以帮你，这个周末我没多少事可做。

centers.english: a busy place

examples.english: Even though it was eight o'clock the market was still busy.
examples.chinese: 尽管已经8点钟了，市场上仍很热闹。

examples.english: Paris nowadays is a busy and crowded metropolis.
examples.chinese: 巴黎如今是一个繁忙而拥挤的大都市。

examples.english: The main road is busy, so be careful when you try to cross it.
examples.chinese: 主路上交通繁忙，横过时要小心。

examples.english: This is a very busy area, what with the school, the bus station, and the new shopping mall.
examples.chinese: 这是个非常热闹的地区，因为有学校，有公共汽车站，还有新建的购物商场。

examples.english: We got to the disco at about 10 o'clock and it was already quite lively.
examples.chinese: 我们在10点钟左右到达迪斯科舞厅，那里已经相当热闹了。

examples.english: It's the liveliest bar in town, very popular with the tourists.
examples.chinese: 这是城里最热闹的酒吧，很受游客欢迎。

examples.english: The bustling downtown area of Chicago is dotted with massive new office developments.
examples.chinese: 芝加哥的闹市区到处都是新建的办公大楼。

examples.english: The old market is a busy, bustling place, full of local colour.
examples.chinese: 旧市场是一个繁忙热闹的地方，充满了地方色彩。

centers.english: a time when a place is busy

examples.english: The morning is our busy time here. It's quieter in the afternoon.
examples.chinese: 我们这里上午很热闹，下午就比较安静。

examples.english: July is our busiest month, when all the tourists come.
examples.chinese: 7月是我们最忙的一个月，所有游客都在这时候来。

examples.english: In the last hectic weeks before the show started we were practically living in the theatre to get it ready on time.
examples.chinese: 演出前的最后几周非常忙，我们实际上是住在剧院里，以便为这台戏的按时上演作好准备。

examples.english: There are two hundred guests arriving in one hour! That's why things are so hectic!
examples.chinese: 一小时内来了二百位客人！所以才会忙得团团转！

examples.english: The rush hour in most British cities does not start until about 8 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 在英国大部分城市里，交通高峰时间大约是在8点钟以后。

examples.english: The buses are so crowded during the rush hour, you never get a seat.
examples.chinese: 高峰时间里公共汽车非常拥挤，你根本不可能坐到位子。

examples.english: There should be more buses to cope with the extra passengers at peak times.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车在繁忙时间应增加班次以接载额外的乘客。

examples.english: We usually have two people working in the shop, but at peak periods we employ extra staff.
examples.chinese: 我们店里一般有两名工作人员，但在旺季我们会增聘人手。

examples.english: In the peak month of July the market sold three hundred tons of melons a day.
examples.chinese: 在7月份这个旺季里，市场上一天就可以售出300吨甜瓜。

examples.english: Buy your tickets early and avoid the rush.
examples.chinese: 你们要早些买票，以避开争购热潮。

examples.english: We're building up our stocks of books and toys to get ready for the Christmas rush.
examples.chinese: 我们正在增加书籍和玩具的存货，为圣诞购物潮作好准备。

examples.english: Relax on the beach or enjoy the hustle and bustle of the busy fishing port.
examples.chinese: 要么在海滩上尽情放松，要么去观赏一下繁忙的渔港中那熙来攘往的景象。

examples.english: It's hard to imagine that the park is only a few minutes’ walk from the hustle and bustle of midtown Manhattan.
examples.chinese: 很难想象从热闹的曼哈顿中心到那个公园只需要走几分钟的路。

examples.english: The season begins in May, and most of the hotels open then.
examples.chinese: 旅游旺季从5月开始，到时候大部分旅馆都开始营业。

examples.english: This place gets so crowded during the season. It's much nicer in the winter when the tourists have gone.
examples.chinese: 旅游旺季时这个地方非常拥挤。冬天等游客都走了就好多了。

examples.english: Don't travel to Benidorm in season. The hotels are crowded.
examples.chinese: 不要在旺季里去贝尼多姆旅游，酒店里都挤满了人。

examples.english: They put their prices up considerably during the high season.
examples.chinese: 旺季时他们就大幅度抬价。

centers.english: a place that is not busy

examples.english: The house is quiet now that the kids are gone.
examples.chinese: 小孩现在都出去了，屋子里很安静。

examples.english: Madison Plains, Ohio, is a quiet community of 1200 inhabitants.
examples.chinese: 俄亥俄州的麦迪逊·普莱恩斯是个宁静的社区，有1,200个居民居住。

examples.english: Sticklepath is a sleepy little town right in the heart of the Devonshire countryside.
examples.chinese: 斯蒂克尔帕斯是德文郡乡村中部的一座寂静小镇。

examples.english: It was a sleepy provincial hotel, not used to having more than two people staying there at any one time.
examples.chinese: 那是在都城以外的一家很冷清的小旅舍，一般同时接待不超过两个客人。

centers.english: a time when a place is not busy

examples.english: It's been a very quiet morning so far. Only two people came in, and neither of them bought anything.
examples.chinese: 今天早上到现在为止一直很清静。只来了两个人，而且什么也没买。

examples.english: Even on a quiet weekend there are plenty of people on the beach.
examples.chinese: 即使是在清静的周末，海滩上也有许多人。

examples.english: This time of the year is always quiet. It gets busy again after winter.
examples.chinese: 每年这时候总是很清静，冬天一过又会热闹起来。

examples.english: Things have been slow, real slow, for months now.
examples.chinese: 生意一直很清淡，非常清淡，到现在已经有几个月了。

examples.english: February is the slowest month in the tourist trade.
examples.chinese: 2月份是旅游业最清淡的季节。

examples.english: At off-peak times senior citizens can use the sports centre at reduced rates.
examples.chinese: 在非繁忙时间长者可以优惠价使用运动中心的设施。

examples.english: Take advantage of off-peak reductions for package holidays.
examples.chinese: 去享受淡季包价旅游的优惠价吧。

examples.english: If you can travel off-peak it will be cheaper and the trains will be less crowded.
examples.chinese: 你如果在淡季旅游，不但花费较少，而且火车也不那么拥挤。

expressions.text: in the off-season/ out of season

examples.english: We had arrived in Biarritz out of season and most of the hotels were closed.
examples.chinese: 我们在旅游淡季到达比亚里茨，那时大部分旅馆都已歇业。

examples.english: If you go for a holiday in the off-season, you'll find some real bargains.
examples.chinese: 如果你在旅游淡季去度假，费用会很便宜。

examples.english: During the off-season, rates start at $75 per night for a cabin that sleeps two.
examples.chinese: 在淡季期间，一间双人住的小木屋每晚收费由75美元起。

centers.english: busy

examples.english: ‘Can I speak to Nigel?’ ‘I'm sorry, he's busy right now. Can he call you back later?’
examples.chinese: “请奈杰尔听电话好吗？”“抱歉，他正忙着。他稍后给你回电话行吗？”

examples.english: I kept asking her to come out for a drink but for some reason she was always busy.
examples.chinese: 我常常叫她出来喝一杯，可不知怎么的她总是说忙。

examples.english: Do you have anything on Saturday night?
examples.chinese: 你周六晚上有安排吗？

examples.english: I'm sorry, Mrs Evans isn't available at the moment. Shall I get her to call you back?
examples.chinese: 抱歉，埃文斯太太眼下正忙着。我让她回电话给你好吗？

examples.english: I'll just check her diary, she may have a prior engagement.
examples.chinese: 我这就去看一下她的工作日程，她也许已有了安排。

examples.english: Mr Lewis regrets that he is unable to attend, owing to a previous engagement.
examples.chinese: 刘易斯先生已另有约在先，所以很遗憾无法出席。

examples.english: I'm sorry, he's tied up at the moment. Could you call back later?
examples.chinese: 对不起，他现在忙得脱不开身。请晚些时候再打电话来好吗？

examples.english: I can't see you tomorrow, I'm tied up all day.
examples.chinese: 我明天无法与你见面，我要忙一整天。

centers.english: a shop

examples.english: Could you run down to the shop and get me some cigarettes?
examples.chinese: 你帮我到商店跑一趟买些香烟好吗?

examples.english: A lot of the stores on the main street had been boarded up.
examples.chinese: 大街上有许多商店都用木板封起来了。

examples.english: I asked in my local record shop but they couldn't help me.
examples.chinese: 我在我们当地的唱片店里问过了，可他们帮不了我。

examples.english: I saw Helen at the grocery store this morning.
examples.chinese: 今天早上我在杂货店里看到海伦。

examples.english: I got it from the secondhand furniture shop.
examples.chinese: 我是在二手家具店里买的。

examples.english: a new health food shop
examples.chinese: 一家新开的健康食品商店

examples.english: It's where the old jewelry store used to be.
examples.chinese: 这是那家老珠宝店以前所在的位置。

examples.english: A lot of the old Victorian buildings are being pulled down to make way for chain stores.
examples.chinese: 许多维多利亚时代的旧楼都纷纷被拆了，以腾出地方来建连锁店。

examples.english: Benetton has retail outlets in every major European city.
examples.chinese: 贝纳通在欧洲各大城市都有零售店。

examples.english: The company has been forced to close hundreds of its retail outlets.
examples.chinese: 这家公司被迫关闭了数百家零售店。

centers.english: different types of shop

examples.english: Can you get pine nuts in the grocery store?
examples.chinese: 你能在超市里买到松子吗?

examples.english: There are plans to open a new supermarket next year.
examples.chinese: 有计划明年要开一家新的超级市场。

examples.english: Believe me, if his father wasn't so rich, that guy would be working in a convenience store.
examples.chinese: 相信我，要不是他爸爸这么有钱，那家伙还在便利店里打工呢。

examples.english: The corner shop's started selling sandwiches now, and I'd rather go there than the supermarket.
examples.chinese: 那家街头小店现在开始卖三明治了，我宁愿去那里，而不愿去超级市场。

examples.english: His parents ran a little corner store in the Castro in San Francisco.
examples.chinese: 他父母在圣弗朗西斯科的卡斯特罗开了一家街头小店。

examples.english: She runs a French bakery in North London.
examples.chinese: 她在伦敦北部开了一家法式面包房。

examples.english: Many small independent butchers are closing down.
examples.chinese: 许多独立的小肉铺都关门了。

examples.english: There's an Italian deli here and their homemade ravioli is delicious.
examples.chinese: 这里有一家意大利美食店，他们自制的方饺味道很好。

examples.english: I had to wait for fifteen minutes at the deli counter this morning.
examples.chinese: 今天早上我在美食柜台等了15分钟。

examples.english: Ruth waited for him outside the newsagent's.
examples.chinese: 露丝在报刊店外面等他。

examples.english: He bought a paper at a newstand near the entrance to the park.
examples.chinese: 他在公园入口附近的一个报摊上买了一份报纸。

examples.english: There must be a kiosk selling phone cards around here somewhere.
examples.chinese: 这里附近肯定有一家小商亭有电话卡出售的。

examples.english: Justin used to mind the stall while his father was in the cafe, drinking.
examples.chinese: 以前，父亲要是去咖啡馆喝一杯，贾斯廷就看着摊子。

examples.english: I bought a few trinkets at the souvenir stand.
examples.chinese: 我在卖纪念品的小摊上买了几件小饰物。

examples.english: The trouble is, you can't really try the clothes on at a market stall.
examples.chinese: 问题是，在市场的小摊上不能试衣服。

centers.english: big shops

examples.english: We couldn't find anything we wanted in the big department stores, and then we came across this little boutique.
examples.chinese: 我们在大的百货商店里买不到自己想要的东西，后来偶然找到了这家小小的时装店。

examples.english: A new Tesco superstore is being planned for the site.
examples.chinese: 这块工地正在规划建一个新的特斯科超级商场。

examples.english: You'll find these at your local home improvement center.
examples.chinese: 这些你可以在当地的家居装璜中心购买。

examples.english: It's the only good garden centre around here.
examples.chinese: 这是这一带唯一的一家不错的园艺中心。

centers.english: a lot of shops together in one place
centers.chinese: 集中在一个地方的许多商店

examples.english: The boy was found dead two days after he disappeared from a shopping centre.
examples.chinese: 那男孩在一家购物中心失踪两天后被发现已经死亡。

examples.english: They had a big Santa exhibition on at the shopping center.
examples.chinese: 他们在购物中心举办了一个圣诞礼物大展销。

examples.english: We'll probably go to the mall and check out the beds there.
examples.chinese: 我们可能要去购物中心看看那里的床。

examples.english: It's difficult to get a parking space at Shepherd's Mall.
examples.chinese: 在谢泼德购物中心很难找到停车的地方。

examples.english: Strip malls were springing up all over town, and the local residents were up in arms.
examples.chinese: 镇上突然到处出现了一排排商店，当地居民非常愤怒。

examples.english: They've got a lovely new Burton's open in the precinct now.
examples.chinese: 他们在步行商业区开了一家全新的伯顿。

examples.english: They wandered around the shopping precinct for an hour while Suzie was having her hair cut.
examples.chinese: 在苏茜剪头发的时候，他们在购物区逛了一小时。

examples.english: I think they should make the whole area a pedestrian precinct.
examples.chinese: 我觉得他们应该把这里的整个地方变成一个步行区。

examples.english: I bet you could have got that cheaper at the market.
examples.chinese: 我打赌，那个东西在市场上买肯定更便宜。

examples.english: You occasionally see eel in the fish market, but it's quite rare these days.
examples.chinese: 鱼市上偶尔能见到黄鳝，但现在比较少见。

centers.english: people who work in a shop

examples.english: She was a bit rude, that shop assistant, don't you think?
examples.chinese: 她有点无礼，就是那个店员，你说呢?

examples.english: I'm working weekends as a sales clerk.
examples.chinese: 我周末当售货员。

examples.english: I'd like to see the manager please.
examples.chinese: 我想见经理。

examples.english: Ron was promoted to branch manager of the North West region.
examples.chinese: 罗恩被提升为西北区的分区经理。

examples.english: A lot of the smaller shopkeepers didn't have any insurance at all.
examples.chinese: 许多小店主没有买任何保险。

examples.english: The money for the Christmas lights was raised by a group of local shopkeepers, who want to attract shoppers to the area.
examples.chinese: 圣诞节彩灯的资金是当地一些店主筹集的，他们希望吸引购物者到该区去。

examples.english: The market traders have started a petition to try and stop the development going ahead.
examples.chinese: 市场商贩发起了请愿，试图阻止开发的进行。

centers.english: to dig earth out of the ground

examples.english: I found two dogs digging in the garden, looking for bones.
examples.chinese: 我看到两条狗在花园里翻扒着找骨头。

examples.english: He was paid twelve dollars an hour to dig ditches and mix cement.
examples.chinese: 他挖沟和拌水泥每小时工资12美元。

examples.english: There were two fishermen on the beach digging for worms.
examples.chinese: 海滩边有两个渔民在挖蚯蚓。

examples.english: The workmen began digging a hole in the middle of the road.
examples.chinese: 工人开始在路中央挖一个洞。

examples.english: Some of the prisoners escaped through a tunnel they had dug under the wall.
examples.chinese: 一些囚犯从他们在墙底下挖掘的一条地道逃跑了。

examples.english: The turtle excavates a hole in the sand and then lays its eggs in it.
examples.chinese: 海龟在沙里挖洞，然后把蛋下在里面。

examples.english: Workers had already begun excavating the foundations for the house.
examples.chinese: 工人们已经开始为房子挖掘地基了。

examples.english: Special drilling equipment is being used to tunnel beneath the sea bed.
examples.chinese: 在海底下面挖隧道用的是特殊的钻探设备。

examples.english: worms tunnelling through the mud
examples.chinese: 在泥里钻洞的蚯蚓

examples.english: After days of digging, the prisoners finally tunnelled their way out of the camp and escaped.
examples.chinese: 经过很多天的挖掘，那些战俘最终掘了一条地道逃出了集中营。

examples.english: Toads burrow into the earth to hide from their enemies.
examples.chinese: 蟾蜍掘洞钻入土里以躲避天敌。

examples.english: The rabbits had burrowed a hole under the fence.
examples.chinese: 兔子在篱笆下掘了个洞。

examples.english: The fields are ploughed as soon as the winter crop is removed.
examples.chinese: 冬季作物一收割完毕就犁地。

examples.english: Farmers were plowing their land and planting cotton seeds.
examples.chinese: 农民们正在犁地并播种棉籽。

centers.english: to remove something from the ground by digging

examples.english: What do we do with these trees after we've dug them out?
examples.chinese: 我们把这些树掘起后该怎么办呢？

examples.english: The spade was missing, and we had no choice but to dig the weeds out by hand.
examples.chinese: 铲子不见了，我们没有别的办法，只好用手把野草挖出来。

examples.english: A couple of local people helped us dig out the car, which was by now completely stuck in the mud.
examples.chinese: 汽车现已完全陷入了泥里，几个当地人帮我们把它挖了出来。

examples.english: Thieves came in the night and dug up the body.
examples.chinese: 夜里小偷来把尸体挖了出来。

examples.english: I don't know why archaeologists get such a thrill from digging up broken pots.
examples.chinese: 我不知道考古学家为什么对挖出这些破罐子会如此兴奋。

examples.english: Squirrels bury hundreds of nuts, then dig them up in winter when food is scarce.
examples.chinese: 松鼠把成百上千的坚果藏起来，然后在冬天食物缺乏的时候再挖出来吃。

examples.english: Archaeologists are excavating a Bronze Age settlement on the outskirts of the village.
examples.chinese: 考古学家正在该村庄外围发掘青铜器时代的一个村落。

examples.english: The mosaics excavated in 1989 have now been fully restored.
examples.chinese: 于1989年发掘出来的马赛克现已完全恢复原状。

examples.english: The excavation revealed layer after layer of ancient fortifications.
examples.chinese: 这次发掘一层层地展现出古要塞的真貌。

examples.english: Lead has been mined in this area for hundreds of years.
examples.chinese: 这一地区开采铅矿已有几百年的历史了。

examples.english: The church was built by Don José de la Borda, who made his fortune mining silver.
examples.chinese: 这座教堂是由唐·何塞·德·拉·博尔达捐资建造的，他靠开采银矿发了财。

examples.english: Most of the new settlers came here to mine for gold.
examples.chinese: 大多数新来的定居者到这里是为了淘金。

examples.english: Before World War I more than a million workers labored in the coal mines of Great Britain.
examples.chinese: 第一次世界大战前有一百多万工人在英国的煤矿工作。

centers.english: a group of students in a school, college etc
centers.chinese: 学校、学院等中的一群学生

examples.english: There are twenty kids in the class.
examples.chinese: 班里有20个孩子。

examples.english: She gets along well with the other children in her class.
examples.chinese: 她和班上其他孩子相处得很好。

examples.english: I'm going out with some friends from my dance class.
examples.chinese: 我要和舞蹈班上的几个朋友一起出去玩。

examples.english: I graduated in 1999. What class were you in?
examples.chinese: 我1999年毕业，你是哪个班的？

examples.english: She's in the fifth grade.
examples.chinese: 她念五年级。

examples.english: I really liked my eighth grade math teacher.
examples.chinese: 我非常喜欢八年级时的数学老师。

examples.english: The second grade class is doing a play about the Pilgrims.
examples.chinese: 二年级那个班要演关于清教徒移民的戏。

examples.english: According to the test, 40% of fourth-graders are not reading at the basic level.
examples.chinese: 根据这项测试，四年级的学生有40%未达到基本阅读水平。

examples.english: She's by far the brightest pupil in the form.
examples.chinese: 她是这个年级里最聪明的，远远超越其他学生。

examples.english: I'm in the third form.
examples.chinese: 我读中学三年级。

examples.english: Mrs Davies took the fifth form to the science museum.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯女士带领中学五年级学生去了科学博物馆。

examples.english: Some of the fifth-formers have started a rock band.
examples.chinese: 一些中学五年级学生成立了一个摇滚乐队。

examples.english: He works a lot harder than most of the students in his year.
examples.chinese: 他比同年级大多数学生都用功得多。

examples.english: There are 130 children in the second year.
examples.chinese: 二年级有130个学生。

examples.english: I hated teaching the fifth year. They were always causing trouble.
examples.chinese: 我讨厌教五年级。他们总是惹麻烦。

examples.english: A group of fourth-years are collecting money for food aid to Africa.
examples.chinese: 一群四年级学生为了向非洲提供食物援助而在进行募捐活动。

examples.english: She's in set one for maths and English and set two for history.
examples.chinese: 她的数学和英语在甲等班上，历史在乙等班上。

examples.english: I was useless at school -- always in the bottom set in every subject.
examples.chinese: 我读书很差，每门科目都总在班上最末等。

examples.english: We think you've improved sufficiently to go up to a higher set.
examples.chinese: 我们认为你进步了，能够升到高一级的班上。

examples.english: We were only freshmen, so the older kids liked to pick on us.
examples.chinese: 我们才一年级，因此高年级的家伙喜欢欺负我们。

examples.english: Chris remembers his freshman year at UCLA as if it were yesterday.
examples.chinese: 克里斯记得他上加州大学洛杉矶分校一年级的日子，仿佛就在昨天。

examples.english: This class is mainly for freshmen and sophomores.
examples.chinese: 这个班主要是为一、二年级学生开设的。

examples.english: George dropped out of college his sophomore year.
examples.chinese: 大学第二年，乔治退学了。

examples.english: a junior at NYU
examples.chinese: 纽约大学一名三年级学生

examples.english: Donna spent spring semester of her junior year in Paris.
examples.chinese: 唐娜是在巴黎度过她在大学第三年的春季学期的。

examples.english: I can't believe that Cari is a high school senior already.
examples.chinese: 我不能相信卡里已经是高中毕业班学生了。

examples.english: The entire senior class took a trip to Disneyworld.
examples.chinese: 毕业班全体学生去迪斯尼世界玩。

centers.english: the period of time during which a class is taught

examples.english: Heidi fainted during French class today!
examples.chinese: 今天上法语课时，海迪晕倒了！

examples.english: Let's go - I have my first class in 10 minutes!
examples.chinese: 一起走吧，我10分钟后要上第一堂课！

examples.english: Dominic will be having his first driving lesson this Thursday.
examples.chinese: 本周四，多米尼克将要上第一堂驾驶课。

examples.english: She gives English lessons to business people in the evenings.
examples.chinese: 晚上她给商业界人士上英语课。

examples.english: At our school we have four periods in the morning and three in the afternoon.
examples.chinese: 我们学校上午上四节课，下午上三节课。

examples.english: On Monday mornings there was French, English, and then a double period of maths.
examples.chinese: 星期一上午有法语课、英语课，然后是连着的两节数学课。

examples.english: We have 5 hours of English a week, including one session in the language laboratory.
examples.chinese: 我们每周上五小时的英语课，其中有一节课是在语音室上的。

examples.english: a lecture on the causes of the Russian Revolution
examples.chinese: 一场关于俄国革命起因的讲座

examples.english: Professor Blair is giving a series of lectures on Einstein's theories.
examples.chinese: 布莱尔教授在作有关爱因斯坦理论的系列讲座。

examples.english: Every week we have a seminar on modern political theory.
examples.chinese: 每周我们都上现代政治理论研讨班。

examples.english: Small group tutorials are used to discuss problems which come up in lectures.
examples.chinese: 小组指导课用于讨论讲座中出现的问题。

examples.english: Oxford's one-to-one tutorials are an effective but also costly way of teaching.
examples.chinese: 牛津大学一对一的个别指导课是一种行之有效但费用很高的教学方式。

centers.english: a series of lessons in one subject

examples.english: Are you enjoying the course?
examples.chinese: 你喜欢这门课吗？

examples.english: a course in music journalism
examples.chinese: 一门音乐新闻写作课

examples.english: The college is offering three basic computer courses this year.
examples.chinese: 今年该学院开设三门基础计算机课程。

expressions.text: take a course/class/ do a course

examples.english: She's taking a class in art history.
examples.chinese: 她在修读艺术史课程。

centers.english: someone's social class

examples.english: Success in this country seems to be based on class rather than on ability.
examples.chinese: 在这个国家，成功似乎靠的是社会等级而不是能力。

examples.english: the professional and managerial classes
examples.chinese: 专业人士和经理阶层

examples.english: The old class system is slowly disappearing.
examples.chinese: 旧的阶级体系正在慢慢淡化。

examples.english: There is a clear link between social class and educational achievement.
examples.chinese: 社会等级与教育成就有明显的联系。

examples.english: Some people argue that class distinctions do not exist in the U.S., but this is untrue.
examples.chinese: 有人论证说，美国不存在阶级差别，但这不是真的。

examples.english: The school takes kids from all sorts of backgrounds.
examples.chinese: 该校录取各种出身背景的孩子。

examples.english: We come from the same town and share a similar background.
examples.chinese: 我们来自同一个镇，出身背景也相似。

examples.english: The organization helps children from working-class backgrounds to go to university.
examples.chinese: 该组织帮助工人阶级出身的孩子上大学。

examples.english: Now that he was a bank manager, he wanted a car that would reflect his status.
examples.chinese: 既已当了银行经理，他想要一辆能显示自己社会地位的汽车。

examples.english: Many mothers feel that they have very low status in today's society.
examples.chinese: 许多母亲觉得在当今社会，她们的地位很低。

examples.english: The latest mobile phones have become status symbols among teenagers.
examples.chinese: 在青少年中间，最新款的手机已成为身份的象征。

examples.english: In the south of India there are up to 20 different castes.
examples.chinese: 在印度南部，有多达20个不同的种姓。

examples.english: Buddha was a social reformer who condemned India's caste system.
examples.chinese: 佛陀是一位社会改革家，他谴责印度的种姓制度。

centers.english: belonging to the highest class

examples.english: Most senior politicians in the UK are from upper-class families.
examples.chinese: 英国的大多数资深政治家都出身于上流社会家庭。

examples.english: He spoke with an upper-class accent.
examples.chinese: 他说话带有上流社会口音。

examples.english: In South America, the upper classes tend to be of European origin.
examples.chinese: 在南美，上层阶级往往是欧洲人后裔。

examples.english: Daughters of rich merchants would often marry into the aristocracy.
examples.chinese: 富商的女儿常嫁入贵族世家。

examples.english: old aristocratic families
examples.chinese: 古老的贵族家庭

examples.english: In many countries today only a privileged minority get the chance of going to university.
examples.chinese: 在当今许多国家，只有少数享有特权的人才有机会上大学。

examples.english: Her comments about immigrants revealed an astonishing sense of privilege and arrogance.
examples.chinese: 她关于移民的谈话暴露出她惊人的优越感和傲慢无理的态度。

expressions.gram: countable noun with singular or plural verb in British English

examples.english: The President has been accused of developing policies in favor of a small elite.
examples.chinese: 总统被指责制定迎合少数上层人士需要的政策。

examples.english: The sort of goods once reserved for the elite are now available to everyone.
examples.chinese: 曾经供上层人士专用的商品现在任何人都能买到。

examples.english: The British House of Lords is seen by many as an elitist institution.
examples.chinese: 许多人认为英国上议院是上层人士组成的机构。

examples.english: Will your posh university friends be coming tonight?
examples.chinese: 你那些派头十足的大学里的朋友今晚来吗？

examples.english: She went to a posh girls’ school in Switzerland.
examples.chinese: 她曾在瑞士一所女子贵族学校就读。

centers.english: the middle class

examples.english: The newspaper's readers are mostly middle class.
examples.chinese: 那份报纸的读者大都是中产阶级。

examples.english: They live in a middle-class neighbourhood on the edge of town.
examples.chinese: 他们住在市郊的中产阶级住宅区。

examples.english: The government needs the support of the middle classes to win the next election.
examples.chinese: 该政府需要中产阶级的支持以赢得下次大选。

examples.english: She rejected her parents’ conventional bourgeois lifestyle.
examples.chinese: 她拒绝接受父母那种传统的资产阶级生活方式。

examples.english: They never married because they believed that marriage was a bourgeois institution.
examples.chinese: 他们从未结婚，因为他们认为婚姻是有产阶级的习俗。

examples.english: The poor viewed with envy the increasing wealth of the bourgeoisie.
examples.chinese: 穷人十分羡慕资产阶级不断增长的财富。

examples.english: A revolution would be a threat to the nation's bourgeoisie.
examples.chinese: 革命是对该国资产阶级的威胁。

examples.english: The economic recession has put many white-collar workers in danger of losing their jobs.
examples.chinese: 经济衰退使许多白领工作者处于失业的危险之中。

centers.english: the lowest class

examples.english: Most of the people who live round here are working class.
examples.chinese: 住在附近的大多数人都是工人阶级。

examples.english: I come from a working-class family - I'm the first one to graduate from college.
examples.chinese: 我出身于工人阶级家庭—我是第一个大学毕业生。

examples.english: Cuts in welfare spending affect the working class most.
examples.chinese: 削减福利开支对工人阶级影响最大。

examples.english: It has been shown that children of lower-class parents are less likely to do well at school.
examples.chinese: 事实表明，父母属于下层阶级的孩子学业优秀的可能性较小。

examples.english: My mother's parents thought my father was terribly lower-class.
examples.chinese: 我的外祖父母认为我父亲的社会地位太低了。

examples.english: There was a time when tequila was a cheap product drunk only by the lower classes.
examples.chinese: 过去有一阵子，龙舌兰酒只是下层阶级的人喝的东西。

examples.english: Television has brought cheap entertainment to the masses.
examples.chinese: 电视向大众提供了廉价娱乐。

examples.english: Lenin's position depended on the support of the masses.
examples.chinese: 列宁的地位依赖于群众的支持。

examples.english: His political support comes mainly from blue-collar workers.
examples.chinese: 他的政治支持主要来自蓝领工人。

examples.english: The school had originally provided a good education for children of humble backgrounds.
examples.chinese: 起先该学校向出身卑微的孩子提供良好的教育。

examples.english: Eisenhower, Nixon, and Ford were all men of humble origins and no inherited wealth.
examples.chinese: 艾森豪威尔、尼克松和福特都出身卑微，没有财富可继承。

examples.english: The government has created an underclass who do not feel they have any rights in society.
examples.chinese: 这届政府造成了一个下层社会，他们感觉不到在社会中有任何权利。

centers.english: to move into a higher social class

examples.english: Hillary was bright and ambitious and wanted to move up in the world.
examples.chinese: 希拉里聪明而且雄心勃勃，想提高自己的社会地位。

examples.english: Education, he believed, was the only way that anyone could move up in the world.
examples.chinese: 他认为教育是唯一能使人提高社会地位的手段。

examples.english: a highly educated, upwardly mobile young woman
examples.chinese: 一个受过高等教育、社会地位正在提升的年轻女子

examples.english: The dating agency specializes in finding partners for the young and upwardly mobile.
examples.chinese: 这家婚姻介绍所专门为社会地位正在提升的年轻人士寻找伴侣。

examples.english: The new private schools cater for the children of social climbers rather than those of the old upper classes.
examples.chinese: 这些新的私立学校投合向上爬的人的孩子所需，而不是老式上流社会孩子的需要。

examples.english: The hotel lobby was full of the usual hangers-on and social climbers.
examples.chinese: 酒店的大堂里和平时一样，满是钻营拍马的人和一心向上爬的人。

centers.english: someone who thinks they are better than people from a lower social class
centers.chinese: 认为自己比较低社会阶层好的人

examples.english: Snobbish home-owners are protesting about a refugee family moving into their street.
examples.chinese: 势利眼的房主们在抗议一个难民家庭搬进他们的街道。

examples.english: Aunt Harriet was very rich and very snobbish.
examples.chinese: 哈丽雅特姑妈很有钱，而且很势利。

examples.english: My mother was such a snob she wouldn't let me play with the local children.
examples.chinese: 我母亲真是个势利眼，她不让我同当地小孩玩。

examples.english: They're just a bunch of snobs - you wouldn't want to be friends with them anyway.
examples.chinese: 他们就是一群势利鬼—你反正不会想同他们交朋友的。

examples.english: Tanya is so stuck-up. She won't go out with anyone who went to a state college.
examples.chinese: 塔尼娅很傲慢，她不愿与州立大学的毕业生交往。

examples.english: the spoiled, stuck-up daughter of a millionaire
examples.chinese: 一个百万富翁家被宠坏的、自以为了不起的女儿
